title: Graphic Designer + AI Video Generator + Video Editor
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and retail brand looking for a talented, creative, and fast-moving Graphic Designer, AI Video Generator, and Video Editor to join our team full-time.



We need someone highly skilled in graphic design, Amazon/eCommerce product visuals, video editing, and AI video generation tools. The ideal candidate must be creative, detail-oriented, responsive, and able to produce high-quality visual content quickly.



This is a real, long-term job opening for someone who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



About the Role

You will be responsible for creating high-converting visual content for Amazon listings, eCommerce platforms, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, Meta ads, and Amazon A+ Premium Content.



A major part of this role involves turning static product images into dynamic, engaging video content using motion graphics, AI video tools, camera movement effects, and professional video editing techniques.



You should be comfortable working with tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Canva, Illustrator, and AI video generation platforms such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, or similar tools.



Key Responsibilities

Design high-quality Amazon product images, including hero images, infographics, lifestyle images, and comparison charts.

Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

Ensure all Amazon visuals meet image requirements, including dimensions, white background, clarity, and quality standards.

Edit and retouch raw product photos to improve visual appeal.

Create packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

Research competitor listings and design trends to improve listing performance.

Create video ads and product videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, and Meta campaigns.

Transform static product images into dynamic videos using animation, parallax effects, simulated camera angles, 3D movement, motion graphics, and transitions.

Generate, edit, and refine AI video content using VEO 3.1, Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar AI video tools.

Turn product images, text prompts, and brand assets into engaging, high-converting video ads.

Create multiple hooks and ad variations for A/B testing.

Add captions, text overlays, trending audio, sound design, color grading, and seamless transitions.

Collaborate with the marketing, product, and creative teams to understand product features and selling points.

Iterate quickly based on feedback fro
dia buyers and performance data.

Maintain an organized workflow and deliver projects on time.

Stay updated with Amazon trends, eCommerce shopper behavior, social media trends, AI video tools, and best practices for digital advertising.

Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

Work efficiently. Fast, high-quality output is rewarded.

Requirements

Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Video Editor, or AI Video Creator, preferably for Amazon, eCommerce, or retail brands.

Strong portfolio showing Amazon product images, eCommerce graphics, video ads, and AI-generated video content.

Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Canva, and preferably After Effects.

Experience with AI video tools such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, Sora, Runway, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of prompt engineering for AI video generation.

Ability to turn still images into dynamic video content using motion, camera simulation, and animation techniques.

Good understanding of social media ad pacing, hooks, retention, and eCommerce conversion-focused creatives.

Basic knowledge of product photography and photo retouching is a plus.

Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

Ability to follow instructions accurately and adapt quickly to revisions.

Strong time management and organizational skills.

Good English communication skills.

Must be available for 30-40 hours per week.

Having your own repository of stock images/assets is a plus.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement

You must provide a portfolio or demo reel that includes:



Amazon or eCommerce product images.

Video ads or product videos.

Examples of videos created from static images using camera movement, parallax, animation, or motion graphics.

AI-generated video samples using tools such as VEO 3.1, Kling, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, or similar.

Applications without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.



Salary & Payment

Monthly Salary: PHP 75,000 - PHP 80,000



Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly payments



Performance-based bonuses are available for:



Number of images, videos, or design outputs created.

Speed and turnaround time.

Quality of work and performance.

Accuracy, creativity, and understanding of instructions.

Strong brand guideline execution.

High-performing ad creatives.

What We Offer

Full-time, long-term position.

Work-from-home flexibility.

Bi-weekly payment schedule.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling eCommerce and retail brand.

Creative freedom to test new design styles, video formats, and AI tools.

Performance-based rewards for fast and high-quality work.

How to Apply

Please send the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with graphic design, eCommerce visuals, video editing, and AI video generation.

Your portfolio or demo reel.

Specific examples of videos created from static product images.

Specific examples of AI-generated videos using VEO 3.1 or similar AI tools.

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word “Scale” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: Long-Term VA for US Medical Education Company — Kajabi/GHL Required, Path to Full-Time
description:
Long-Term VA for US Medical Education Company — Kajabi/GHL Required, Path to Full-Time



ABOUT SCIMPLE EDUCATION



Scimple Education is a fast-growing US-based medical education company changing how clinicians learn — through live conferences, on-demand courses, interactive content, and podcasts. We're expanding our operations team to keep up with our growth.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a detail-oriented, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to be the operational right hand for our team. This is a long-term remote position with a clear path to full-time employment and leadership for the right person. You won't be a task-taker — you'll be a collaborator we rely on.



• Hours: 20–30 hrs/week to start, with a clear path to full-time within 3–6 months for the right person.

• Compensation: $8–$11/hr depending on experience, plus performance bonuses and a 13th-month bonus after 12 months.

• Schedule: Largely autonomous; about a 4-hour overlap with US Eastern preferred for tea
etings — the rest of the work is async.

• Location: Fully remote.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Phase 1 — Operations & Communications (first 60–90 days)



• Manage funnels,
 campaigns, and course content in Kajabi and/or GoHighLevel.

• Handle customer and faculty
 correspondence with professionalism and warmth.

• Maintain customer databases and monitor performance analytics.

• Support newsletter and promotional content production.



Phase 2 — Educational Events & Operations (after training)



• Support planning and logistics for our live and virtual educational events.

• Coordinate with speakers, attendees, and vendors.

• Oversee registration systems and assist with budget tracking.

• Help launch new courses, products, and programs.





MUST-HAVES



• Exceptional written and spoken English.

• Advanced Google Workspace skills (Docs, Sheets, Drive — non-negotiable).

• Hands-on experience with Kajabi or GoHighLevel (GHL). This is the single hardest filter — please do not apply without it.

• Ability to work independently, juggle priorities, and thrive remotely without micromanagement.





NICE-TO-HAVES (REAL BONUSES)



• Digital marketing strategy or campaign experience.

• Graphic design in Canva, Photoshop, or similar.

• AI image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar).

• Video and audio editing for podcasts and promo clips.

• Familiarity with other LMS platforms.





WHY PEOPLE STAY WITH US



• You're heard. We work in a low-ego, friendly remote culture where ideas get tested on merit.

• Real flexibility. Autonomous schedule, generous time off, and respect for your life outside work.

• Real growth. Clear path to full-time, leadership, and performance bonuses — not vague promises.

• Meaningful work. Our team is based in Philadelphia, and the content you'll help ship is used by emergency physicians, nurses, and trainees making real clinical decisions.





HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to 



1. A short statement of interest (under 250 words). Begin it with the exact phrase: "I read every word."

2. In 2–3 sentences inside that statement, answer this: if we handed you a Kajabi account on day one with no instructions, what would you Google first? Be specific.

3. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

4. Internet speed test results from speedtest.net (screenshot is fine).

5. A portfolio or samples of relevant work — especially design, AI imagery, video, or any platforms (Kajabi/GHL/Canva/etc.) you've built in.

6. References if you have them.



Final candidates will be invited to a short video interview on Google Meet.



We read every application personally. Looking forward to meeting you.

title: AMAZON PPC MANAGER
description:
We’re looking for an Amazon PPC Manager who thinks like a strategist, not just an operator.



This role is for someone who can own performance, not just manage campaigns. Someone who understands how keywords, bids, and listing optimization work together to drive profitable growth.



If you’re used to just “maintaining campaigns,” this is not for you.



What You’ll Own:

-Full ownership of Amazon PPC performance (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display)

-Keyword strategy development (launch, ranking, scaling, defense)

-Campaign structure optimization (not just tweaks—real restructuring when needed)

-Scaling winning products while controlling ACoS/TACoS

-Search term harvesting, negation strategy, and bid optimization

-Listing + PPC alignment (titles, backend keywords, indexing gaps)

-Competitor and market analysis to identify growth opportunities

-Weekly reporting with insights—not just numbers, but what to do next



What We’re Looking For (Non-Negotiables)

-3+ years hands-on Amazon PPC management (you’ve managed real budgets, not just assisted)

-Strong keyword research & ranking strategy experience

Deep understanding of:

-ACoS, TACoS, ROAS (and when each actually matters)

-Campaign structures (auto, manual, scaling frameworks)

-Search term isolation & scaling

-Experience using tools like Helium 10, DataDive, or similar

-Ability to explain your strategy clearly (to clients or team)



This Role Is NOT for You If:

-You only follow SOPs without understanding strategy

-You can’t explain why campaigns are performing the way they are

-You rely purely on automation tools without analysis

-You’ve never handled accounts end-to-end

-You can't follow instructions



Important Details

Schedule: 9 AM – 6 PM PST

Remote role (must have stable internet + headset)

Client-facing: You should be comfortable joining meetings and strategy calls



Include your CV and portfolio.

title: Customer Service & Phone Rep – Party Rental (Remote)
description:
Friendly Party Rental is a local, family-owned party rental company based in Syracuse, NY (serving all of Central New York). We rent tents, tables, chairs, bounce houses, concessions, and more. We are hiring a remote Customer Service & Phone Representative to be the voice of our business.



THIS ROLE IS FOR SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY. Please read carefully before applying.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

- Answer inbound calls from customers inquiring about rentals, availability, and pricing

- Make outbound follow-up calls to leads and customers

- Help customers place orders through our online booking and backend system (Event Rental Systems / ERS)

- Answer customer questions accurately using our pricing guides and FAQ resources

- Take detailed notes and communicate clearly with our team



REQUIREMENTS (non-negotiable):

- Excellent spoken and written English — clear, confident, and professional phone voice is a MUST

- Strong internet connection and quiet work environment for phone calls

- Experience in customer service or phone sales

- Ability to learn our backend booking system (ERS) quickly — training provided

- Reliable, consistent, and on-time — we need someone who shows up every shift

- Must be available Monday through Friday, 9am–5pm Eastern Time (US)

- Must be comfortable talking to customers on the phone for most of the shift — this is NOT a chat or
-only role



NICE TO HAVE:

- Prior experience with event rentals, hospitality, or service businesses

- Experience with online booking or reservation systems



HOW TO APPLY:

Before we consider your application, you MUST complete our short phone skills and knowledge screening test at: friendlypartyrentalemployee.site



Applications without a completed screening test will not be reviewed.



We are a small, close-knit team and we take customer service very seriously. If you are reliable, professional, and love helping people, this is a great long-term role with room to grow.

title: Short-Term Ops & Quality Management
description:
**Part-Time Night Shift Operations & Quality Control SpecialistP | Remote**



**About Us**

We are a a fast-growing short-term rental property management company operating vacation properties across the Orlando/Disney corridor. We run a tight, high-performing team and hold ourselves to a high standard — for our guests, our owners, and each other. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just clock in and out.



**Role Overview**

This is not a passive monitoring role. You will own a critical slice of our operations — from the quality of every clean to the outcome of every guest issue that comes in during your shift. You'll exercise real judgment, represent our brand, and take initiative without being told. If you're looking for something to do on the side while working another job, this is not the right fit. We need your full attention and commitment.



**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST



---



**What You'll Own**



*Quality Control & Cleaner Management*



- Review post-clean photo submissions via Turno and make expert judgment calls on approval or rejection before every guest check-in

- Review, enforce, and continuously improve our cleaner checklists — you will own these documents

- Monitor cleaner ratings and deliver regular, specific feedback based on photos, guest reviews, and claims

- Place supply and maintenance orders as needed to keep properties guest-ready

- Identify patterns and proactively flag recurring issues before they escalate



*Claims & Owner Communication*



- File and manage guest damage claims from submission to resolution

- Track claim outcomes and notify property owners of successful results

- Share video walkthroughs and property updates with owners

- Request Google reviews from guests at the right 
nt

- Support ad-hoc projects as the business grows



*Night Shift Guest Operations*



- Own all guest communication during your shift — questions, emergencies, and last-minute issues

- Coordinate guard gate access and resolve entry issues in real time

- Escalate and document i
 appropriately



---



**Who You Are**



- **Already working in short-term rentals** — you know the platforms, the pace, and the problems that come up

- Extremely detail-oriented — you notice what others miss and you care about getting it right

- Strong sense of ownership — you don't wait to be told and you don't let things slip

- Curious and self-motivated — you actively look for ways to improve your work and the systems around you

- A clear, professional communicator in writing

- You want to grow within a company, not just fill a seat



**This Role Is Not For You If:**



- You don't have hands-on STR experience

- You are working or plan to work another job simultaneously

- You need someone to check on you to stay focused

- You're looking for something low-effort during quiet hours



---



**Requirements**



- Prior short-term rental experience (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, or property management company) — **required**

- Dual-monitor setup + laptop *(photo required with application)*

- Fast, reliable internet *(speed test screenshot required)*

- Typing test completed at 
 *(screenshot required)*

- Willingness to work under screen monitoring software during shift hours



---



**Schedule & Compensation**



- Part-time | Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

- Fully remote

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- **Growth opportunity:** For the right person, there is real room to grow over time. Tea
mbers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and curiosity will have the opportunity to expand into other areas of the business they're interested in.



---



**To Apply**

Please submit the following:



1. Resume or summary of relevant STR experience

2. Photo of your dual-monitor + laptop setup

3. Internet speed test screenshot from 

4. A few sentences on why this role interests you and what "ownership" means to you at work

title: Sernior GTM ENGINEER
description:
We are an Australian IT company. We need one person to run our outbound sales engine daily.

THE JOB IN ONE LINE Deliver 30–50 qualified leads daily to our sales rep so they can start outreach.

WHAT YOU WILL DO



 



* Build Apollo lists (target: Australian businesses, 20–200 staff, ACT + QLD)

* Source, clean, and verify decision-maker contacts

* Deliver 30–50 qualified leads daily

* Manage cold
 campaigns in Instantly (8 mailboxes already set up)

* Write and improve cold
 copy based on performance

* Maintain strong mailbox health and deliverability

* Support LinkedIn outbound and light activity

* Attend a 15-minute daily standup (9am Sydney / 7am Manila)

* Report daily on leads delivered and campaign performance

WHAT COUNTS AS A QUALIFIED LEAD



 



* Australian company (ACT or QLD)

* 20–200 employees

* Decision-maker contact (owner, director, IT manager)

* Verified
 (no 
 
 or generic inboxes)

* No duplicates

* Ready for immediate outbound use

Consistency matters — quality leads, every day.

YOU WILL USE Apollo · Instantly · AmpleLeads · LinkedIn · Microsoft Teams · Google Sheets

YOU MUST HAVE



 



* Real experience running B2B cold outbound campaigns (end-to-end)

* Hands-on experience with Apollo and Instantly (or similar tools)

* Strong written English

* Ability to hit daily output targets without compromising quality

* Availability for daily AEST morning standup

GROWTH PATH If you deliver, you will have the opportunity to take ownership of outbound systems and grow into a broader GTM role over time.

We promote based on outcomes.

TO APPLY — 2 things only



1) A 1-minute video explaining why you're a fit — start it by saying "bananas." No bananas, no review. Talk about favorite buying signal and how you'd act on it

2) One screenshot: Any screnshot showing how you actually work





Applications missing the above will not be considered.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Overview:

Birdy is a GTM strategy firm. We don’t just send
s, we run high-level experiments to find out what actually works for our clients. We are looking for a sharp, tech-savvy SDR who can manage the entire outbound engine. This will start out as part time, and move to full time.



Your Responsibilities:



Messaging & Strategy: Write outbound sequences, test different CTAs/Hooks, and pivot messaging every 1-2 weeks based on data.



Software Management: Set up and manage outbound tools (Instantly, Apollo, LinkedIn automation, etc.).



Inbox Management: Reply to prospect messages, handle objections, and book meetings directly onto the client's calendar.



Reporting: Build weekly reports that show exactly what is working and what isn’t.



Data Quality: Work with our data specialists to ensure every lead is manually verified and high-intent.



Requirements:



Must have 2+ years of SDR experience, writing sequences, working with technology.



Flawless Written English: You must be able to write Peer-to-Peer copy that doesn't sound like a sales bot or AI slop.

 you’ve written that successfully booked a meeting. No AI slop. Additionally, prove that you are a good, proficient writer.

title: Video Editor
description:
We're looking for kind warriors.

No hype. No hand-holding. If you need to be motivated, Loveless Social isn't the place for you.

We want people who care deeply and compete harder. Against the industry. Against who they were last week.

Growth-minded. Quality-obsessed. Team-first.

If that's you, you belong here.



About Us

Loveless Social is a fashion/ lifestyle influencer. We create short- and long-form video content that performs. We work fast, we have high standards, and we hold each other accountable.



What You'll Do

Edit short-form Reels and TikToks from raw footage to final delivery. That means color grading, audio enhancement, captions, pacing, and storytelling. You'll follow our SOP, hit your deadlines, and communicate clearly when something's off.



What We Expect

Revisions turned around within 24 hours. Color graded using our LUT workflow. Captions styled in Satoshi. No submitting work you haven't fully watched yourself. Output expectations will be set based on video type and discussed during onboarding.



What You Need

A portfolio. Adobe Premiere Pro. A real eye for storytelling. And the ability to take direction without needing your hand held.



To Apply

Fill out this form





Applications submitted without a completed form will not be considered.

title: AI Video Editor - Marketing Manager  (Performance Pay + Free AI Training)
description:
BOUT US:

 

We're a European DTC brand scaling fast on Meta and TikTok across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. Our creative output is the engine of our growth, and we need a sharp video editor to plug in and ride the wave with us.

 

================================================================

 

THE OPPORTUNITY:

 

This isn't a typical editing gig. It's a long-term play with real upside.

 

We're hiring someone who'll start as our video editor (10-20 hrs/week) and step into a full-time Marketing Manager seat within 6-12 months. If you've got drive, curiosity, and a real interest in performance marketing — keep reading.

 

THE TRAJECTORY:

 

- Months 1-3: Video Editor (10-20 hrs/week) — execute briefs, sharpen your AI workflow

- Months 3-6: Senior Editor + Creative Strategist — pitch concepts, shape hooks, influence direction

- Months 6-12: Marketing Manager (full-time) — run campaigns, lead the creative pipeline, report on results

 

THE PAY:

 

- Base: $4 USD/hour

- Performance bonuses: When your ads deliver strong ROAS, you earn extra. The better your work, the bigger your check. Simple as that.

- Free AI training during the trial: Day one, you get full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram content (
) — arguably the sharpest AI video training out there. Whether or not we end up long-term, those skills are yours to keep.

 

If you want to be paid for output, not for clocking hours, this works. Strong editors earn well above the base.

 

================================================================

 

THE WORK:

 

- Short-form video ads (15-60s) for Meta and TikTok

- AI-driven ad creative using Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Multiple hook variations per video — we test relentlessly

- Localization: ads run in English, Dutch, and German. Translations come with the brief — you handle voice-over, subtitles, and clean delivery using AI tools.

- Quick turnarounds and rapid iteration based on live performance data

 

================================================================

 

WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT:

 

- Real growth path: editor today, Marketing Manager in under a year

- Performance bonuses tied directly to your output

- Free Franky Shaw training during the trial — yours regardless of outcome

- Briefs come fully prepped with translations

- Quick feedback loops and live data on what works

- Your edits run on real ad spend — you see exactly what they do

 

================================================================

 

YOU'RE A FIT IF:

 

- You already work with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.)

- You've cut short-form content for social

- You can find sharp B-roll, stock, and reference material

- Your English is solid

- You can turn a video around in 24-48 hours

- You're okay with $4/hour base + bonuses (this isn't the role if you need a high upfront rate)

- You want to grow, not just clock in

 

If you're reading this and you're NOT an AI type: Pina Colada (in google forms)

 

================================================================

 

HOW TO APPLY — TASK FIRST, RESUME NEVER:

 

We don't read resumes. We judge work. Complete the task below if you want a shot.

 

STEP 1 — Watch and download our winning founder video:

???? 

 

STEP 2 — The Task: 3 Dutch Hook Variations

 

Build 3 fresh Dutch (Netherlands) hook variations for the opening 3 seconds. Text overlays, B-roll cutaways, AI-generated clips, AI voice-over swaps — use whatever stops the scroll.

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING AT:

 

- Creativity — Did you bring something genuinely new, or just rewrite the text?

- Sourcing — Where did the visuals come from? Stock? AI? Custom? Quality is the bar.

- Localization — We run ads in English, Dutch, AND German. Show you can handle translations cleanly with AI tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.). Translations come with every brief — your job is execution.

 

STEP 3 — Submit here:



 

The form is the only way in. Five minutes to fill out once the task is done. You'll upload your 3 hooks and answer quick questions on experience, availability, and goals.

 

================================================================

 

WHAT'S NEXT:

 

If your task lands, you're in for a paid 2-week trial. From day one of the trial:

 

- Full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram training

- Real ad projects on your plate

- Direct feedback and mentorship

- A clear track toward the Marketing Manager seat

 

================================================================

 

DEADLINE: 3 days from today.

 

No task = no reply. If you skipped the task, you didn't read the post.

 

Let's go.

title: Graphic Designer + AI Video Generator + Video Editor
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and retail brand looking for a talented, creative, and fast-moving Graphic Designer, AI Video Generator, and Video Editor to join our team full-time.



We need someone highly skilled in graphic design, Amazon/eCommerce product visuals, video editing, and AI video generation tools. The ideal candidate must be creative, detail-oriented, responsive, and able to produce high-quality visual content quickly.



This is a real, long-term job opening for someone who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



About the Role

You will be responsible for creating high-converting visual content for Amazon listings, eCommerce platforms, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, Meta ads, and Amazon A+ Premium Content.



A major part of this role involves turning static product images into dynamic, engaging video content using motion graphics, AI video tools, camera movement effects, and professional video editing techniques.



You should be comfortable working with tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Canva, Illustrator, and AI video generation platforms such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, or similar tools.



Key Responsibilities

Design high-quality Amazon product images, including hero images, infographics, lifestyle images, and comparison charts.

Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

Ensure all Amazon visuals meet image requirements, including dimensions, white background, clarity, and quality standards.

Edit and retouch raw product photos to improve visual appeal.

Create packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

Research competitor listings and design trends to improve listing performance.

Create video ads and product videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, and Meta campaigns.

Transform static product images into dynamic videos using animation, parallax effects, simulated camera angles, 3D movement, motion graphics, and transitions.

Generate, edit, and refine AI video content using VEO 3.1, Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar AI video tools.

Turn product images, text prompts, and brand assets into engaging, high-converting video ads.

Create multiple hooks and ad variations for A/B testing.

Add captions, text overlays, trending audio, sound design, color grading, and seamless transitions.

Collaborate with the marketing, product, and creative teams to understand product features and selling points.

Iterate quickly based on feedback fro
dia buyers and performance data.

Maintain an organized workflow and deliver projects on time.

Stay updated with Amazon trends, eCommerce shopper behavior, social media trends, AI video tools, and best practices for digital advertising.

Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

Work efficiently. Fast, high-quality output is rewarded.

Requirements

Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Video Editor, or AI Video Creator, preferably for Amazon, eCommerce, or retail brands.

Strong portfolio showing Amazon product images, eCommerce graphics, video ads, and AI-generated video content.

Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Canva, and preferably After Effects.

Experience with AI video tools such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, Sora, Runway, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of prompt engineering for AI video generation.

Ability to turn still images into dynamic video content using motion, camera simulation, and animation techniques.

Good understanding of social media ad pacing, hooks, retention, and eCommerce conversion-focused creatives.

Basic knowledge of product photography and photo retouching is a plus.

Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

Ability to follow instructions accurately and adapt quickly to revisions.

Strong time management and organizational skills.

Good English communication skills.

Must be available for 30-40 hours per week.

Having your own repository of stock images/assets is a plus.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement

You must provide a portfolio or demo reel that includes:



Amazon or eCommerce product images.

Video ads or product videos.

Examples of videos created from static images using camera movement, parallax, animation, or motion graphics.

AI-generated video samples using tools such as VEO 3.1, Kling, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, or similar.

Applications without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.



Salary & Payment

Monthly Salary: PHP 75,000 - PHP 80,000



Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly payments



Performance-based bonuses are available for:



Number of images, videos, or design outputs created.

Speed and turnaround time.

Quality of work and performance.

Accuracy, creativity, and understanding of instructions.

Strong brand guideline execution.

High-performing ad creatives.

What We Offer

Full-time, long-term position.

Work-from-home flexibility.

Bi-weekly payment schedule.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling eCommerce and retail brand.

Creative freedom to test new design styles, video formats, and AI tools.

Performance-based rewards for fast and high-quality work.

How to Apply

Please send the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with graphic design, eCommerce visuals, video editing, and AI video generation.

Your portfolio or demo reel.

Specific examples of videos created from static product images.

Specific examples of AI-generated videos using VEO 3.1 or similar AI tools.

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word “Scale” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: Rental Operations Coordinator (Rental Car Company-Remote)

After 90 days of consistent performance and reliability, compensation will automatically increase by $1 per hour, contingent on meeting performance expectations and maintaining strong attendance and communication standards.

title: Web & UX Designer (Figma + WordPress)  / Contract
description:
Web & UX Designer (Figma + WordPress) –Contract

About Us



We are a performance-driven digital marketing agency focused on building high-converting websites for local businesses in home services and healthcare.



Our work is not just design. It is revenue-focused. Every website must be fast, structured, and built to generate leads.



The Role



We are looking for a Web & UX Designer who can own the entire website process from concept to launch.



This is not a “just design” role. You will be responsible for execution, coordination, and final output quality.



You must be comfortable:



Designing in Figma

Building in WordPress

Managing developers when needed

Ensuring the final product performs (UX, speed, SEO, conversion)

What You’ll Do

Design & Build

Create wireframes, mockups, and full prototypes in Figma

Build responsive WordPress websites based on your designs

Ensure mobile-first and conversion-focused layouts

Project Ownership

Manage full website lifecycle from start to launch

Coordinate with strategists, copywriters, and developers

Keep projects on timeline and within scope

Quality & Performance

Optimize websites for:

UX and clarity

Page speed

SEO structure

Conversion (calls, forms, CTAs)

Client Communication

Present designs and rationale clearly

Collect feedback and manage revisions

Push back when needed to protect quality

What We’re Looking For

Strong portfolio of modern, conversion-focused websites (Figma required)

3+ years building WordPress websites (not just themes, real builds)

Clear understanding of:

Layout hierarchy

User behavior

Conversion principles

Strong communication and project management skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership

Bonus Points

SEO knowledge (site structure, internal linking, schema basics)

CRO experience (landing pages, A/B thinking)

Basic HTML/CSS understanding

Experience working with page builders (Bricks, Elementor, etc.)

SOP & Execution Responsibility (Critical)



You will be responsible for creating and following a structured workflow.



Website Project SOP (Start to Finish)

1. Discovery & Planning

Review intake form and client goals

Define:

Target audience

Core services

Conversion goals

Create sitemap and page structure

2. Wireframing (Figma)

Create low-fidelity wireframes

Focus on structure, not visuals

Validate:

CTA placement

Content flow

User journey

3. High-Fidelity Design

Apply branding, colors, typography

Design full pages (desktop + mobile)

Ensure consistency across all pages

4. Development (WordPress)

Build pages based on approved designs

Use clean structure:

Reusable sections

Proper spacing system

Implement:

Forms

Tracking (basic readiness for GTM)

Speed optimization basics

5. Developer Management (if involved)

Provide clear Figma specs and instructions

Review builds against design (pixel-level check)

Validate:

Responsiveness

Speed

Functionality

Send structured feedback (not vague comments)

6. QA Checklist Before Launch

Mobile responsiveness (all breakpoints)

Page speed (Core Web Vitals baseline)

SEO basics:

Meta titles/descriptions

H1–H3 structure

Internal linking

Forms working and tested

Call tracking / analytics readiness

No broken links

7. Launch

Final review with team

Push live

Monitor first 48 hours for issues

8. Post-Launch Optimization

Identify UX issues (drop-offs, friction points)

Suggest improvements:

CTA placement

Content clarity

Layout adjustments

Iterate based on performance

Why Join Us

Small, focused team with high standards

Real ownership over projects

Opportunity to grow into a lead role

Flexible and remote-first

Work on projects that directly impact client revenue

How to Apply



Send:



Portfolio (must include Figma + live websites)

Resume

Short note explaining:

How you approach a website project from start to finish

Example of a project you owned completely

title: AI Video Editor. Grow to Marketing Manager. AI experience needed. Free AI training provided.
description:
We're a European DTC brand scaling fast on Meta and TikTok across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. Our creative output is the engine of our growth, and we need a sharp video editor to plug in and ride the wave with us.



================================================================



THE OPPORTUNITY:



This isn't a typical editing gig. It's a long-term play with real upside.



We're hiring someone who'll start as our video editor (10-20 hrs/week) and step into a full-time Marketing Manager seat within 6-12 months. If you've got drive, curiosity, and a real interest in performance marketing — keep reading.



THE TRAJECTORY:



- Months 1-3: Video Editor (10-20 hrs/week) — execute briefs, sharpen your AI workflow

- Months 3-6: Senior Editor + Creative Strategist — pitch concepts, shape hooks, influence direction

- Months 6-12: Marketing Manager (full-time) — run campaigns, lead the creative pipeline, report on results



THE PAY:



- Base: $4 USD/hour

- Performance bonuses: When your ads deliver strong ROAS, you earn extra. The better your work, the bigger your check. Simple as that.

- Free AI training during the trial: Day one, you get full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram content (
/frankyshaw/) — arguably the sharpest AI video training out there. Whether or not we end up long-term, those skills are yours to keep.



If you want to be paid for output, not for clocking hours, this works. Strong editors earn well above the base.



================================================================



THE WORK:



- Short-form video ads (15-60s) for Meta and TikTok

- AI-driven ad creative using Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Multiple hook variations per video — we test relentlessly

- Localization: ads run in English, Dutch, and German. Translations come with the brief — you handle voice-over, subtitles, and clean delivery using AI tools.

- Quick turnarounds and rapid iteration based on live performance data



================================================================



WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT:



- Real growth path: editor today, Marketing Manager in under a year

- Performance bonuses tied directly to your output

- Free Franky Shaw training during the trial — yours regardless of outcome

- Briefs come fully prepped with translations

- Quick feedback loops and live data on what works

- Your edits run on real ad spend — you see exactly what they do



================================================================



YOU'RE A FIT IF:



- You already work with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.)

- You've cut short-form content for social

- You can find sharp B-roll, stock, and reference material

- Your English is solid

- You can turn a video around in 24-48 hours

- You're okay with $4/hour base + bonuses (this isn't the role if you need a high upfront rate)

- You want to grow, not just clock in



If you're reading this and you're NOT an AI type: Pina Colada (in google forms)



================================================================



HOW TO APPLY — TASK FIRST, RESUME NEVER:



We don't read resumes. We judge work. Complete the task below if you want a shot.



STEP 1 — Watch and download our winning founder video:

???? f.io/h6H4GIUE



STEP 2 — The Task: 3 Dutch Hook Variations



Build 3 fresh Dutch (Netherlands) hook variations for the opening 3 seconds. Text overlays, B-roll cutaways, AI-generated clips, AI voice-over swaps — use whatever stops the scroll.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING AT:



- Creativity — Did you bring something genuinely new, or just rewrite the text?

- Sourcing — Where did the visuals come from? Stock? AI? Custom? Quality is the bar.

- Localization — We run ads in English, Dutch, AND German. Show you can handle translations cleanly with AI tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.). Translations come with every brief — your job is execution.



STEP 3 — Submit here:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdyPLEt8zPfE46ebAm3R4IV_c7W1QS_Z7aw_qu6t5Wr-PBxIA/viewform



The form is the only way in. Five minutes to fill out once the task is done. You'll upload your 3 hooks and answer quick questions on experience, availability, and goals.



================================================================



WHAT'S NEXT:



If your task lands, you're in for a paid 2-week trial. From day one of the trial:



- Full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram training

- Real ad projects on your plate

- Direct feedback and mentorship

- A clear track toward the Marketing Manager seat



================================================================



DEADLINE: 3 days from today.



No task = no reply. If you skipped the task, you didn't read the post.



Let's go.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Real estate listing coordinator and database manager
description:
Real Estate Listing Coordinator & Database Manager



Location: Western PA (remote US eastern time zone 10 AM-5 PM)

Reports To: Director of Operations / Team Leader



Position Overview



We are a fast-growing, high-producing real estate team seeking a detail-oriented, organized, and proactive Listing Coordinator & Database Manager to help drive efficiency and client experience.



This role is the backbone of our listing operations and database flow—ensuring listings go live smoothly, leads are responded to quickly, and agents stay focused on closing deals.



If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love organization, and take pride in executing at a high level, this is a critical role with strong growth potential.



Key Responsibilities

Listing Coordination

Manage all listing files from pre-listing through going live on MLS

Input accurate property data into MLS

Coordinate with photographers, videographers, and vendors via in-house Transaction coordinator or director of operations

Prepare and review listing documents for compliance

Ensure all listings are launched on time and error-free

Create and manage listing timelines/checklists

Showing & Listing Setup

Set up and manage showings through ShowingTime

Coordinate showing instructions and access details

Communicate with agents and sellers regarding showing activity

Database & CRM Management

Maintain and organize database within Follow Up Boss (our team CRM)

Input, update, and tag leads accurately

Ensure proper lead routing and follow-up systems are maintained

Monitor database health and cleanliness

Lead Management & Communication

Respond to inbound leads via text in a timely, professional manner

Qualify and route leads to appropriate agents

Assist with initial engagement and handoff to agents

Ensure no lead goes untouched

Administrative & Support

Assist agents with listing-related needs

Track listing performance and status updates

Help maintain systems and processes for scalability

Support team initiatives and marketing coordination when needed

Qualifications

Real estate experience preferred (transaction coordination, listing management, or admin role)

Experience with matrix MLS systems

Familiarity with ShowingTime and CRM platforms (especially Follow Up Boss), & SISU software

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Excellent written communication (especially texting/email)

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a high-volume environment

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems



What Success Looks Like

Listings go live smoothly, accurately, and on time

Leads are responded to quickly and routed effectively

Database is clean, organized, and actionable

Agents are supported and able to focus on revenue-generating activities

Systems run efficiently with minimal oversight

Compensation & Growth

Competitive pay (salary  + performance incentives)

Opportunity for advancement as the team continues to scale

Work alongside a top-producing real estate team in Western Pennsylvania





Why Join Us

We are building something big—and this role is a key part of that growth. You won’t just be “filling a position”—you’ll be helping drive the systems behind a high-performance real estate operation.

title: Test Analyst - Remote
description:
We are seeking a detail-focused Test Analyst to support the quality and reliability of our core business systems. In this role, you will help ensure that enterprise applications function as expected by applying structured testing approaches across multiple stages of the development lifecycle.



The ideal candidate brings a solid IT foundation, strong knowledge of both the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and software testing lifecycle (STLC), and the ability to analyze systems thoroughly to identify potential issues before release.



Key Responsibilities:

- Test Planning and Preparation

- Collaborate with business analysts and developers to define testing strategies

- Develop detailed test plans and test cases for new implementations and system enhancements

- Test Execution and Defect Management

- Perform testing across multiple phases including system, integration, regression, and UAT

- Record and track defects, ensuring issues are resolved before release

- Provide regular updates on testing progress and results

- Enterprise System Validation

- Perform thorough testing of ERP systems and related business workflows

- Integration and Data Testing

- Verify data exchanges and message accuracy when testing EDI transactions and API endpoints

- Database Validation

- Use SQL queries to validate backend data and confirm database accuracy

- Continuous Improvement

- Recommend improvements to testing practices, coverage, and overall efficiency



Required Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software testing

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification or higher

- Strong knowledge of system, integration, and regression testing approaches

- Experience testing ERP platforms and EDI integrations/message formats

- Practical experience performing API testing

- Ability to write and execute SQL queries for backend validation

- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience:

- Experience conducting performance testing, including load, stress, or volume testing

- Experience creating and maintaining test automation scripts using Java



Work Schedule :

6:30 AM - 3:00 PM Philippines Time

title: Part-Time Tech & Funnel Ops VA — Online Coaching Business
description:
Hours: 20 hours/week to start (4 hrs/day, Mon–Fri) — potential to grow to full time after 1 month 

Rate: $4–6 USD/hour with significant growth opportunities

Looking for: Long-term partnership

Start date: Immediately

Reports to: Meghan (business owner) directly



About the Business

I run a coaching and mentorship business helping women transform their relationship with food, their bodies, and themselves. I need a reliable tech/funnel operator who can help me build and run the back-end of the business — and who’s hungry to learn and grow alongside me.

This is a long-term role, not a one-off project. I’m looking for someone I can build a real working relationship with.



ROLE:

This role is the technical and operational backbone of the business. You’ll be the person who makes things work behind the scenes so I can focus on serving clients and creating content.





Primary responsibilities (in priority order):

 1. GoHighLevel (GHL) builds and management

 • Build and maintain landing pages, sales pages, and funnels

 • Set up courses, payments, and product delivery

 • Build and troubleshoot
 automations and workflows

 • Integrate GHL with WordPress, payment processors, and other tools

 2. WordPress maintenance

 • Page builds, updates, and troubleshooting

 • Plugin and integration management

 3.
 sequences & automations

 • Build out
 campaigns and nurture sequences

 • Manage list segmentation and tagging

 • Test and QA all automations before going live

 4. Content distribution & scheduling

 • Schedule social posts (training provided on whichever tool we use)

 • Distribute weekly podcast episodes across all platforms

 • Coordinate content waterfall workflow

 5. Design & content support (as time allows)

 • Build workbooks and PDF lead magnets in Canva (all design work lives in Canva — no other design software required)

 • Generate branded images using AI tools

 • Light video and audio editing using Descript (this is our primary editing tool)

Not required but a bonus:

 • Meta Ads pixel and Conversions API setup experience

 • Familiarity with VSL (video sales letter) funnels

 • Experience with low-ticket offer funnels





Required Skills

You must have hands-on experience with:

 • GoHighLevel (this is non-negotiable — please don’t apply if you haven’t built funnels in GHL)

 •
 marketing platforms (any combination of GHL
, ConvertKit, ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp)

 • Canva for all design work (workbooks, lead magnets, social graphics, branded images)

 • Strong written English for clear communication

You must be willing to learn:

 • Descript for video and audio editing — this is our primary editing tool. If you already know Descript, great. If not, you must be willing to take trainings and get up to speed quickly.

 • AI tools, especially Claude — I use AI heavily in this business and you will too. Existing experience is a plus; willingness to learn is essential.

 • New scheduling tools, project management platforms, and integrations as needed

Most important: You learn quickly, take initiative on your own training, and treat new tools as exciting rather than intimidating.

Bonus skills (please mention if you have them):

 • WordPress — helpful but not required. If you don’t have it, willingness to learn is essential.

 • AI image generation (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Leonardo, etc.) — would be great but not necessary

 • Descript experience already in place

 • Video editing in other platforms

 • Podcast distribution across platforms

 • Notion / project management tools

 • Zapier / 
 for integrations

 • Meta Ads pixel and Conversions API setup

 • VSL (video sales letter) funnel experience

 • Low-ticket offer funnel experience





Who You Are

 • Reliable communicator. You check in daily, flag blockers early, and don’t disappear on me. If something happens (illness, internet, family emergency), you communicate within 24 hours — even just a quick message. This is the most important quality I’m looking for.

 • Fast learner. New tools, new platforms, new workflows don’t intimidate you — they excite you. You’ll watch tutorials on your own time, ask smart questions, and get up to speed fast. This is non-negotiable for this role.

 • Self-starter. You take a task and run with it. You ask smart clarifying questions up front, then execute without needing constant check-ins.

 • Detail-oriented. You test what you build before you tell me it’s done. Broken automations and dead links cost me money.

 • Calm under pressure. When something breaks, you troubleshoot first, then bring me solutions, not problems.

 • Growth mindset. You’re willing to learn new tools, take on new types of work, and grow with the business.

 • Backup infrastructure. You have a stable internet connection AND a backup option (mobile data hotspot, co-working space access, or similar). If your home power/internet goes out, you have a plan to keep working or to communicate immediately. Please tell me your specific backup plan in your application.





How We’ll Work Together

 • Communication: Daily check-ins via Slack. Daily or weekly 30-minute video call.

 • Project management: Tasks in Notion

 • Hours: between 9 am and 6 pm CT M-F

 • Pay: Bi-weekly via 

 • Trial period: First 30 days is a paid trial. If we both feel it’s a fit, we continue and discuss expanding hours and rate.



How to Apply

Please send me a message that includes:

 1. Your name, location, and current availability (hours/week available, any other clients)

 2. Your experience with GoHighLevel — specifically: how long have you used it, and what’s the most complex funnel you’ve built? Include a screenshot or link if possible.

 3. Tell me about a tool or skill you taught yourself in the last 6 months. What did you learn, why, and how did you go about it? (This is the most important question — answer it thoughtfully.)

 4. Have you used Descript? Have you used Claude or other AI tools? If yes, tell me how. If no, tell me how you’d approach learning them.

 5. Your backup infrastructure plan — what’s your setup if your power or internet goes out for a day or more?

 6. A short voice or video introduction (2 minutes max) —Absolutely NO reading from AI written scripts. I can tell. I want to hear how you authentically communicate. 



I’ll respond to applications within 3 business days. Please don’t follow up sooner than that.

Looking forward to hearing from you.



Warmly,

Meghan

title: TikTok & Instagram Video Editor (Lingerie Brand)
description:
Part time / video editing (footage provided)  / 4 hours a week (can grow als business grows)



I’m looking for a creative female video editor to edit short-form content for TikTok & Instagram.



I run a European lingerie brand focused on colorful, elegant, cute, and feminine sets. I’ll provide all raw footage — your job is to turn it into engaging, viral-style videos. So only editing. The footage is also only of the lingerie sets in a cute pretty and elegant way.. so not on models. 



What I need:

Editing Instagram Reels & TikToks (5–12 sec videos)

Strong sense of trends, music, and hooks

Good eye for feminine aesthetics





What I offer:

-$3,- per hour and the idea is 2 videos in 1 hour since it's only editing and I provide footage so approx 30 minutes per video is okay.

-A bonus system for videos that go viral (50K views is $5 bonus, 100K is $15 bonus, 250K views is $30 bonus).

-Rates will increase as the brand grows (we are launching next week).



Test:

You’ll create 2 test videos using my content before we start.





So it's like 1 hour for 2 videos and I need 8 videos a week.. so 4 hours a week, only editing. I provide footage but you have to creative with editing and creating hooks + music and caption. Strong sense of trends, music, and hooks

Good eye for feminine aesthetics

So it's like 1 hour for 2 videos and I need 8 videos a week.. so 4 hours a week, only editing. I provide footage but you have to creative with editing and creating hooks + music and caption. In the beginning I will guide you the first month so you will get a feel of the brand tone of voice :).



!!! Only apply if you are a woman, due to the content of lingerie edits I just feel it works better as it's very cute and girly.

title: Remote Outbound Sales Representative
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

- Build and maintain a full sales pipeline

- Conduct outbound sales calls and emails to potential clients, qualifying and advancing leads

- Acquire new clients to meet and exceed monthly revenue targets



What We’re Looking For

- This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST) from Monday to Friday

- Proven success in outbound sales

- Strong communication and objection-handling skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in a CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus



What You’ll Need (System Requirements):

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Why Join Haulla?

- Base salary plus uncapped commission and performance-based bonuses

- Top performers earn Php 80,000–100,000/month

- 4-week paid training ($400 awarded for training + commission)



How to Apply

Apply directly via: www.haulla.com/career?utm_source=onlinejobs28



If you meet our qualifications, we will contact you for a virtual interview.

title: Digital Ads Coordinator
description:
To Apply

To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:





The Opportunity

This could be one of the best jobs you’ll ever have.

We’re looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator to join our remote team full-time.



About LickYourPhone

LickYourPhone Media is a leading restaurant marketing agency in Australia. We partner with restaurants, bars, hotels, and venues to amplify their brand presence through creative, data-driven digital advertising. You'll work alongside an amazing team that is passionate about hospitality, marketing, and great food.



The Role

We're looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator who blends creative instinct with analytical precision. You'll manage a diverse portfolio of hospitality clients, running paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
 & Instagram), TikTok, and Google. From strategy development to performance reporting, you'll own the full campaign lifecycle and serve as each client's go-to advertising partner.



What You'll Do

Campaign Strategy & Execution

• Develop and launch paid advertising campaigns aligned with each client's goals and budget.

• Set up, manage, and 
 campaigns across
, Instagram, TikTok, and Google Ads.

• Create compelling ad creatives, copy, and visuals that resonate with target audiences.

• Monitor campaigns in real time, adjusting targeting, bidding, and creative elements as needed.



Audience Targeting & Optimisation

• Utilise audience targeting tools and retargeting strategies to maximise reach and engagement.

• Continuously refine segmentation based on performance data and emerging trends.

• Implement optimisation tactics including bid adjustments, ad scheduling, and audience exclusions.



Analytics & Reporting

• Monitor KPIs such as CTR, CPA, CPC, CPM, ROAS, and conversion rates.

• Prepare comprehensive performance reports with actionable insights and strategic recommendations.

• Deliver at least 8 monthly strategic recommendations per client.



Client Relationship Management

• Serve as the primary point of contact for your portfolio of clients.

• Provide regular campaign updates and proactively communicate optimisation opportunities.

• Build strong, long-term partnerships through transparency and exceptional service.



Compliance & Best Practices

• Ensure all campaigns comply with platform advertising policies and brand guidelines.

• Stay current with industry trends, platform updates, and emerging best practices.

• Address ad disapprovals and policy issues promptly and proactively.



What We're Looking For

Required

• Proven experience managing paid advertising campaigns on Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and/or TikTok Ads.

• Proficiency in Canva and other creative tools for ad design.

• Strong copywriting skills with the ability to craft engaging, platform-specific ad copy.

• Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret campaign data and translate it into actionable strategy.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for confident client interactions.

• Proficiency in English

• Detail-oriented, organised, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with a team.

•Excellent and reliable internet connection.



Preferred

• Prior agency experience, particularly within the hospitality or food & beverage industry.

• Familiarity with A/B testing methodologies and conversion funnel optimisation.

• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field.



The Personality We're After

•Creative and innovative: you bring fresh ideas to every campaign.

•Resilient and composed under pressure: you thrive in a fast-paced agency environment.

•Proactive and self-driven: you take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do.

•A true team player: you collaborate openly and communicate with honesty and respect.

•Confident yet approachable: you handle client interactions with professionalism and warmth.



To Apply



To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:

title: Senior SEO Manager
description:
We are a private equity-backed company operating 27 businesses across construction, medical, real estate, and consulting.

We have built a strong internal team in the Philippines, including 25+ highly skilled tea
mbers across SEO, development, and content. We are now looking to add a Senior SEO Portfolio Manager who can take ownership of a group of websites and help drive the next level of growth.

This is not a basic SEO role.

You will be responsible for driving traffic, rankings, and conversions across multiple websites—thinking strategically and executing at a high level.

What This Role Is

A strategic operator role (thinking + execution)

High ownership over a portfolio of websites

Supported by an experienced in-house SEO, content, and development team

Focused on real outcomes, not theory

A path to becoming a vertical lead within the organization



What This Role Is Not

Not a junior or intermediate position

Not a “strategy-only” role

Not checklist-based SEO



Ownership Model

You will be assigned a group of websites or a vertical (e.g., construction, medical, real estate).

You are responsible for:

Developing strategy within your assigned portfolio

Executing and improving performance

Driving measurable growth in traffic and conversions

You are expected to think, act, and execute like an owner.

???? Key Responsibilities

Take ownership of 5–10 websites (100–500+ pages each)

Identify why sites are underperforming and fix them

Build and execute SEO strategies within your portfolio

Optimize:

Meta titles and descriptions (CTR-focused)

Page structure and internal linking

Use Google Search Console data to:

Increase click-through rates

Improve rankings on existing pages

Identify and resolve:

Content gaps

Cannibalization

Indexing and technical issues

Work with writers and developers to improve or replace low-quality content

Use AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude to scale content intelligently

Continuously test new ideas and strategies to win in competitive markets

Collaborate with internal team (strategy, SEO specialists, developers)



Strategic Expectations

You are expected to:

Identify opportunities the team has missed

Propose and test new ideas based on real data

Improve performance continuously—not just execute instructions

You will not wait for direction on everything—you will drive results.



Success in This Role Looks Like

Significant increase in traffic across your assigned portfolio

Higher CTR from search results

Improved rankings on priority pages

Clear, measurable SEO wins within 60–90 days



Requirements

4–8+ years of SEO experience (agency experience preferred)

Proven track record of growing traffic on large websites

Strong understanding of:

Technical SEO (indexing, structure, performance)

Content strategy (planning and scaling)

CRO (titles, descriptions, user behavior)

Excellent English communication skills

Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

Ability to think independently and challenge ideas when needed

Stable work history (we value long-term tea
mbers)

Not a Fit If You

Only follow instructions without thinking

Rely heavily on tools without understanding strategy

Have not personally improved website performance

Prefer managing instead of executing



Compensation & Details

$1,500/month

Full-time (40 hours/week)

100% remote

Long-term role with growth opportunities



Growth Opportunity

This role can evolve into:

Vertical Lead (owning a full business category within the portfolio)





Application Requirement (Mandatory)

To be considered, submit a short case study (max 2 pages):

A website you worked on

What was wrong

What you changed

The results you achieved

title: Airtable Specialist & Workflow Automater
description:
Project Overview:

Hi there! I am looking for a talented Airtable Specialist to help me cross the finish line on a custom ERP for my luxury cabinetry business. The database structure is 90% built, the SKUs are imported, and the core logic is in place. I just need a "finisher" who is an expert in Interface Designer to make the user experience smooth and professional for my team.



What’s already done:

• Full relational database schema with 19 tables.

• 2,000+ SKU library with pricing.

• Basic Designer and Dealer portals.

• What I need your help with:

• UX Polishing: Fine-tuning a multi-step "Wizard" for creating quotes (Construction ?? Species ?? Finish).

• Conditional Filtering: Ensuring dropdown menus only show relevant options (e.g., Maple stains only showing up when Maple wood is selected).

• Shopping Cart Experience: Setting up a gallery where designers can click "Add to Quote" and see a running total update in real-time.

• Automations: Setting up lead-time calculations and a simple capacity warning system for our shop floor.



Technical Skills Needed:

• Airtable Interface Designer: This is the main focus. I need someone who knows how to build clean, intuitive portals.

• Logic & Formulas: Comfort with linked records, lookups, and basic IF/WORKDAY formulas.

• Automations: Ability to trigger notifications or record updates based on status changes.



Why join this project?

The hard work of building the architecture is done! I need a partner who can take my vision and make it "click" for the end-users. I’m easy to work with, the base is organized, and I’m looking for someone who takes pride in building great user experiences.



How to Apply:

• Please send a link to a Loom video (2-3 minutes) showing an Airtable Interface you have built. I’d love to see how you organize information for users!

• Include the word "CABINET" at the top of your message so I know you’ve read the details.

Assistant Property Manager 

Job Type: Full-Time

Job Overview: 

We are seeking an experienced Assistant Property Manager to support day-to-day property management operations, serving as a key liaison between property managers, tenants, owners, and internal teams. title: Leasing Specialist
description:
Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, an 9-hour shift including a 1-hour break (8-hour working shift, time zone to be finalized)



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a confident and driven Leasing Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.



Key Responsibilities:

Serve as the primary point of contact for all inbound leasing inquiries (phone,
, and online leads)

Make outbound calls to new and existing leads to increase tour scheduling and application conversions

Respond promptly to new leads and follow up consistently to drive engagement

Qualify prospective residents based on rental criteria and property fit

Clearly explain the self-showing process and assist prospects with scheduling tours

Maintain accurate lead tracking and notes within company systems

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



Performance Expectations:

Success in this role is measured by conversion metrics, specifically:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Goal-oriented with a strong focus on conversion and results

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline



Nice to Have

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role

title: Senior QA/QC Architect
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Senior QA/QC Architect 



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a Senior QA/QC Architect based in the Philippines to provide quality assurance and quality control oversight for architectural drawings produced by our drafting team. This role will focus on reviewing drawings, identifying coordination issues, and ensuring that all documentation meets technical and constructability standards before project delivery.

The ideal candidate is a licensed architect with strong experience working in reputable architectural firms on complex projects, with deep expertise in technical detailing, multidisciplinary coordination, and drawing review.



* Key Responsibilities:

Perform QA/QC reviews of architectural drawings produced by the drafting and production teams.

Identify nonconformance issues, coordination conflicts, and detailing errors within project drawings.

Review coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP consultant drawings.

Ensure drawings meet constructability requirements and professional architectural standards.

Provide clear feedback and correction notes to the drafting team to improve drawing accuracy and consistency.

Help maintain quality standards across projects and reduce repetitive corrections.

Ensure lessons learned from previous projects are applied to future projects to improve overall drawing quality.

Review and validate technical details and construction documentation before final submission.

Support internal teams by ensuring drawings follow company standards and project documentation requirements.



* Training & Standards

The selected candidate will be trained on the company’s storage system detailing standards and internal documentation processes to ensure alignment with project requirements.



* Qualifications:

Licensed Architect (Philippines) required

Minimum 6+ years of architectural experience in a reputable architectural firm

Experience working on complex architectural projects

Strong expertise in architectural detailing and construction documentation

Strong understanding of coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP disciplines

Ability to identify constructability and coordination issues within drawings



* Technical Skills:

Strong experience reviewing drawings in Revit

Working knowledge of AutoCAD

Ability to review and coordinate multi-disciplinary drawing sets



* Additional Requirements

Candidates must be able to provide examples of previous projects they have worked on

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability

Excellent ability to review and critique drawing packages for technical accuracy



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.
