Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Leasing Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Lead to Lease Specialist



Job Type: Full Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, an 9-hour shift including a 1-hour break (8-hour working shift, time zone to be finalized)

Salary: $1,000 per month 



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a confident and driven Lead to Lease Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.

, and online leads)

Maintain accurate lead tracking and notes within company systems

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



* Performance Expectations:

Success in this role is measured by conversion metrics, specifically:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



* Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Goal-oriented with a strong focus on conversion and results

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline



* Nice to Have

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: WE ARE HIRING: ELITE APPOINTMENT SETTER / LEAD GENERATOR
description:
Base Pay + Commission + Bonuses | Weekly Base $300–$500 + Uncapped Earnings



Do you know how to get homeowners on the phone, build urgency, handle objections, and lock in appointments that actually show?



We are looking for a high-performing, results-driven Appointment Setter / Lead Generator to join our rapidly growing Home Improvement team.



This is not an entry-level role for someone who needs constant supervision. This position is for someone competitive, consistent, coachable, and hungry to make money.



If you can produce, we pay.



COMPENSATION



Weekly Base Pay: $300–$500

Aggressive Commission Structure

Performance Bonuses

Uncapped Earning Potential for Top Producers



Top setters who hit KPIs and produce quality appointments will have room to grow quickly.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING DAILY



Your primary job is to generate qualified appointments that show up and turn into sales opportunities.



This role requires heavy outbound calling, relentless follow-up, and strong daily execution.



You will be expected to:



Make high-volume outbound calls daily using Hot Prospector and WAVV/GHL Dialer

Work inbound hot leads immediately

Set 4 qualified appointments per day minimum (2 next-day and 2 future appointments)

Recycle no-shows, dead leads, cancellations, and aged data

Follow proven scripts while sounding natural, confident, and persuasive

Overcome objections and create urgency

Keep CRM updated with accurate notes and dispositions

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We want someone who already understands what a production environment looks like.



You must have:



Hot Prospector experience

Home Improvement appointment setting / outbound call center experience

Strong English communication

Excellent objection handling and closing ability

Reliable internet and ability to work PST hours

Thick skin, urgency, and self-discipline



This role is numbers-driven. If you are not comfortable being held accountable to daily KPIs, this is not for you.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



This is a true KPI environment.



Minimum expectations:



500+ dials per day

4 qualified appointments daily

High contact rate

Strong show rate

Consistent CRM reporting

Fast lead response time



KPIs begin on Day 4

Full production expected by Day 14



This is a performance-based position. We move fast, and we keep top performers.



OUR TEAM STANDARDS



We hire people who operate with:



Radical Transparency – communicate clearly and professionally

Speed is King – fast response, fast follow up, fast execution

Better Every Day – coachable and improving daily

Hunger – competitive, driven, and money motivated



No excuses. Results matter.



TO APPLY



Submit the following:



Resume

A 45–60 second Loom video introducing yourself and showcasing your communication skills

Brief explanation of your Home Improvement / Appointment Setting experience



Applicants who do not submit the Loom video will not be considered.



If you are money motivated, competitive, and know how to produce, apply now.

title: Left Brain to Creative Founder: Strategic Support Partner
description:
I'm seeking an exceptional organization-minded partner to complement my creative vision as founder of a growing capital-as-a-service company. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on creating order from chaos, implementing systems that scale, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks while I focus on big-picture strategy.



You'll operate with significant autonomy (levels 3-6 on the delegation framework), making recommendations and decisions independently while keeping our ambitious goals moving forward.



## Core Responsibilities:



* **Strategic Planning & Implementation**: Proactively identify organizational bottlenecks, develop solutions, and implement improvements without direct oversight



* **Internal Relationship Management**: Clarify project scope, stakeholders, and next actions, ensuring key projects are completed on time and goals are moving forward



* **Process Development**: Design and implement scalable workflows and systems that increase organizational efficiency leveraging AI



* **High Level Executive Support**: Learn my voice and communication style, and reduce my administrative workload by 80%



* **Meeting Optimization**: Independently prepare for, facilitate, and extract key action items fro
etings, identifying both first and second-order implications



## What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



* You're naturally organized and find satisfaction in creating systems that work

* You can translate visionary ideas into practical action steps

* You're comfortable with ambiguity and can make progress with incomplete information

* You have excellent judgment about when to act independently and when to consult

* You're tech-savvy with strong Notion skills and genuine curiosity about AI applications

* You communicate with clarity and polish in excellent English, both written and verbal



## Why This Role Matters:



You'll be the essential counterbalance to my creative energy, ensuring our ideas transform into reality. This position offers direct involvement in shaping a growing company, exposure to capital markets, and the opportunity to build systems that will scale with us.



This will start part time and evolve into full time for the right person.



## Application Process:



To ensure alignment, please include the following with your application:



1. A 90-second personalized video telling us about yourself and why you're the perfect organizational complement to a visionary founder.



2. In your cover letter, please include a paragraph on "What is your ikigai?" (Your reason for being - the intersection of what you love, what you're good at, what the world needs, and what you can be paid for).



This role is ideal for someone who finds joy and purpose in creating order, enabling others' success, and building systems that last. If that sounds like you, I'm excited to connect.

title: Paralegal
description:
Litigation & Bankruptcy Paralegal (US-Based Firm)



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday – Friday | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (11:00 PM – 8:00 AM PHT)

Compensation: Competitive; Based on Experience



About the Firm

We are a tech-forward California law firm specializing in complex civil litigation, real estate disputes, and bankruptcy matters. We operate with a highly integrated, engaged team in the Philippines and believe in leveraging technology (Zoho, ProLaw, Westlaw) to deliver elite results. We aren’t looking for a passive assistant; we are looking for a sharp, proactive legal professional to take true ownership of their caseload.



The Role

As a Litigation Paralegal with a heavy emphasis on Bankruptcy, you will go beyond "filling out templates." You will be responsible for drafting substantive legal content, managing federal and state court filings, and ensuring our attorneys are prepared for every deadline.



Key Responsibilities:

•	Substantive Drafting: Draft complaints, answers, demurrers, discovery motions, meet-and-confer letters, and oppositions from scratch.

•	Bankruptcy Support: Prepare and file pleadings for Chapter 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy cases via CM/ECF.

•	Case Management: Oversee the litigation lifecycle, including calendaring deadlines, coordinating process service, and gathering documents for subpoena responses.

•	High-Stakes Communication: Act as a primary point of contact for clients and opposing counsel, with a commitment to a 30-minute response time during shift hours.

•	Legal Research: Utilize Westlaw to conduct targeted research and summarize procedural histories.

•	Judgment Enforcement: Assist with post-judgment work, including writs of execution, bank levies, and abstracts of judgment.



What We Are Looking For

•	Education: A Law degree (JD/LLB) is required. Passing the Philippine Bar is a significant plus.

•	Experience: Proven experience in US Litigation (State and Federal). Specific experience in US Bankruptcy law is strongly preferred.

•	Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Word, Excel, and Outlook. Experience with Zoho, ProLaw, and CM/ECF is a major advantage.

•	The "Night Owl" Edge: You must have prior experience working US hours and a reliable, high-speed internet connection.

•	Ownership Mindset: You are observant, punctual, and proactive—anticipating issues before they become bottlenecks.



IT Requirements:

•	Own a laptop with at least Windows 10, Processor I5 Core-1235U 1.30 GHz, 16GB RAM (REQUIRED SPECIFICATIONS)

•	Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements. 

•	Additional
 with more instructions will be sent as part of the application process.

________________________________________



How to Apply



To be considered for this opportunity, please complete our application form in full using the link below:







Please follow the application instructions above carefully. Messages sent through Online Jobs will not be answered. 



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
Overview

MADE Digital is hiring a Paid Media Specialist to create, manage and scale lead generation campaigns for clients. This role is focused on driving qualified leads, improving CPL, and delivering measurable business results. Looking for someone who can take ownership and consistently drive real, measurable results through paid media, not deliver simple vanity metrics.



What You’ll Do

- Build, launch, and manage paid media campaigns across relevant channels

- Structure campaigns around high-intent lead generation or ecommerce sales

- Develop and test messaging, creative, and targeting strategies

- Optimize budgets and performance for CPL and lead quality

- Set up and validate conversion tracking and attribution

- Analyze performance and continuously improve results

- Align campaigns with landing pages and funnel strategy

- Provide clear weekly insights and next steps

- Forecast spend and track budget pacing to ensure efficient allocation and consistent performance throughout the week / month / quarter.



Technical Skills

- Proven experience running paid media for lead generation or ecommerce

- Strong understanding of campaign structure, optimization, and scaling

- Experience building or managing landing pages

- Solid understanding of tracking, attribution, and conversion data

- Data-driven mindset with ability to identify and fix performance issues

- Strong communication and reporting skills

- Experience high-quality ad creative production



Soft Skills

- Strong ownership and accountability for results

title: AU Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer – Exhibitions, Events and Brand Activations



About the Role

We are looking for a talented and highly detail-oriented Graphic Designer to support the creative development and

delivery of exhibitions, events and brand activation projects.



This role is ideal for someone who can take a concept or creative direction and turn it into polished, on-brand design

outcomes, while also preparing accurate production-ready artwork based on dimensions, technical drawings, mark-ups

and artwork schedules.



The role requires a strong eye for design, excellent technical artwork skills, and a practical understanding of how

graphics are applied across physical environments and live experiences.

Experience in exhibitions, events, signage, environmental graphics or brand activations is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

• Create graphic design concepts and visual layouts based on client briefs, references and creative direction

• Roll out approved concepts across multipole assets and formats including graphics, signage, counters, walls,

plinths, digital screens, print collateral and branded materials

• Prepare accurate production-ready artwork files for print, signage and digital outputs

• Put together artwork schedules including dimensions, mark-ups working from technical details and production

specifications

• Apply brand guidelines consistency across a wide range of touchpoints

• Adapt master creative across multiple sizes and formats while maintaining design quality and consistency

• Ensure all files are accurate and ready for issue, including checking spelling, alignment, image quality, scale,

bleed, colour settings and layout consistency

• Maintain organised file structures, version control and clear naming conventions

• Communicate clearly and professionally with internal tea
mbers via Outlook, Teams and project updates

• Work collaborative with creative and production teams to meet deadlines and project needs

• Respond to feedback and revisions efficiently and accurately



Skills and Capabilities

• Strong graphic design fundamentals including typography, layout, composition, hierarchy and brand application

• Ability to translate concepts and creative direction into strong visual design outcomes

• Excellent art working skills and technical file setup

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Ability to read and interpret artwork schedules, dimensions, technical drawings and production requirements

• Strong understanding of print production requirements including beleed, trim, safe zones, resolution and colour

modes

• Ability to design for both print and digital outputs

• Strong time management and ability to handle multiples tasks and deadlines

• Strong written English communications kills

• Ability to work independently while staying connected to a remote team

• Proactive approach to asking questions and flagging issues early



Software and tools

Essential

• Adobe illustrator

• Adobe InDesign

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Acrobat

• Microsoft Outlook

• Microsoft Teams

• Microsoft Word

• Microsoft Excel

• Microsoft PowerPoint



Preferred / nice to have

• Adobe After Effects

• Adobe Premier Pro

• Figma

• Basic understanding of spatial or 3D design tools such as SketchUp

• Experience using shared devices, cloud-based file systems and structure folder management



Experience Required

• Minimum 3 years’ experience in graphic design, artwork production or a similar role

• Strong portfolio demonstrating both creative design and technical artwork capability

• Experience preparing files for print and production

• Experience working in a fast-paced studio, agency or project-based environment

• Experience in exhibitions, events, signage, retail environments, environmental graphics or brand activations is

highly preferred

• Experience working remotely with international teams is an advantage



Personal attributes

• Detail-orientated and organised

• Reliable and responsive

• Calm under pressure and able to manage deadlines

• Collaborative and easy to work with

• Positive attitude and willingness to learn

• Accountable for quality and accuracy

• Able to balance creativity with practical execution



What success looks like in a role

• Creative work is on-brand, well considered and visually strong

• Artwork files are accurate, organised and production-ready

• Deadlines are met and communication is clear

• Technical details are followed carefully reducing production issues and rework

• Design quality remains high across multiple formats and rollout

While Shopify remains our primary platform, we are looking for a versatile developer who can bridge the gap between high-end web design and robust ecommerce functionality.

title: Instagram & Facebook Content Editor (Video Editing + Posting)
description:
We are a home service company looking for someone to handle content editing and posting on Instagram and
.



This is a high-output execution role.



We will provide all raw footage and photos from installs. Your job is to:

 • Edit short-form videos from raw footage

 • Edit photos into clean, usable posts

 • Add captions and simple hooks

 • Send content for approval

 • Post consistently on Instagram and

 • Respond to basic comments or messages when needed



This is NOT a strategy role.

You will NOT be responsible for marketing plans, ads, or lead generation.



We are looking for someone who can execute fast, stay organized, and be consistent.



What Success Looks Like

 • Multiple posts going out every week, consistently

 • Fast turnaround from raw footage to final edit

 • Clean edits with minimal revisions

 • No missed posts or delays

 • Content that matches our style after initial training



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

 • Experience editing short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, etc.)

 • Ability to work with raw footage and turn it into clean, engaging clips

 • Basic understanding of captions and formatting

 • Organized and able to manage multiple pieces of content

 • Strong communication and fast response time

 • Able to follow instructions exactly



This Role Is NOT For You If

 • You want to control creative direction or strategy

 • You prefer slow, highly polished editing over fast output

 • You need constant direction or reminders

 • You miss deadlines or respond slowly

 • You are an agency or trying to sell marketing services



Pay

 • Flexible depending on experience

 • Can be structured as per video, hourly, or monthly

 • Opportunity for increased workload if performance is strong



Application Instructions (Read Carefully)



If you do not follow these steps, your application will not be reviewed.

 1. In the first line of your application, write: “READY TO EDIT”

 2. Include links to 2–3 examples of short-form video edits you have done

 3. Answer the following in a few sentences:

 • How long does it take you to edit a 30–60 second video from raw footage?

 • What editing software do you use?

 • What makes your edits clean and engaging?

 4. Be ready to complete a paid test edit if selected





Test Task (Final Step Before Hiring)



You will be given:

 • Raw video clips from a real install

 • 1–2 photos



You will be asked to:

 • Create 1 short video

 • Create 1 post

 • Deliver within 24 hours



We are evaluating:

 • Speed

 • Clean execution

 • Ability to follow instructions

title: Junior Accountant / Bookkeeper
description:
THE ROLE



We are looking for a 'can do', hard working individual with good attention to detail to join our Team for a full time role.



Sakura Business Solutions is a London and Dublin based accountancy practice with a variety of clients in construction, interior design, financial and professional services, property and the creative sector.



We are focused on introducing as much automation and the use of business apps alongside the core cloud accounting software (Xero and QUickbooks) for our clients, with the aim of taking advantage of opportunities to bring efficiencies to 'day to day' accounting work.



Therefore in addition to Quickbooks and Xero, we use apps including DEXT, ApprovalMax, Telleroo and Expensify.



THE CANDIDATE



The appropriate candidate will already have a minimum of 1 year’s experience working in an accounting environment, which includes significant experience working with Quickbooks and/or Xero on a day to day basis ! It is also a key requirement that the candidate is already a Certified Advisor in Xero and/or Quickbooks (or can get it very quickly).



Experience in the use of other apps such as DEXT, EXPENSIFY or TELLEROO would be desirable.



Ideally we are looking for a candidate with experience of a UK working environment, however similar experience in a jurisdiction such as Australia or Dubai would be helpful. Also it would be key that the candidate has experience, or can very quickly 'get up to speed' with, working across multiple clients daily and/or weekly.



We offer a suite of additional benefits after a period of 12 months including health insurance, local accountancy support and the introduction to our ACCA Accredited Training programme in order to support any ongoing studies.



There will be a supported 'Onboarding', training and induction/familiarisation period over a number of weeks with the existing Tea
mbers, but the candidate will be expected to be up to standard quickly afterwards !



THE DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES



• Responsible for building a close and trusted relationship with the Senior Assistant Accountant that you will be reporting into on a day to day basis 

• Responsible for dealing with the routine ‘day to day’ bookkeeping requirements across a number of our clients to a high standard

• Responsible for working to the agreed daily / weekly / monthly deadlines to each client and following our internal checklists and detailed process guides (which support the expected high standards)

• Responsible for the review of sales activity where necessary

• Responsible for the review and processing of Supplier invoices accurately depending on the specific client requirements

• Responsible for monitoring bank feeds, confirming that all bank account feeds are in order on a daily basis

• Responsible for reviewing and allocating all bank transactions for each client on a daily basis

• Responsible for preparing lists of queries and comments on any transactions that are unclear or NOT clarified per our checklists and playbooks for a Client 

• Responsible for completing any bank reconciliations for all bank accounts across all clients on a weekly and/or monthly basis

• Involved in the preparation of quarterly VAT returns for Client ready for review by the Sakura Team ahead of any submission deadlines

• Attendance at a daily Tea
eting to set out work plans, issues and expectations will be required

• Maintaining up to date certification with both Quickbooks and Xero software will be key for the role



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS



Key – Professional and ‘can do’ attitude. Comfortable with working to HIgh Standards with similarly HIgh Expectations, 



Key - Accuracy and good attention to detail is critical



Key – Excellent knowledge of Accounts software (Xero, Quickbooks) is key. 



Key - Good communication skills a MUST, Ability to take instruction and learn from errors and mistakes will be key



FINALLY  for those who have an interest in this role - please send your updated CV or Resume, and include in the SUBJECT line of your application the following [SAKURA - CHERRY BLOSSOM 2026]

title: AI Sales Operations & SDR Manager
description:
Role Overview:

We are looking for a tech-savvy, high-performance AI Sales Operations Manager to lead our outbound growth engine. You will be responsible for building, managing, and optimizing a fully automated "AI-Loom" outreach system.



Instead of a manual team of 15 people, you will be the "Architect" and "Pilot" of an AI stack that sends 100+ personalized video audits per day. Your goal is simple: Generate qualified "Show-Ups" for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Technical Systems & Infrastructure

- Domain Management: Purchase and set up 10–20+ secondary domains (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365) for cold outreach.

- Deliverability: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records and manage the "warm-up" process using tools like Instantly.ai or Smartlead.

- AI Tool Integration: Learn, set up, and maintain our AI stack (Clay, Sendspark/Pitchlane, HeyGen, and ElevenLabs).



2. Lead Generation & Data Enrichment

- Scraping: Use Apollo, Clay, or similar tools to find high-intent leads in the CBD, Cannabis, and Psilocybin niches.

- Data Verification: Ensure 99?liverability by running "waterfall" verification (NeverBounce/MillionVerifier).

- Personalization: Use Clay to find "triggers" (e.g., specific website flaws) to feed into the AI video script.



3. Outreach & Inbox Management

- Campaign Launch: Build and A/B test
 scripts and AI video templates.

- Appointment Setting: Manage all incoming replies. You will handle objections, answer questions, and push qualified leads to book a call on our Calendly.

- Show-up Optimization: Follow up with booked leads to ensure they actually show up to the meeting.



Requirements:

- Technical Aptitude: You must be comfortable learning new AI software quickly. If you’ve used Clay, Zapier, or 
, that is a huge plus.

- Cold
 Expertise: You understand how to avoid the spam folder and what a high-converting subject line looks like.

- Excellent English: Your written communication must be top-tier for handling professional objections from business owners.

- Self-Starter: You don't need a manual for everything; you can watch a YouTube tutorial on a new tool and have it implemented by the next day.



Compensation & Perks:

- Base Salary: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $700–$900 USD] per month.

- Performance Bonus: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $25] per "Qualified Show-Up." (Our goal is 20+ show-ups per month).

- Growth: You will be at the forefront of AI marketing, learning the most valuable skills in the agency world today.

- Flexible Autonomy: As long as the "machine" is running and the calendar is full, we don't micromanage.



How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY:

- To prove you have the attention to detail required for this role, please:

- Change the subject line of your application to: "AI Architect for Apex Media Lab - [Your Name]"

- Briefly describe a time you automated a task using a tool or software.

- Confirm you have experience (or are willing to learn) the technical side of setting up
 domains and DNS records.

 Seller Central or Vendor Central portal, ensuring digital merchandising strategy is best in class. We are looking for someone with strong attention to detail and firm knowledge of how to create new product listings and variation families, upload digital content, and audit detail pages for accuracy. If you are excited about working in a fast-moving space with an opportunity to expand skills on Amazon as well as across other ecommerce platforms, this is the perfect job for you.



Responsibilities

*Work with client success managers (CSMs) and account directors (ADs) to implement the product detail page changes for clients on Amazon.

*Communicate directly with the team on tasks related to catalog optimization efforts.

*Monitor product sales and trends using the proprietary sales and reporting dashboard.

*Collect product data and organize it into the product management software.

*Create, optimize, and upload listing content—titles, bullet points, and descriptions.

*Upload enhanced digital assets created by the internal creative team—A+ content, videos, images, and brand stores.

*Run product page diagnostics on existing products on Amazon to determine the accuracy of the content.

*Conduct product and competitor research to aid in executing an effective listing strategy.

*Monitor both account and listing health closely to limit listing and account downtime.

*Report product pages that fraudulently use the clients' trademarks or copyrighted material.

*Respond to buyer messages in a timely manner while providing excellent customer service.

*Maintain current knowledge of Amazon's policies and best practices for product listings.

*Other responsibilities that come when working with a growing agency.



Successful Candidates

*2–5+ years’ experience working with and on 
 (Vendor Central and Seller Central).

*Proficient in both Seller Central and Vendor Central, with a primary focus on the Vendor Central catalog.

*Bonus points for experience working on international catalogs in Vendor Central.

*Knowledge of the Amazon back-end and the ability to load new products, create variations, fix suppressed listings, upload creative content, and do other similar work within the Amazon portal.

*An extreme eye for detail with impeccable organization skills.

*Proficient multitasker with the ability to manage many tasks at once.

*Ability to work in a collaborative environment.

*A problem solver who can work with the many challenges and inconsistencies the Amazon platform provides.

*English speaking—an effective and timely communicator.

*Proficient in Microsoft Excel.

*Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Benefits

*3 weeks of PTO

*10 holidays

*2 personal days



Please send your application to 
 using the answer to '1,782/54x720+14.98+22' as the subject line.

title: Video Editor & Performance Analyst
description:
Video Editor & Performance Analyst

About the Role

We’re looking for a creative and data-driven Video Editor & Performance Analyst to support a growing digital product brand. You’ll edit content across multiple platforms, track daily performance, test hooks, and help drive traffic to our done-for-you digital product store built on Go High Level.

What You’ll Do

Editing

 • Edit short and long-form video content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and

 • Use Descript for transcript-based editing, captions, and quick turnaround cuts

 • Create multiple hook variations per video for A/B testing

 • Add captions, graphics, transitions, and audio to match each platform’s style

Performance Tracking

 • Monitor daily analytics across all platforms (views, watch time, retention rate, CTR, shares, saves)

 • Maintain a performance tracker to document what’s working and what isn’t

 • Identify trends in top-performing content and flag underperforming videos quickly

 • Deliver weekly performance reports with clear takeaways and recommendations

Hook Testing & Optimization

 • Write and test multiple hooks (first 1–3 seconds) to improve retention and stop-the-scroll rate

 • Analyze retention curves to pinpoint drop-off points

 • Use data to continuously refine editing style and content structure

Platform & Tool Knowledge

 • Pull analytics from YouTube Studio, TikTok Analytics, Meta Insights, and Go High Level

 • Understand how content drives traffic into funnels and digital product offers

 • Bonus: familiarity with Go High Level workflows, funnels, or CRM

What We’re Looking For

 • 2–4 years of video editing experience, preferably for a personal brand or digital business

 • Proficient in Descript and Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

 • Comfortable reading and interpreting platform analytics

 • Understands content strategy for selling digital products to coaches and entrepreneurs

 • Self-starter who tracks and reports data without needing to be reminded

 • Bonus: experience marketing done-for-you products, coaching offers, or SaaS tools

What Success Looks Like

 • Videos are consistently edited and published on schedule

 • Performance data is tracked daily and shared proactively

 • Hook testing is systematic and leads to measurable growth in views and conversions

 • Content directly supports sales of digital products in the Go High Level store

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – UGC-Style Digital Product Videos

Position: Freelance Video Editor

Type: Part-Time / Project-Based

Location: Remote

About the Role

Hourly work 

Part Time 

20 hours weekly

6$ an hour USD and commission

We are looking for a creative, conversion-focused video editor who specializes in UGC (User Generated Content) style videos. You will be editing short-form videos designed to stop the scroll, build trust, and drive sales for digital health and wellness products. This is not a corporate polish role — we want raw, real, and relatable content that converts.

What You’ll Be Doing

 • Edit raw footage into engaging UGC-style videos (15 sec – 90 sec) optimized for Instagram Reels,
, and TikTok

 • Add captions, text overlays, hooks, and call-to-action graphics that drive action

 • Select and sync trending or appropriate background music

 • Create scroll-stopping hooks in the first 1–3 seconds of every video

 • Edit for pacing and emotion — you understand that the first 3 seconds make or break a video

 • Produce multiple versions of the same video for A/B ad testing

 • Deliver videos formatted and sized correctly for each platform

 • Incorporate brand colors, fonts, and tone consistently

What We’re Looking For

 • Proven experience editing UGC-style or direct response video content

 • Strong portfolio showing videos that have driven engagement or sales (not just pretty edits)

 • Understanding of what makes content convert — hooks, pacing, storytelling, CTAs

 • Proficiency in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

 • Ability to take direction from scripts and bring them to life visually

 • Fast turnaround — able to deliver edited videos within 24-48 hours

 • Strong communication and ability to take feedback professionally

 • Experience with digital products, coaching, or service-based businesses is a plus

title: Direct Response Copywriter
description:
If you’re an ambitious copywriter who cares about your craft and wants your work to have a real impact on people’s lives, we’d love to hear from you.



**Why Join us**



- Work with purpose: Every ad supports our mission to inspire creativity.

- Fast-paced growth: Learn quickly and see results in real time.

- Long-term mindset: We hire for the long haul (no hire-and-fire culture).

- Salary: $1,500–$1,800 / month, based on experience and skills.

- Mentorship: Hands-on guidance from our CMO.

- Tools: Access to AI-powered design tools, templates, and internal systems.



**About the role**

This is a full-time remote position available to applicants across the Philippines. You’ll produce high-quality copy across three core formats and a few supporting channels. You’ll balance creativity with structure, move quickly without sacrificing quality, and write for both people and performance.



- Ads: Lead with angles and hooks. Collaborate with designers to ship final creatives.

-
: Write and build campaigns and flows.

- Landing pages: Structure pages, sharpen offers, and write concise copy.



**What We’re Looking For**



- 2–5 years of professional copywriting experience in a marketing environment (in-house or agency)

- Strong writing and editing skills; you can adapt voice, tone, and messaging to fit the brand and channel

- Excellent attention to detail and strong time-management skills—you hit deadlines

- Exceptional command of English (native-level proficiency); clean, error-free copy

- Clear communicator with a collaborative, feedback-friendly working style



**You’d be a good fit if**



- You dig into customer research and turn insights into clear, persuasive copy.

- You learn by doing and believe reps build skill.

- You take your craft seriously—voice, structure, clarity, clean copy—and you welcome feedback.

- You’re comfortable in a fast-moving, high-output environment.

- You love reading, writing, and telling honest stories.

- You have sharp attention to detail—no typos, consistent style.



**How we work**



- Customer-first. Reviews and conversations with customers shape our
s, ads, product updates, and new launches. Relationships are what we value most.

- Experiment, learn, repeat. We test ideas, move fast, and improve as we go. Ship > perfect.

- Serious about the work, humble about ourselves. We care about results and leave ego at the door.



**Work environment**



- Fully remote

- Full-time

- Collaborative, feedback-friendly team

- Meaningful projects with visible impact



**About LOCHBY** (
)



We make tools that help people create—from notebooks to organizers. In a noisy digital world, we focus on building useful products that help you do more and consume less. Our motto: Keep Creating.



**Growth opportunity**



We’ve grown 5x over the past two years. As you go deeper into the work??
s, ads, and landing pages—you’ll have room to take on more ownership, from a senior copywriter role to broader marketing leadership as the team scales.



**How to Apply**



 your application to 
 with subject: Copywriter Application – [Your Name]. Include:



- Resume (PDF)

- Link to public profile (e.g., OnlineJobs.ph or Upwork)

- Answers to the four questions below (in the body of the
 is fine)

    1. Do you have at least 3 years of full-time professional experience post-graduation?

    2. Do you have at least 2 years of professional copywriting experience?

    3. Do you have experience working with North American companies?

    4. Who is your favorite copywriter or marketer, and why?

    5. Which work environment do you thrive in most?

        - Focus-first: I do my best work with long, uninterrupted focus and mostly async collaboration. I loop others in when needed.

        - Collaboration-first: I do my best work with frequent live collaboration—brainstorms, quick check-ins, and lots of back-and-forth.

- Referrer’s name if applicable

title: SEO Expert
description:
With our recent expansion, we're excited to be hiring lively, hard-working SEO professionals to our team! Before we get into the specifics, let us tell you about our company:



Why Join BIG Marketing:



- Work in the US market with a talented team on an exciting mission!

- 14 days paid personal time off.

- Paid time off for US Non-Working Holidays.

- Year-End Bonus.

- Company-sponsored learning.

- Comprehensive pay: $800 - $1,200/mo based on experience and knowledge.

- Opportunity for promotion and pay increases based on yearly performance review.



About BIG Marketing:



BIG Marketing is a digital marketing agency with extensive experience in helping companies grow their profits through SEO and digital marketing. We pride ourselves in delivering the most effective SEO strategies that produce measurable results!



Our company's mission is:



A better world through better marketing.



Some of our core values include:



- Always strive to be better.

- Find your discipline (make yourself a self-starter).

- Lift each other up, professionally and in life.

- Treat others with respect and kindness.

- Be reliable.



We're not just looking for a full-time SEO specialist, we're looking for that perfect person who will be a team player, meet our core values, and win with us.



DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Below is a list of some of the various tasks you'll be required to do to perform well on the job. We've marked certain areas with an asterisk (*) to indicate that we will be providing training in these areas if you find that you aren't already trained:



- Writing Schema Markup.

- Basic on-page SEO - Page Titles, URLs, Descriptions and H Tags.

- Using POP (Page Optimizer Pro) for further optimization.

- Utilizing our AI platform for content writing. 

- Fact checking content. 

- Internal linking pages.

- Assigning image alt tags.

- Attending company meetings on Zoom.



REQUIREMENTS



- Proven SEO experience: A minimum of 4 years.

- In-depth experience with tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, etc.

- Excellent English speaking skills.

- An expert understanding of technical terms related to SEO and the web.

- Experience with technical SEO.

- A fast learner.

- Experience with WordPress.



- A backup or dual internet connection must be set up.

- At least a quad-core CPU for the computer/laptop you're using (the faster the better!)



BONUS QUALIFICATIONS (Not Required)



If you have any of the following skills, please let us know!



- Web development and coding (mostly for increased website speed and debugging).

- Debugging hacked sites.

- Case studies of your work.

- Website migration.



IMPORTANT: Our management team feels every person should have a good work-life balance and we try to create a very comfortable remote work environment. That said, it's also important to us that we can see what work is being done, and track work progress with Time Doctor. 



If you've made it this far, please introduce yourself in a 3-minute video and share it when you apply! Please also add why you believe you'd be a good fit for our team by filling out our application form below:



Application Form: 



Website: 



NOTE: We get a lot of applicants on this platform. The applicants we are most serious about considering are those who are willing to introduce themselves in a video and also fill out our application form. We're excited to meet you and look forward to flourishing together!

title: Social Media Manager & Content Creator
description:
Job Overview:

We are a growing property management firm based in Atlanta, GA, looking for a creative and proactive Social Media Manager (SMM) to join our team. We manage a portfolio of premium properties (including 1, 2, and 3-bedroom units) and are currently gearing up for a major marketing push for the 2026 World Cup.



The ideal candidate will not just "post content"—they will own the storytelling of our guest experience and help us drive direct bookings and owner leads.



Key Responsibilities

Content Creation: Transform raw property photos, drone footage, and videos into high-performing Reels, TikToks, carousels, and stories.



Platform Management: Daily management and growth of our Instagram,
, and TikTok accounts.



Guest Rebate Program: Coordinate our "Guest Content & Rebate" program by reaching out to guests, verifying their user-generated content (UGC), and facilitating the rebate process.



Engagement: Respond to comments and DMs with a high-responsiveness, "Guest Success" mindset.



Strategic Planning: Build and execute a content calendar that highlights our properties' proximity to the Mercedes-Benz Stadium and local Atlanta highlights.



Requirements

Experience: 2+ years of SMM experience, preferably in Hospitality, Airbnb/STR, or Real Estate.



Technical Skills: Proficiency in Canva, CapCut (or similar video editors), and Meta Business Suite.



Communication: Exceptional written English skills with the ability to write catchy "hooks" and informative captions.



Availability: Must be able to overlap at least 4 hours with EST (Atlanta) business hours for team syncs.



Bonus: Experience with AI marketing tools (like Jasper, Copy.ai, or Lindy) is a huge plus.



Compensation & Benefits

Weekly Salary: $
USD (Depending on experience and portfolio)



Type: Full-time (40 hours per week).



Stability: Long-term role with growth opportunities as our portfolio expands.



Performance Bonus: Bonuses available for high-engagement milestones and successful marketing campaigns.

title: Virtual Medical Assistant
description:
West Orange Nephrology is a kidney care clinic located in Winter Garden, Florida. Our team of experienced nephrologists provides personalized care across diagnostics, dialysis, laboratory services, and patient education. We are looking for a Virtual Medical Assistant to join our remote team. This position requires prior experience working in a US medical office or clinical setting.



About the role

You will support our providers and clinical staff by keeping the clinical day running smoothly. Your responsibilities range from flagging urgent lab results to preparing charts before appointments and checking patients in and out for virtual visits. This role requires strong medical knowledge, sharp attention to detail, and the ability to communicate clearly with both patients and clinical staff.



What you'll be doing

You will monitor and flag critical lab values to the appropriate provider in a timely manner, prepare and prep patient charts ahead of scheduled clinic visits, contact pharmacies to process and follow up on medication refill requests, and communicate with clinic staff to relay provider instructions and patient updates. You will also check patients in and out for telehealth visits, maintain accurate documentation in the EHR system, and ensure all tasks are completed in compliance with HIPAA regulations.



Who we're looking for

We need someone with experience as a medical assistant, clinical coordinator, or in a similar US healthcare role. Familiarity with nephrology, chronic disease management, or specialty clinic workflows is a strong plus. You should be comfortable reading and interpreting lab results, experienced with EHR or EMR systems such as eClinicalWorks, Athena, or Epic, and able to manage multiple tasks during a busy clinic day. Strong communication skills, attention to detail, and HIPAA training are all required.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice. US medical office or clinical experience is required. Candidates without US healthcare experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself and your clinical background. Please answer this question: "What EHR systems have you worked with, and what does your experience with chart prep or lab monitoring look like?" Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Case Manager
description:
West Orange Nephrology is a kidney care clinic located in Winter Garden, Florida. We provide comprehensive nephrology services including chronic kidney disease management, dialysis, diagnostics, and patient education. We are looking for a Virtual Case Manager to support our Chronic Care Management (CCM) program. Prior experience working in a US medical or case management setting is required.



About the role

You will be responsible for conducting monthly outreach calls with patients enrolled in our CCM program, identifying any clinical or social resources they may need, completing patient assessments, and following up to ensure continuity of care. This is a relationship-driven role that requires both clinical knowledge and genuine compassion for patients managing complex chronic conditions like kidney disease.



What you'll be doing

You will conduct monthly outbound calls to CCM-enrolled patients, complete patient assessments to identify clinical and community resource needs, document findings and care plans in the EHR system, and coordinate referrals to specialists or social services as needed. You will perform follow-up calls to monitor patient progress, communicate updates and concerns to the supervising provider, and maintain accurate CCM time logs to support billing compliance.



Who we're looking for

We need someone with experience in case management, care coordination, or a similar patient-facing US healthcare role. Familiarity with Chronic Care Management programs and documentation requirements is important. Knowledge of nephrology or chronic illness management is a strong plus. You should have strong phone communication skills, be comfortable working with EHR systems, and have the ability to identify patient needs and connect them to the right resources. HIPAA training and experience with protected health information are required.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice and a US CCM program. US medical office or case management experience is required. Candidates without US healthcare experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself and your case management or care coordination background. Please answer this question: "Do you have experience with CCM programs? If so, describe what your monthly patient outreach process looked like?" Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: RPM Coordinator
description:
West Orange Nephrology is a kidney care clinic located in Winter Garden, Florida. We specialize in comprehensive kidney care including diagnostics, chronic disease management, dialysis, and remote patient monitoring programs. We are looking for an RPM Coordinator to manage our Remote Patient Monitoring program focused on blood pressure management. Prior experience in a US medical office or clinical support role is required.



About the role

You will manage our remote blood pressure monitoring program for patients at our clinic. You will conduct monthly check-in calls with enrolled patients, respond to out-of-range blood pressure alerts, and coordinate clinic visits when escalation is needed. This role requires clinical awareness, strong communication skills, and the ability to act calmly and quickly when a patient's readings indicate a concern.



What you'll be doing

You will conduct scheduled monthly outbound calls to RPM-enrolled patients, review blood pressure readings and identify out-of-range values, and contact patients promptly when readings fall outside safe parameters. You will schedule clinic visits or escalate to the provider for patients with concerning readings, document all patient interactions and follow-up actions in the EHR, educate patients on their monitoring devices, and maintain accurate RPM time logs to support program billing and compliance.



Who we're looking for

We need someone with experience in a US medical office, clinical support, or remote patient monitoring role. Familiarity with RPM programs and blood pressure management protocols is a strong plus. You should be comfortable interpreting blood pressure readings and understanding when escalation is needed, have calm and clear phone communication skills especially in urgent situations, and be detail-oriented with strong documentation habits. Experience with EHR systems and HIPAA compliance are required.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice and a US RPM program. US medical office or clinical experience is required. Candidates without US healthcare experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself and your medical or clinical background. Please answer this question: "Do you have experience with RPM or remote patient monitoring programs? If so, describe what your role involved." Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Bookkeeper
description:
West Orange Nephrology is a physician-owned kidney care clinic located in Winter Garden, Florida. We offer a full range of nephrology services and are a growing practice with multiple providers on our team. We are looking for a Virtual Bookkeeper to manage our financial records and vendor relationships. Prior bookkeeping experience in a US medical office or healthcare business is required.



About the role

You will be responsible for keeping the financial side of our practice accurate and organized. This includes invoice management, maintaining the books, coordinating with vendors, and managing vendor contracts. We need a detail-oriented professional who is comfortable in a US medical business environment and can handle financial responsibilities with accuracy and professionalism.



What you'll be doing

You will manage incoming and outgoing invoices including tracking, processing, and reconciling, maintain accurate and up-to-date books using accounting software, and contact vendors for billing inquiries, payment follow-ups, and issue resolution. You will review and manage vendor contracts and renewal timelines, reconcile accounts and prepare regular financial summaries for the physician, support month-end and year-end close processes, and coordinate with the external accountant or CPA as needed.



Who we're looking for

We need someone with at least two years of bookkeeping experience in a professional US setting, ideally with prior experience in a US medical office or healthcare business. You should be proficient in QuickBooks, Wave, or similar accounting software, have a strong understanding of accounts payable, accounts receivable, and basic financial reporting, and have experience managing vendor relationships and contracts. High numerical accuracy, strong organizational skills, and professional written communication are all essential.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice. US bookkeeping or US healthcare business experience is required. Candidates without US experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself and your bookkeeping background. Please answer this question: "What accounting software have you used, and what does your experience with invoice management and vendor coordination look like?" Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: AI Video Creator — Personalized Celebration Videos (Ongoing Work)
description:
About the Role:

We're hiring a skilled AI video creator to produce personalized celebration videos for our customers. Think viral "African Dancers" style birthday wishes, but fully created with AI for any occasion (birthdays, anniversaries, congratulations, weddings, and more).



This is a creative role with real impact. Every video you make goes directly to a customer celebrating someone they love. Your work makes their day special.



We expect to need 20-100+ videos per month going forward. We're looking for the right person to grow with us.



Hiring Process:

We do a paid test video first, so you can show us what you can do, and we can see if it's the right fit. Here's how it works:



Step 1 — Apply with your portfolio

Step 2 — If we like your work, we send you one set of inputs (photo, name, occasion, message) for a paid test video

Step 3 — You deliver one finished video within 5 days

Step 4 — Test video payment: $25-40 USD (paid on delivery)

Step 5 — If we love it, we move into ongoing paid work at negotiated per-video rates



What You'll Create:

Personalized celebration videos based on customer inputs:

- A photo of the person being celebrated

- Their name

- The occasion

- A short personalized message



Each video should:

- Feature people (dancers, characters, a celebrating group, (your creative call) who appear to celebrate that specific person

- Naturally integrate the customer's photo and/or name

- Include a personalized voice message or beautiful text overlay with the message

- Run around 20-40 seconds

- Feel genuine, emotional, and shareable



Quality Standard:

The bar is simple: would the recipient smile, laugh, or get emotional watching this? If yes, you've nailed it. We're not after generic AI experiments,  we want videos that genuinely make people happy.



We do NOT want:

- Stock footage with text slapped on top

- Obvious AI artifacts (warped faces, weird hands, broken motion)

- Robotic voice-overs

- Photos that look pasted-on or floating



Tools You Can Use:

You d
 what works best , we trust your expertise. Many great tools exist right now: Sora, Veo, Runway, Kling AI, HeyGen, Pika, ElevenLabs, Hailuo, and more. Use whatever produces the most believable result.



We will reimburse reasonable AI subscription costs for the test video (up to $20 with receipts).



What We Provide:

- One set of customer inputs for the test video

- Clear creative direction

- Fast feedback

- Reliable, on-time payment

- Long-term partnership if your work is great



What You Provide:

- Hands-on expertise with current AI video tools

- A creative eye for emotional, shareable content

- Reliable delivery

- Honest communication



Test Video Details:

- 1 personalized video as a paid skill test

- 5 days from receiving inputs to delivery

- Test payment: $25-40 USD (paid on delivery via PayPal or Wise)

- If we love your test, we move into ongoing per-video work



What We're Looking For:

- Strong portfolio of AI-generated video work

- Experience with multiple AI video tools

- Audio/voice tools experience (ElevenLabs or similar)

- Creative instincts for what makes content feel authentic

- Excellent written English

- Reliable communicator who hits deadlines



Bonus Skills:

- Face integration / photo-to-video techniques

- Voice cloning experience

- Editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci)

- Background in viral social media content



How to Apply:

Please reply with:

1. 2-3 examples of AI-generated videos you've made (links)

2. Which AI tools you use most and why

3. Your initial idea for how you'd approach a personalized celebration video

4. Your rate proposal for ongoing per-video work (after the test)

5. Optional: a short Loom video introducing yourself (this gets you bumped to the top of the list)



We respond to every serious application. Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Accountant / Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Accountant / Bookkeeper

Company: Muni Insurance

About Us



We are a growing, multi-location insurance agency focused on delivering high-quality service and building long-term client relationships. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accountant/Bookkeeper to help keep our financials clean, organized, and up to date.



Position Overview



We are seeking a part-time Accountant or Bookkeeper to manage day-to-day financial transactions, maintain accurate records in QuickBooks, and support overall financial organization. This role is critical to ensuring clean books, proper documentation, and readiness for tax filing and financial decision-making.



Key Responsibilities

Record and categorize all income and expenses in QuickBooks

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and financial statements regularly

Upload, organize, and attach receipts and supporting documents within QuickBooks

Maintain clean and audit-ready financial records

Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable

Assist with invoicing and tracking incoming payments

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

Identify discrepancies and resolve issues proactively

Support year-end closing and collaborate with CPA/tax preparer

Recommend improvements for financial processes and efficiency

Qualifications

Proven experience as a bookkeeper or accountant (preferably with small businesses)

Strong proficiency in QuickBooks (Online preferred)

Solid understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive financial data

Self-starter who can work independently and meet deadlines

Experience in insurance, financial services, or multi-entity businesses is a plus

Nice to Have

Experience with multi-location or multi-entity accounting

Familiarity with commission-based income tracking

Experience integrating bank feeds, POS systems, or CRM tools with QuickBooks

Compensation

Hourly rate based on experience 

Flexible schedule

Opportunity for long-term growth as the company expands



How to Apply (Only those who follow instructions will be selected for an interview) 

Send us a copy of your resume, a loom video describing a little bit about yourself, what you like to do for fun on your off time and why you would be a great candidate for this position

description:
Executive Virtual Assistant 



Pure Dental Spa is growing — and growth creates opportunity.



We are a fast-paced, systems-driven dental organization focused on building something bigger than just dental offices. We create opportunities for people, develop leaders, and are committed to delivering the most comfortable dental experience possible.



As our organization continues to expand, we are looking for a highly capable, detail-oriented, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to serve as a direct extension of the CEO.



This is not a basic admin role.

This role is for someone who thrives in organization, loves solving problems, communicates clearly, protects priorities, and helps a visionary leader move faster.



What You’ll Do:

You will help manage and support high-level operational and executive functions across multiple growing dental offices, including:



Executive Support

Manage CEO calendar, scheduling, and meeting coordination

 management and drafting professional communication

Organize priorities, follow-ups, and project deadlines

Assist with presentations, reports, and leadership documents

Support recruiting coordination and candidate communication



Operations Support

Organize training materials and internal systems



Marketing & Administrative Assistance

Research tools, software, and business solutions

Data entry and process tracking



Who You Are:

Exceptionally organized

Strong written and verbal English communication

Detail-obsessed

Proactive and resourceful

Able to anticipate needs before being asked

Comfortable in a fast-moving environment

Tech-savvy (Google Workspace, spreadsheets, task management tools, AI tools like ChatGPT/Claude is a huge plus)

Bonus Points If You Have:

Familiarity with CRM, project management, or dental software



Work Schedule:

Full-Time Remote

Compensation:

Competitive and based on experience.



Why Join Us:

At Pure Dental Spa, businesses don’t grow — people do.



This role is an opportunity to become a key player in a growing organization where your contribution matters. If you are someone who wants more than just a job and are excited by growth, leadership, systems, and helping build something meaningful, we want to meet you.

Track KPIs (vacancy, collections, response times)



Help improve and document SOPs



Identify inefficiencies and propose solutions



Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)



2+ years of hands-on Buildium experience



Property management or real estate operations background



Strong English communication skills (written & spoken)



Experience working with U.S.-based tenants and vendors



Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Able to work independently and take ownership



Preferred (Nice to Have)

SOP creation or team leadership experience

Work Details

Full-Time (40 hours/week)



U.S. business hours (EST preferred)



Long-term role with advancement potential



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary (based on Buildium experience)



Performance-based bonuses



Growth path to Senior Operations / Portfolio Manager

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
APPLY HERE: 



Hey there!



I am super excited to bring our YouTube channel to the next phase and bring on a full time editor. I started this company Expedition Ranch in April of 2024 and It's out of pure passion for building really cool overland rigs and the protection of our public lands here in the US.



Here is what we do, we build really unique overland campers on our youtube channel and run a giveaway on the build once it is done. Yes, anyone in the US or Canada can win one of our rigs. We have an e-commerce store, 
, where every $1 spent on the store will give our customers one entry to win, with 10% of the proceeds going to nonprofits who fight to protect our public lands so we can explore them by vehicle.



I have been editing the youtube videos personally however I am not a video editor and it takes WAY TOO MUCH TIME and because of that I have not been able to be consistent.  I need help and I need it as soon as possible.



SCOPE OF THE WORK

- 1 full-length YouTube video per week (20-40 minutes long)

- 5-7 Short form videos per week

- 5-10 Ads Per Week



The more videos we produce the more money we make, and the more I can pay you! If you are doing a great job, I have no problem paying 2k-2.5k per month or more. 



I need someone who is dedicated to making the best possible videos with the footage I give you. Always getting better and taking them to the next level. I want color grading, music, good transitions ect.



But I also want you to be researching similar channels, coming up with ideas of how we can up our videos. Staying on top of social media trends and all that. I want this to be a job where you can grow in skill and financial compensation. I need someone with absolute drive to become the best.



If you can produce good ads, shorts and long form videos the company grows. I want a young guy who can focus, see the vision of our company and treat it like it's their own company. Put everything into this!



I also need someone who understands vehicles, has a passion for them and the outdoors. If you are hired you will need to watch all my videos and immerse yourself in our niche.



Please go to my youtube 
 and visit our website 
 to get a feel for what we do and the content we produce. I need you to do this before applying and understand you will receive 4-12 hours of footage each week. Your internet upload/ download needs to be great!



To me this is the most important role in the company. I need someone excellent!



Skills



- Video editing (long form/ short form/ ads)

- Color grading

- Audio

- effects

- Thumbnails/ Photo editing

- strong work ethic

- Pride in your work

- Understanding of Youtube

- Meet deadlines



Send me your portfolio and highlight the video you like the most. Let me know why you want to work for Expedition Ranch! You can do that by applying at the link up top



You can find my personal 
 free to D

title: Level 2 IT Support Technician (MSP / Remote)
description:
We are a U.S.-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking an experienced Level 2 IT Support Technician to join our team full-time.



This role is for someone who can go beyond basic helpdesk tasks and take ownership of technical issues, troubleshoot efficiently, and provide excellent customer service.



You will work closely with our dispatcher and clients to resolve tickets, support end users, and maintain stable IT environments.



Key Responsibilities:

• Troubleshoot and resolve Level 1 and Level 2 support tickets

• Provide remote support for desktops, laptops, and mobile devices

• Support Microsoft 365 (users,
, permissions, troubleshooting)

• Assist with networking issues (routers, firewalls, Wi-Fi)

• Manage and maintain Windows environments

• Document work clearly in the ticketing system

• Communicate professionally with clients

• Escalate complex issues when necessary



Requirements:

• Strong English communication (written and spoken)

• 3+ years of IT support experience (MSP experience preferred)

• Experience with Microsoft 365 administration

• Good understanding of networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, VPN)

• Experience with remote support tools and ticketing systems

• Ability to work during U.S. business hours

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment



Preferred Experience:

• MSP experience

• Experience with RMM tools (Syncro, Ninja, etc.)

• Basic cybersecurity awareness

• Experience documenting processes



IMPORTANT – VIDEO REQUIREMENT:

To be considered, you MUST submit a short video (2–3 minutes) answering the following:



1. Tell us about your IT experience and environments you’ve supported

2. Walk us through how you would troubleshoot a user who cannot access

3. What hours are you available to work (local time and U.S. time)

4. Do you currently have any other jobs or clients?



Applications without a video will NOT be considered.



Technical Screening (Required):

Please also include written answers to the following:



1. What is DNS and why is it important?

2. What steps would you take if a computer cannot connect to the internet?

3. What is the difference between local user and domain user?



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with our company.



To confirm you read this job post, include the word "L2TechPro" in your application subject line.

title: Ad Manager + Video Editor for TikTok & Meta
description:
**Applications without a video intro will NOT be considered**





We are Honest Pathology (
), a patient-focused telehealth service founded by a U.S. board-certified pathologist. 



We are looking for a skilled, reliable Ad Manager, Ad Creator, and Marketing Strategist who can also handle **video editing**. This role focuses on growing our online presence through high-performing ads and short-form video content on **TikTok** and **Meta** 
/Instagram) platforms.



**Key Responsibilities:**

- Manage and optimize TikTok Business and Meta Business Suite accounts (campaign setup, targeting, budgeting, A/B testing, scaling winners, and daily monitoring).

- Create and execute marketing strategies to drive traffic, leads, and bookings for our pathology review services.

- Produce, edit, and optimize short-form videos (15-60 seconds) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Meta ads — turning educational content, testimonials, explainer scripts, and raw footage into engaging, high-conversion creatives.





Requirements

- Proven track record managing TikTok Business accounts and Meta Business Suite (please share links to accounts you've managed or performance screenshots/metrics from past campaigns when applying).

- Experience creating and editing short-form videos specifically for paid ads on TikTok and Meta (Reels, vertical format).

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Sora Pro 2, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar — must be fast and produce polished, trend-aligned edits).

- Understanding of digital marketing best practices for healthcare/medical/educational content (compliance-aware is a plus).

- Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



Schedule & Compensation:

- Part-time: 4 hours per day, Monday–Friday (approximately 20 hours/week).

- Must work during **US morning hours** (aligned with Mountain Time / Pacific Time zones — e.g., 8 AM–12 PM MT or similar; flexible within reason but consistency required).



- After successful probation: $5 or more USD per hour.

- If you consistently add value (e.g., strong ad performance, creative ideas, or scaling results), we offer potential for **additional hours** and/or **performance-based bonuses/compensation increases**.

- Paid via PayPal, Wise, or similar (weekly or bi-weekly).



How to Apply – MUST READ:

To be considered, you must submit a short video introduction (1–2 minutes max, vertical format preferred). In your video:

- Introduce yourself and your location/time zone.

- Briefly explain your background and experience with TikTok/Meta ads management and video editing.

- Share 1–2 specific examples of campaigns or videos you've created (mention metrics if possible).

- Tell us why you're excited about working with a healthcare/education brand like Honest Pathology.



**Applications without a video intro will NOT be considered** — this helps us see your communication style, editing skills, and personality fit.





We're excited to find someone who can help us reach more patients who need clear answers about their health. Looking forward to your application!



- Charlie

title: Social Media Manager & Marketing Coordinator – TDY Hero
description:
Social Media Manager & Marketing Coordinator – TDY Hero



**MUST SEND A VIDEO EXPLAINING WHY YOU WANT THIS JOB! You will not be considered without a video**



**About Us**

TDY Hero provides **furnished lodging for military travelers** across the United States. Our audience is primarily **active-duty military members**, and we use social media to educate them about better lodging options while keeping content engaging and helpful.



We are looking for a **Social Media Manager & Marketing Coordinator** who can organize, schedule, and manage our social media presence using METRICOOL. This role focuses on **marketing strategy, scheduling posts, SEO awareness, and engagement**, not creating the content itself.



**Important:**

You will **not be responsible for creating graphics or videos**. Our team will provide the content. Your job is to **schedule, optimize, post, and manage engagement**.

**Platforms We Use**



* Instagram

*

* TikTok

* YouTube Shorts

* LinkedIn



**Job Details**

* Part-time to start, with potential to grow

* Long-term opportunity for the right person



**Requirements**



* Experience managing social media accounts

* Strong understanding of **social media algorithms and trends**

* Familiarity with **SEO and hashtag optimization**

* Experience with scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.)

We are looking for someone who can **consistently manage and grow our social media presence** while keeping our audience engaged.
