title: Bookkeeper – AppFolio & QuickBooks Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-Time 



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, experienced bookkeeper with expertise in AppFolio and QuickBooks. This role supports the day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations for both a property management and investment rental portfolio. You must be confident working independently and communicating clearly in a remote setting.



Responsibilities



AppFolio

-Run and interpret financial reports (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

-Manage trust accounts in compliance with applicable regulations

-Have a complete understanding to fully handle bank reconciliations from start to finish

-Post rent payments, late fees, and other tenant charges 

-Process and manage accounts payable and vendor invoices

-Build and manage maintenance work orders

-Perform monthly bank reconciliations within AppFolio

-Review and ensure accurate accounting on owner statements

-Manage tenant and owner ledgers

-Handle security deposit tracking and dispositions

-Maintain tenant and owner portal data accuracy



QuickBooks

-Export and transfer financial data from AppFolio into QuickBooks for company financials

-Maintain accurate books in QuickBooks alongside AppFolio records

-Reconcile accounts in QuickBooks

-Assist with 1099 preparation for vendors at year-end

-Generate financial reports and budget variance analysis in QuickBooks



General Bookkeeping

-Track and manage accounts receivable and payable

-Support monthly and year-end close processes

-Maintain organized financial records and documentation

-Communicate professionally with property owners and vendors regarding financial matters

-Assist with utility billing and reconciliation



Required Skills & Experience

-Bachelors in Accounting or Bookkeeping

-Minimum of 3 years of bookkeeping experience in Quickbooks and Appfolio

-Proficient in AppFolio Property Manager — this is a hard requirement; please do not apply if you do not have AppFolio experience

-Proficient in QuickBooks for use of a property management company and residential real estate inventments

-Experience transferring or syncing data between AppFolio and QuickBooks (no API option; we have Appfolio Basic)

-Strong understanding of real estate or property management accounting

-High attention to detail and accuracy

-Able to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong written English communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

-Familiarity with owner reporting and trust accounting

-Accounting degree or certification (not required but a plus)



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

- A 1-minute voice sample (Vocaroo is an option to submit this)

- Your WPM score with the 3 Minute Test:

      

- A summary of your AppFolio experience — specific tasks you have performed

- Your QuickBooks experience — Online vs. Desktop, and how long

- The Phrase Appaloosa1 in the Subject Line

- Any examples of how you have moved data between AppFolio and QuickBooks

***Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Children's Book Illustrator (Long-term, 240+ books)
description:
We are Blue Fish Books, a children's publishing brand. We have around 240 children's books fully written and ready to be illustrated. We're looking for one talented illustrator to be our long-term partner on this catalogue.



About the work:

- Children's picture books for ages 4–9

- 10–12 spreads per book (varies)

- Full-bleed illustrations - art takes most of each page

- Front cover + back cover design for every book

- Full book layout and formatting for Amazon KDP and our online shop



**What we care about most (in this order):**



1. Diverse characters: Our brand is about representation - our books feature children of many ethnicities, skin tones, hair textures, and family types as the leads. Your portfolio must show you can draw a wide range of children believably and beautifully, not just one default look. This is the single most important thing.



2. Style: We are open to different styles, but maybe playful, polished, Disney-influenced. Expressive faces, appealing character design, warm colour palettes.



3. Volume: We want to move steadily through the catalogue, so consistent monthly output matters.



4. Reliability: We're building a long-term working relationship, not a one-off. Mnay more books added every month



Pay:

- $200 USD per completed book (illustrations + cover + KDP-ready layout)

- Paid monthly based on books completed that month

- Long-term work - 100+ books in the pipeline



Tools: We don't mind whether you work fully hand-drawn, digital, or AI-assisted - what matters is that the final work is high quality, consistent, and yours to deliver. Show us your process if AI is part of it.



To apply, please send:

1. Portfolio link (must include children's illustration work)

2. Any children's book covers or full books you've designed

3. How many books per month you could realistically deliver



All shortlisted applicants will be interviewed this week!



Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Keep deals on track, manage every detail, and ensure smooth closings from anywhere. Be the organized force that turns contracts into successful, stress-free transactions.

Lead and manage real estate transactions from contract to closing with precision and efficiency:

• Oversee all contract-to-close processes with accuracy and timeliness

• Review contracts, addendums, and documents to ensure full compliance

• Open escrow and monitor critical deadlines (inspections, financing, contingencies)

• Schedule inspections, appraisals, and closing appointments

• Provide consistent updates to clients and stakeholders

• Assist with post-closing follow-ups and client retention efforts



Qualifications

Detail-oriented and proactive professionals with strong real estate experience are encouraged to apply:

• Proven experience as a Transaction Coordinator, Real Estate Assistant, or similar role

• Solid understanding of real estate contracts, processes, and timelines

• Proficiency with tools such as DocuSign, KW Command, or comparable platforms

• Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail

• Strong communication and multitasking abilities

• Ability to work independently and manage priorities effectively



Education and Experience

• Bachelor’s degree preferred

• At least 1–2 years of relevant experience

• Experience with Keller Williams/Command is an advantage



Compensation and Benefits

Join a remote-first, growth-driven environment with competitive offerings:

title: Full-Time Sales & Outreach Specialist
description:
** Must submit a 60" video explaining how you can bring Value to TDY Hero. You will not be considered without a video**



About Us

TDY Hero is a personalized CONCIERGE service connects traveling U.S. military members with mid-term furnished housing across the United States. We provide a high-end, custom, service that helps members quickly find quality housing while on temporary duty assignments.

We are growing quickly and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and highly communicative Sales & Outreach Specialist to join our team.



Role Overview

As a Sales & Outreach Specialist, you will play find our military clients a furnished home (airbnb, furnished finder) during their military training. You will talk with both military clients and potential property owners. This is a fast-paced, client-facing role that requires excellent English communication skills, strong organization, and confidence handling both inbound and outbound communication.



Requirements

Excellent spoken and written English (near-native fluency required)

Comfortable speaking on the phone with U.S.-based clients and property owners

Strong multitasking and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple conversations and clients at once

Experience in sales, customer service, or outreach is highly preferred



Compensation

$5/hour (after probationary period)

Performance-based commissions (average $250+ per month additional)

Opportunity for growth within a fast-scaling company



Don't apply

If you aren't comfortable speaking English or don't like the hustle of Sales this job is NOT for you.



Hours

Monday thru Friday,
EST

title: Virtual Assistant – DM Outreach & Appointment Setter (Coaching Business)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented, people-savvy Virtual Assistant to join a 1:1 coaching business. This is not a task-and-forget role. You will be the first impression potential clients have of this brand, and we take that seriously.



If you are someone who takes pride in your work, communicates with warmth and professionalism, and can hold a conversation that actually moves people to take action, keep reading.



About the Role:

This is a remote, part-time position supporting a private coaching business that helps men build confidence in dating and life. Your job is to manage inbound and outbound DMs, qualify leads, and book discovery calls onto the coach's calendar. You will not be doing generic copy-paste outreach. You will be having real conversations with real people so the ability to read a situation and respond thoughtfully is everything.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Sending outbound DMs to cold and warm leads on Instagram

- Following up with prospects who showed interest but haven't booked yet

- Qualifying leads and booking them onto the coach's calendar

- Managing the DM inbox, flagging hot leads, archiving dead ends

- Keeping a simple lead tracker updated daily



Schedule:

Wednesday – Friday: 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM Pacific Time

Saturday – Sunday: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Pacific Time



Compensation:

$800/month base pay

$50 bonus for every client who closes



Who We're Looking For:

- You've done this before: DM outreach, appointment setting, or something close to it. You know how to hold a conversation without sounding like a script. You follow through without someone having to chase you down. And you get that in this world, the way you show up in someone's inbox can make or break whether they trust us enough to invest.

- Attention to detail is non-negotiable here. We work with a high standard and we expect the same from everyone on the team. Speaking of detail, if you have read this far, here is what we need you to do: in the last field of the application form, after your answer, paste a Google Drive Link or photo link of your favorite book. This is intentional. Do not mention it anywhere else in your application.

- You are comfortable working independently, managing your time during set hours, and flagging issues before they become problems. Bonus points if you have worked in a coaching or service based business before.





Tools You Should Know:

- Instagram DMs

- Google Sheets or any simple spreadsheet

- Calendly or a similar scheduling tool

- Any CRM or lead tracker (even a basic one. Bonus if you know how to use GoHighLevel)

- ChatGPT/Any other AI



How to Apply

Fill out the application form linked below. All fields are required. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

-> 
 



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted :)

title: Supply Chain & International Procurement Specialist
description:
We are a manufacturing company dedicated to producing high-quality products for the healthcare and commercial sectors. We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Procurement & Inventory Specialist to oversee sourcing, purchasing, and inventory management to ensure smooth and cost-effective operations.





Position Summary:

The Procurement & Inventory Specialist will be responsible for sourcing materials, negotiating with vendors, managing purchase orders, and maintaining accurate inventory levels. This role ensures the company has the right materials, in the right quantity, at the right time, while minimizing costs and avoiding stock shortages or excess.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and oversee the procurement process, including sourcing, vendor evaluation, and contract negotiation.

Develop and maintain strong vendor/supplier relationships to ensure timely delivery and cost-effectiveness.

Monitor and maintain optimal inventory levels to meet production schedules without overstocking.

Conduct regular inventory audits, reconcile discrepancies, and implement effective inventory control measures.

Coordinate with production, operations, and other departments to forecast material requirements.

Prepare and process purchase orders, invoices, and procurement documentation.

Track and analyze inventory KPIs (turnover, shrinkage, lead times) and provide regular reports to management.

Continuously identify opportunities to improve procurement and inventory processes.

Ensure compliance with company policies and industry regulations.





Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field (preferred).

3+ years of experience in procurement and inventory management, preferably in a manufacturing environment.

Strong knowledge of inventory management systems, procurement processes, and vendor relations.

Proficiency in MS Office and ERP/inventory management software.

Excellent negotiation, communication, and organizational skills.

Ability to analyze data and make strategic purchasing decisions.

Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills





System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: Sales Representative (B2B)
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Schedule and conduct virtual meetings and presentations with potential clients.

- Strong relationship-building and negotiation skills.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).

title: Lead Gen Specialist
description:
We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): 



Number of verified hospital contacts added monthly (target: 300+). 

Number of high-quality, engaged leads generated (target: 10–15 per month). 

 open rate (target: >35%) and reply rate (target: >8%). 

Number of
 campaigns executed per quarter (target: 2–3). 

Conversion rate from lead to opportunity (measured jointly with sales). 

Timely reporting and insights provided weekly. 

Consistency in messaging and alignment with brand tone and values. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

title: Web and Multimedia Designer
description:
We are looking for a Multimedia & Digital Design Specialist who understands not just how things look—but how they convert.

This role is focused on landing pages, funnels, and brand execution across digital touchpoints. You will work closely with the marketing team to translate strategy into clear, structured, and high-performing visual assets



Job responsibilities include:



Landing Pages & Funnel Design (Primary Focus)

*Design high-converting landing pages, sales pages, and funnel assets

*Collaborate with the marketing team on layout, messaging flow, and user journey

*Translate wireframes and strategy into clean, conversion-focused designs

*Apply strong visual hierarchy, spacing, and structure to improve readability and engagement

*Optimize designs for mobile responsiveness and performance

*Iterate on designs based on campaign performance and feedback



Branding & Visual Systems

*Develop and maintain cohesive brand identity systems (colors, typography, layout styles)

*Ensure consistency across all digital assets and touchpoints

*Create marketing collateral such as ads,
 graphics, and lead magnets

*Support rebrands and new product launches



Social & Content Design

*Design clean, on-brand visuals for social platforms (Instagram,
, YouTube)

*Create assets such as thumbnails, post graphics, content covers, and ad creatives

*Design performance-driven ad creatives that translate marketing hooks, angles, and messaging into compelling visuals

*Produce multiple variations of creatives for testing (layouts, headlines, visual styles)

*Ensure designs are optimized for mobile and scroll-stopping impact

*Maintain consistency and clarity across all content formats



Occasional Multimedia Support (Nice to Have)

*Support simple video edits or motion elements when required (not a core responsibility)



Qualifications

*At least 2+ years of experience in web and landing page design, with a focus on user experience and conversion optimization

*At least 2+ years of experience in graphic design and social media content creation, including marketing assets and ad creatives

*Strong understanding of conversion-focused design (CTA placement, layout flow, readability, hierarchy)

*Strong foundation in core design principles, including color theory, typography, layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy

*Proven experience creating cohesive brand and marketing assets across digital platforms

*Proficiency in tools such as Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator (or equivalent)

*Ability to translate marketing strategy into structured, effective visual execution

*Strong attention to detail and ability to maintain consistency across multiple assets



Nice to Have (Not Required):

*Basic video editing skills for short-form content (Reels, Shorts, ads)

*Familiarity with motion graphics



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i7 or equivalent with 16gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 100 MBPS Download speed

*Need to have professional editing software (Licensed)



Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 7:30 PM - 11:30PM CST // Monday - Friday 8:30AM - 12:30PM PH Time



This is a PROJECT-BASED role with a salary range of PHP288.46 to 432.69 an hour



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagnnlBbUosheImMK/form



After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

mbers

title: AI Automation & Internal Systems Engineer (GPT/RAG Systems)
description:
Role: AI Automation & Internal Systems Engineer (GPT / RAG Systems)  

Type: Full-Time (Initial 3–6 Month Engagement, with Potential Long-Term Opportunity)  

Working Hours: Must overlap with Pacific Daylight Time (at least 4–6 hours)

Monthly Rate: To Be Disclosed





What This Role Is:

This is NOT a typical developer role.



We are looking for someone who can think in systems, automate workflows, and implement AI into real business operations.



Your main objective is to help us build an internal “Company Brain” — an AI-powered system that allows our team to instantly access knowledge, past solutions, and SOPs.



Additionally, we see AI as a major opportunity for our business long-term. Beyond internal systems, we would value your input and consulting on how we could potentially introduce AI-driven offerings or services to our clients in the future.





Engagement Structure:

This role will begin as a 3–6 month engagement focused on building and implementing core internal AI systems.

Based on performance and company needs, there is strong potential to:



Extend into a full-time role, and/or  

Transition into an ongoing AI consultant / strategic partner as we expand into AI-driven offerings





What You’ll Be Responsible For

Build an internal AI assistant trained on company data (fires, SOPs, client issues, documentation)

Extract and structure data from tools like 
, Google Drive, Slack, and Front



Implement RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems to make company knowledge searchable and actionable



Create automations that reduce manual work across departments (Client Success, Ops, Sales)

Set up and optimize workflows within tools like GoHighLevel (CRM), including automations for leads, follow-ups, and internal processes



Continuously improve internal workflows using AI



Identify bottlenecks and proactively suggest AI-driven solutions



Provide strategic input on potential AI-based products, services, or enhancements we could offer to clients





Example Project You’ll Own

We log all internal “fires” (issues) in 
 along with how they were resolved.



You will build a system where:

A tea
mber can ask: “How do we handle this type of issue?”



The AI provides:

-Similar past cases

-What actions were taken

-Suggested next steps



Required Skills and Experience (Must-Haves)

-Experience working with OpenAI API / LLMs (GPT, etc.)

-Strong understanding of RAG systems (vector databases like Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)

-Proficiency in Python or Node.js

-Experience integrating APIs and connecting different tools

-Ability to structure messy data into organized, usable systems

-Strong problem-solving skills and systems thinking mindset

-Good written and verbal English communication



Nice to Have (Bonus)

-Experience with Zapier, Make, or other automation tools

-Experience building internal tools or dashboards

-Familiarity with CRM/project management tools (
, ClickUp, GoHighLevel, etc.)

-Experience working with customer support or operations teams

-Exposure to building or launching AI-based products or services



Who This Is NOT For

-Someone who only knows basic ChatGPT prompting

-Someone who needs step-by-step instructions for everything

-Someone without real implementation experience

-Someone who cannot think independently or solve problems



What Success Looks Like

-We reduce repetitive manual work across teams

-Our Client Success Managers can instantly access solutions to problems

-Internal knowledge is centralized and easily accessible

-AI becomes embedded into our day-to-day operations

-Our CRM and internal systems become more automated and efficient

-We uncover opportunities to expand into AI-driven services or offerings





How to apply? 

Ready a brief Loom video (2–5 minutes) explaining: 

(a) A system or automation you built using AI, and (b) The problem, your approach, and the outcome.

(b) Send me a google drive link with your pdf format resume. Make sure it's accessible.

title: AI-Powered Video Editor — DTC Supplement Brand (Daily Ad Content)
description:
If you geek out over AI tools, live inside video editors, and get excited about making ads that actually convert to sales — keep reading!



1.About the Role:

We're a fast-growing supplement brand called Kavari and we need a talented video editor who is fluent in AI creative tools to produce daily ad content for
 and Instagram. This is a long-term position with consistent weekly work, clear systems, and room to grow with the brand.



You will be onboarded with a full SOP covering exactly how we use our tools and what our creative standards look like. We're not looking for someone to figure it out — we're looking for someone skilled enough to execute at a high level from day one and follow a proven system.



2. What You'll Be Doing:

Editing and producing 7 videos minimum per week (1 ad video per day) from raw footage, UGC clips, and AI-generated assets. Videos are primarily
 and Instagram ads ranging from 1-4 minutes. You'll receive, copy angles, hooks, and creative direction. Your job is to make it convert.



3.What We Provide:

-Access to our "Higgsfield" account for AI video generation, ai still images, and motion tools

-Full onboarding SOP with step-by-step instructions for our creative workflow

-Weekly creative direction, hooks, and copy angles

-Clear feedback and fast communication



4. How we communicate: 

-we will primarily communicate through whatsapp. as the brand grows and we onboard more employees we will start using "Slack" to keep things organized



5.Requirements:

-Strong portfolio of
 and Instagram ad edits — supplement, health, or ecom experience preferred

-Prior hands-on experience using AI tools to create video content — you must be able to show examples

-Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or equivalent editing software

-Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to hit a daily delivery schedule

-Strong communication — you will be expected to flag issues early, not miss deadlines silently



6. AI Tool Experience Required:

You must have proven prior experience experience using AI tools for creative production. We will provide access to our Higgsfield account as well as "heygen". Experience with ElevenLabs for high quality voiceovers is a strong plus. We are not looking to train someone on AI basics — we need someone who already understands how to use these tools to produce high quality ad content and can follow our SOP to do it our way.



7. Bonus Points If You Have:

-Your own active subscription to Claude Pro or ChatGPT Pro for copywriting and creative ideation

-Your own AI video creation subscriptions — having your own tools shows you're already living and working in this space and take the craft seriously



8. Compensation:

-Flat rate for 7 videos per week — negotiable based on experience and portfolio quality

-You will be paid using "wise" so its a big plus if you have a "wisetag" or wise account.

-Bonus pay for any videos delivered beyond 7 per week, rate determined by video length

-Bonuses for high converting winning ads

-Long term position with potential to grow as the brand scales



9.Content Ownership:

All content produced for Kavari is the exclusive property of Kavari. Account access provided to you from us may not be used for any other clients or personal projects. All raw files, exports, and project files must be delivered to Kavari upon completion. Account access will be revoked if this rule is broken and also immediately upon end of contract.



10. To apply send the following:

-Your expected flat rate for 7 videos per week

-Your portfolio or links to ads you've edited

-An example of a video you created using AI tools — tell me exactly which tools you used and how

-List any AI subscriptions you currently pay for yourself

-1 paragraph on why you'd be a good fit for our fast-moving DTC brand

title: Landscape Architect
description:
Position Summary

We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Landscape Architect to join our remote design team. This role is responsible for developing high-quality landscape plans for residential projects in California while ensuring seamless coordination with our design group. The ideal candidate will have expertise in landscape design, site planning, and sustainability, with strong communication and collaboration skills for remote teamwork.



Key Responsibilities

- Design landscape plans for residential projects in California, ensuring aesthetic appeal and functionality.

- Create planting plans, hardscape layouts, irrigation designs, and outdoor living concepts tailored to client needs.

- Research and apply California-specific zoning, environmental, and planting regulations to design solutions.

- Develop technical drawings, site plans, and 3D renderings using industry-standard software.

- Coordinate closely with the design team, project managers, and consultants to align landscaping with overall project vision.

- Assist in concept presentations, material specifications, and design revisions based on client feedback.

- Stay informed on sustainable landscape practices, native plant selections, and water-efficient designs.

- Manage multiple projects while ensuring timely delivery of high-quality landscape plans.



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Landscape Architecture, Architecture, or a related field.

- Proven experience in residential landscape design and remote collaboration.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Lumion, Adobe Creative Suite, and other landscape design tools.

- Strong understanding of California climate, planting guidelines, and sustainability principles.

- Excellent communication and coordination skills for working remotely with a U.S.-based team.

- Ability to manage time effectively and deliver quality work within project deadlines.

- Knowledge of irrigation systems, hardscape materials, and outdoor lighting is a plus.





Kindly send your CV/Resume and Portfolio and make sure it is accessible. Goodluck!

title: Design Operations Associate
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Design Operations Associate to support our architectural and design team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working behind the scenes, and can keep projects, people, and systems running smoothly.



You will play a key role in ensuring the design department operates efficiently by handling administrative tasks, coordinating workflows, managing resources, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines and delivering high-quality work.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide efficient virtual office management support, including accurate processing of invoices, maintaining digital records, and assisting with online procurement tasks.

- Assist and coordinate with designers to ensure project tracking data is accurate and up to date.

- Help manage team accounts, assist with logins, and provide guidance on using tools such as Docusign, Dialpad, Lark Payment Requests, and others.

- Support designers with operational tasks such as sending documents via Docusign, submitting payment requests, scheduling meetings, coordinating projects, and working with other departments.

- Coordinate with consultants, request proposals, assist in scheduling site visits, track progress, and ensure timely submission of payments.

- Support the recruiting process for the design department by collating applicants from different platforms and scheduling interviews for shortlisted candidates.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering, or a related field.

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

- Basic knowledge of Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.

- Strong communication and presentation skills.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Knowledge of industry-specific standards, if applicable.



Why This Role is a Great Fit

- Long-term, stable remote role with a growing design team

- Work closely with architects, designers, and project managers

- Opportunity to grow within operations and project coordination

- Exposure to real-world architectural and construction workflows



How to Apply

Please submit your application along with your resume and a brief note/portfolio about your experience in operations, or any relevant experience.

title: Executive Assistant- Remote - Full Time, Admin, Customer service
description:
**DATA COACH CLAIRE**

**Part-Time Admin Assistant — Remote**



(Please complete the test task noted below to be considered for the role)



I'm looking for a reliable, process-minded Admin Assistant to support the day-to-day operations of Data Coach Claire — my online coaching and Amazon influencer business. This is a fully remote, asynchronous role (40 hours/week) with a wide variety of tasks across content, customer service, systems, and more. If you're someone who loves creating order out of chaos and gets satisfaction from making things run smoother, this might be the role for you.

This role is a blend of data-entry, process creation, customer service. I'm looking for someone kind, resourceful, helpful, great communicator.



For context, there are two parts to my business. I earn commissions on Amazon through review videos, and also coach others on how to do the same. 

My review videos:





My coaching:



• YouTube: 

• TikTok: 





---



**ABOUT DATA COACH CLAIRE**



Data Coach Claire is an online coaching and Amazon influencer business. I create data-driven, educational content. I coach clients one-on-one and through programs. I also run an Amazon influencer storefront where I review and recommend products. This role supports both sides of the business.



---



**ABOUT THE ROLE**



This is a full-time (40 hours/week), fully remote position. Work is primarily asynchronous with 1–4 short check-in calls per month. You'll be given clear tasks and expected to work independently, ask good questions when something is unclear, and flag issues proactively.



This role will evolve as the business grows. I have a clear list of starter tasks, but new responsibilities will be added over time — and I want someone who's excited to grow with me and help the business grow, not just check boxes.



---



**30-DAY PAID TRAINING PERIOD**



All new hires begin with a paid 30-day training period at $3 USD/hour. After training we'll evaluate how things are going and discuss an ongoing rate based on your performance, efficiency, and fit.



---



**COMPENSATION**



• $3/hour during 30-day training period

• $3–$7 USD/hour ongoing, depending on experience and efficiency (if you're fast I'll pay you more per hour)

• 40 hours/week

• Fully remote and async

• 1–4 short check-in calls per month (we'll find a time that works)

• Long-term role with room to grow



---



**WHAT YOU'LL DO**



Starter tasks include:



• Respond to customer service
s and inquiries (coaching clients and Amazon-related like brands who want me to review their product)

• Post and schedule existing content across platforms

• Help update and maintain my website

• Help build and manage automations (e.g. like connecting my ConvertKit newsletter to my website)

• Monitor performance of past videos and flag insights

• Data entry and spreadsheet management in Google Sheets

• Build and document processes and SOPs so tasks are repeatable and efficient

• General admin support across both the coaching and Amazon influencer sides of the business



This list will grow. I'll continue adding tasks as the business grows and as I identify new needs — that's part of the role.



---



**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR**



• Highly organized and process-driven — you love finding a faster, cleaner way to do things

• Great written communication — clear, warm, no typos, kind to customers

• Fast learner — you can figure things out without being walked through every step

• Comfortable with feedback and always looking to improve

• Proactive — you flag issues before they become problems and ask questions when something is unclear

• Google Sheets/Drive experience (required)

• Experience with AI tools is a plus (I use Claude and ChatGPT)

• Experience with web building/website maintenence is a plus

• Experience with ConvertKit/StanStore or other
/newsletter platforms is a plus

• Looking for a long-term role, not a one-off gig



---



**HOW TO APPLY**



Please submit ALL of the following to be considered. Applications close Wednesday, May 6th or when 200 applications are received. Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

Please don't use AI to write this part of your application because I'll be able to tell - they all look the same. To show you're following directions, please include in your message subject line the name I go by on my Amazon Storefront (linked above) like _________Reviews it.



**1. Cover Message**

Please include:

• Your 2-sentence understanding of what Data Coach Claire does and who I serve

• Why you're a great fit for this specific role

• One sentence about who you are as a person outside of work



**2. Resume**

Include your resume or a brief work history summary, even if limited.



**3. Test Task A — Customer Service Reply**



A coaching client sends the following
:



*"Hi! I signed up for your program last week and I'm having trouble accessing the course materials. I've tried logging in twice and it's not working. I'm really frustrated because I paid for this and haven't been able to use it yet. Can someone please help me?"*



Write the reply you would send on my behalf. Keep it warm, professional, and solution-focused. You don't need to actually solve the technical issue — focus on tone, empathy, and next steps.



**4. Test Task B — Systems Thinking**



Describe a specific example from your own experience where you took a task or process that was slow or messy and made it faster or more efficient. What was the original process? What did you change? How much time or effort did it save?



If you don't have a past example, answer this instead: I currently receive around 10–15 customer
s per week and respond to each one manually. How would you build a simple system around this to make it faster and more consistent?



**5. Portfolio or Work Sample (Optional but encouraged)**

If you have an example of a spreadsheet, SOP, process doc, or system you've built, please share a link or screenshot.



---



Applicants who pass the test task review will be invited to complete an asynchronous video interview this week. 



We're building something here — and I want someone who wants to be part of it for the long run. Hope to hear from you!



---



*Keywords: Virtual Assistant | Admin Assistant | Executive Assistant | Remote | Full Time | Online Jobs PH | Filipino VA | Google Sheets | ConvertKit | Customer Service | Content Scheduling | Systems | Process Improvement | AI Tools | Online Coaching | Amazon Influencer*

title: Key Account Manager (KAM) - US Market
description:
Job Title: Key Account Manager (US Markets) - Remote

Salary: $700 - $1,000 USD per month (Negotiable based on experience)

Job Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Shift: US (EST/PST)



About the Role

We are looking for a results-driven Key Account Manager to join our fast growing Tax and Accounting startup's team. You will be the primary point of contact for our valued clients in the USA. Your mission is to nurture long-term relationships, ensure client satisfaction, and identify opportunities for growth within your assigned accounts.



This is not a "virtual assistant" role; we are looking for a strategic thinker who understands Western business culture and can manage client expectations with confidence and wit.



What You’ll Do

Relationship Management: Serve as the lead point of contact for all matters specific to your accounts.  



Retention & Growth: Proactively engage with clients to ensure they are meeting their goals and identify upsell/cross-sell opportunities.  



Strategic Communication: Conduct regular check-ins and performance reviews via [Zoom/Google Meet].



Problem Solving: Act as the "firefighter" for any client issues, coordinating with our internal teams to provide swift resolutions.  



Reporting: Track and report on account metrics (KPIs) to both the client and leadership.



Required Qualifications

Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience as a Key Account Manager, Customer Success Manager, or similar client-facing role.



Market Familiarity: Proven experience working with clients in the US, Australia, or the UK. You must understand the cultural nuances and professional expectations of these regions.



Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English. You should be able to lead a meeting without hesitation.



Tech Savvy: Proficiency in CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and project management software (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).  



Reliability: A stable internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps) and a quiet home office setup.



Why Join Us?

Competitive salary paid on time, every time.



100% remote work—no commute, ever.



Opportunities for performance-based bonuses and Paid Time Off.



How to Apply

Please send your application with the subject line: "KAM Rockstar - [Your Name]".



Attach your updated resume.



Include a brief 1-2 minute video introduction (Loom preferred) explaining your experience with Western clients.



Tell us your favorite tool for staying organized and why.

title: HubSpot CRM Marketing/Sales Automation Specialist
description:
About Conference Badge



Conference Badge is a B2B platform serving event organizers with on-demand badge printing and event-tools software. HubSpot is the backbone of our marketing, sales, and customer lifecycle operations. We're investing in marketing automation to support nurture, inbound lead capture, and dormant-account reactivation across our customer base.



About the role



We're hiring a hands-on HubSpot specialist to stand up our Marketing Hub foundation and deploy our first automated campaign end-to-end. You will be the sole owner of HubSpot marketing automation setup at Conference Badge. You'll work directly with the CEO to align on campaign strategy, and you'll support internal team training and workflows where necessary to make sure the automations you build can be run, monitored, and lightly extended by Conference Badge staff after handoff.



Working with Claude (AI assistant): We will provide you with access to Anthropic's Claude AI assistant to accelerate the work — drafting copy, designing workflow logic, and reviewing configurations. You should be comfortable using AI tools as a daily collaborator. All Claude sessions used for this engagement will be conducted on a Conference Badge-managed account where the CEO has visibility into conversation logs. This is not punitive — it's how we maintain a knowledge trail of decisions, prompts, and outputs so the work is auditable and transferable. You must be comfortable working in this monitored environment.





Scope of work



Foundation



-Configure HubSpot Marketing Hub navigation, settings, and account hygiene

-Verify and connect the primary marketing
 sending domain (DKIM/SPF/DMARC, sending reputation hygiene)

-Install and verify HubSpot tracking code on Conference Badge web properties

-Deploy the Conference Badge brand kit (logo, fonts, colors) inside HubSpot

-Align with the CEO on the first core campaign goal (e.g., nurture, inbound lead capture, closed-lost reactivation) and produce a written activation plan



Segmentation, lifecycle, and campaign assets



-Deploy best-practice contact segments / lists based on a data modeling discussion with the CEO

-Configure lifecycle stages and the rules that govern progression between them

-Build the first marketing automation workflow aligned with the agreed campaign goal, including triggers, branches, delays, exit conditions, and suppression rules

-Deploy the first campaign asset 
, social, form, landing page, or CTA) connected to that workflow

-Deploy a second campaign asset to extend the campaign



Reporting and dashboards



-Build a marketing dashboard with HubSpot-native reporting on form submissions, new contacts,
 performance, and campaign engagement metrics

-Configure attribution and ROI tracking appropriate to the campaign goal

-Document how each metric is calculated and where the underlying data comes from

-Internal enablement (light, as-needed)

-Work with the CEO to support internal training and workflows that educate the Conference Badge team where necessary, so staff can operate, monitor, and lightly extend the deployed automations after handoff

-Produce concise written and video documentation (SOPs and a "what to do when X breaks" runbook) for the deployed workflows, segments, and dashboards

-Be available for follow-up questions from internal staff during the engagement



Sales Hub Foundations 



-Deploy standard list views for Contacts, Companies, and Deals, and a best-practice Sales Pipeline

-Configure up to 8 custom deal properties for qualification and tracking

-Deploy 3 customizable
 templates and 1 basic sales sequence

-Build two sales dashboards covering outreach activity (deals created, call outcomes, sequences, activities, lead conversion, lead response time, lead progress, leads by stage) and deal metrics (revenue by month, new pipeline generation, deal velocity, deal change history, task completion, sales velocity)

-Provide light written and video documentation so the CEO and team can operate the system





Required qualifications



-3+ years hands-on configuration of HubSpot Marketing Hub (Pro or Enterprise tier)

-Proven experience deploying workflows, lifecycle stages, segmentation, lists, and campaign analytics in HubSpot and
 workflows

-Experience verifying
-sending domains, configuring deliverability (DKIM/SPF/DMARC), and installing tracking code

-Strong written communication; able to produce clear documentation a non-technical operator can follow

-Comfort with AI-assisted workflows; willing to work in a monitored environment where Conference Badge has visibility into Claude sessions

-Ability to ship complete, documented deliverables — not just "click-around" configuration



Bonus / preferred



-HubSpot Marketing Software Certification or higher

-HubSpot Sales Hub experience (relevant if we extend to the optional scope)

-B2B SaaS, e-commerce, or event / conference industry background

-Prior experience using Claude AI assistant in HubSpot implementation work

-What Conference Badge provides

-HubSpot Marketing Hub access at the required permission level

-Domain hosting platform access (or a pre-verified domain)

-Initial campaign goal direction and stakeholder availability from the CEO

-Social account admin access where needed for campaign asset deployment

-Clear sales-owner assignment before workflow deployment

-Claude account access on a monitored Conference Badge plan

-Available on PST time zones



How to apply



Please send:



A short note (? 200 words) describing a HubSpot Marketing Hub engagement you ran end-to-end, including the campaign goal, what you deployed, and what the client could operate on their own at handoff.



A description of how you've used AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) in client implementation work, and any examples of prompts or workflows you've developed.



Two professional references — ideally one client and one collaborator.

Availability and rate range.

title: FULLTIME Amazon Admin & Sourcing Virtual Assistant!
description:
About Our Company:

We are a family-owned Amazon business based in the US market, and we're looking to grow. We believe in providing a secure, long-term working environment. In this economy, we understand the value of stability, and we want you to have peace of mind knowing you have a reliable and permanent position with us.



The Opportunity:

This is a full-time position for a motivated, self-starter to be a key part of our operations. While the role starts at $500 a month, we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us. As our business expands, your responsibilities and compensation will grow along with it. The sky is the limit for our growth, and we are looking for an ambitious individual who is ready to take on more and build a career, not just have a job.



Key Responsibilities:



1.) Sourcing and Product Research:



Proactively find profitable products for our online arbitrage business using our established criteria and your own initiative.

Research trends and sales to identify new opportunities.



2.) Administrative Tasks:



Handle data entry, ensuring all product and sourcing information is accurate and organized.



Manage and track orders, ensuring timely and correct delivery of inventory.



Maintain detailed records and reports in Google Sheets.



Check for missing inventory: Run the "Reconcile" report for all FBA shipments that were recently closed.



Create a case with Seller Support for any units that Amazon received but have not been added to your inventory.



Track reimbursements: Go to your "Reimbursements" dashboard to ensure all pending cases are being processed. Follow up on any cases that are past the expected resolution time.



How to Apply:

To be considered for this position, please send your resume and a brief cover letter. Additionally, please create a 30-second to 1-minute video introduction of yourself, upload it, and include the link in your reply. Also, please use the following subject line: [INSERT Your Favorite Music Artist]



3.) General Backend Support:



Provide support for various Amazon Seller Central administrative tasks as needed.



Assist with other administrative duties as required to support our business operations.





We Are Looking For Someone Who Is:



A Self-Starter: You don't wait to be told what to do. You take initiative and are resourceful.



Ambitious and Has a Growth Mindset: You want to learn and take on more responsibility, seeing this role as a stepping stone to a bigger career.



Detail-Oriented: You have an eye for detail and ensure all data is accurate.



Trustworthy: You are reliable and honest.



Strong Communicator: You can communicate clearly and effectively in English + Fast Computer



Must be able to work USA Timezone!



Compensation & Benefits:

-Salary: A stable full-time base salary of $500 per month.

— Opportunity to earn $550 USD / mo after 6 months if performance milestones are met

— Opportunity to earn $600 USD / mo after 12 months is performance milestones are met



-Security: This is a long-term position, providing you with job security you can rely on.



-Growth: Significant room to grow in both responsibility and salary as we grow the business. Career advancement (promotions)



— We also offer quarterly and annual performance-based bonuses

— We honor the tradition of 13th pay

— Stable Career and career advancement (promotions)

title: Amazon Account Specialist
description:
Join Leap Stores and Become a Key Player at a Growing Amazon Marketing Agency!



Leap Stores is dedicated to helping brands WIN on Amazon. We are a top 1% Amazon Seller and we utilize our listing optimization expertise, creative listing visuals, and proprietary software to skyrocket their sales. Our team is growing and we're looking for a dynamic, data-savvy, and skilled Amazon Account Specialist to jump on board! You will make a big impact as a critical supportive tea
mber to our Brand Manager as you ensure our Amazon listings are optimized and growing.



What You'll Do as an Amazon Account Specialist:



- Own day-to-day catalog operations, including listing creation, variation setup, flat file uploads, and backend troubleshooting

- Monitor Buy Box performance and top ASIN health to ensure revenue stability

- Open, manage, and resolve Seller Central cases, compliance issues, and appeals efficiently

- Conduct routine listing audits to maintain policy compliance and prevent account risk

- Collaborate with the design team to improve creative assets and optimize listings for higher conversion rates

- Launch and manage A/B tests and listing experiments to drive measurable performance improvements

- Manage promotional tools including Virtual Bundles, Lightning Deals, Coupons, and other growth levers

- Monitor returns, A-to-Z claims, chargebacks, customer messages, and seller feedback to protect account health

- Perform keyword research using Brand Analytics and third-party tools to improve ranking and discoverability

- Analyze competitors and identify listing optimization opportunities



What does Success Look Like?



- On-Time Delivery: Complete 90%+ of assigned tasks on or before the agreed-upon due date

- Quality of Work: Maintains under 2% error rate on accuracy, keyword usage, and compliance checks

- Drive conversion rate growth on top listings



What Makes You a Perfect Fit:



- 3+ years of experience with Amazon account management, with a track record of improving metrics like CVR and CTR

- Deep expertise with Amazon Seller Central and Amazon Terms of Service

- Basic-level & understanding of Amazon SEO strategies

- Proactive communicator and a get-it-done attitude

- An analytical mindset and ability to work with data (Microsoft Excel, Pivot Tables, Formulas)

- Proficiency in tools such as Jungle Scout, Keepa, DataDive, Helium 10, Data Rova, Smart Scout

- A self-starter with a detail-oriented approach, ready to take on challenges in a fast-paced environment

- Ability to work 7am-4pm EST, Monday-Friday.



Why Join Leap Stores?



- A culture that values creativity and data-driven results

- Generous Paid Vacation Time and standard Holiday Pay to enjoy work-life balance

- Opportunities for professional growth in a rapidly expanding company

- A competitive salary package, reflective of your contributions

- Trainings and personal development opportunities

- Work from home



How do I apply?



To formally apply for this position, please send a copy of your resume to 
 and use the subject "Your Next Amazon Account Specialist" (don't forget this step).



As an Amazon Account Specialist with Leap Stores, you’ll join a high-performing team focused on execution, accountability, and results. Your expertise will directly impact our brand partners’ growth on the world’s largest e-commerce platform. If you’re ready to take ownership, solve complex challenges, and contribute to a team that’s continuously pushing performance forward, we’d love to connect. Apply today, and let's grow together!

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

title: Video Editor & Storytelling Partner (Social + Brand Content)
description:
Hey I’m Alex!



I run a 40+ year family restaurant business (Petros) in East Tennessee in the U.S., and I’m also building something much bigger through storytelling—across business, faith, running, and life.



I recently completed a fundraising journey to support a ministry Young Life Africa… and it changed me.

Now I’m looking for someone to help me tell stories that actually matter.



Not just edits.

Not just trendy reels.

Stories that move people.



What You’ll Be Editing



You’ll work on a mix of:



Social media reels (Instagram / TikTok)

Story-driven videos (running journey, South Coast trip coming up, mission content)

Brand content for Petros (family business)

Occasional personal/family storytelling edits







These would be emotion-driven and entertaining edits that are clean w/ simple storytelling

Strong pacing and music choices. Not over-edited… but intentional.



What I’m Looking For:



You care about story over flashy edits

You understand timing, emotion, and pacing

You can take raw footage and find the story inside it

You’re proactive — not just waiting for instructions

You want to grow with someone long-term and learn to anticipate my needs & wants but not afraid to challenge my approach. I need to listen to the expert, not just provide all direction.



Skills Needed

Premiere Pro / CapCut/Insta Edits / After Effects (any combo works)

Strong sense of:

pacing

music selection

cuts + flow

Experience with short-form content (Reels/TikTok)



Bonus:



UGC or brand storytelling experience

You’ve edited content that feels real, not corporate

What I Value—Hopefully this will be helpful for you:



I’m a Christian, and my work is rooted in faith, purpose, and impact to serve others—not to be served.

You don’t have to share that same belief—but you should respect it and be aligned with creating content that is:

positive

meaningful

people-focused



Role Details

Part-time to start (10–15 hrs/week)

Opportunity to grow into full-time

Long-term partnership if it’s a fit

Flexible schedule



Pay Starting range:

$5–$8/hour (based on experience)

With clear path to increase based on performance



HOW TO APPLY

Please do NOT send a generic application.

Instead, please send 2–3 of your best edits and tell me which one you’re most proud of and why.

What makes a video feel “meaningful” instead of just “good” to you? 



I’m not looking for the cheapest editor. I’m looking for the right person. If you care about storytelling and want to build something meaningful, I’d love to work with you.



Alex

title: x account manager and operator
Hvac Estimator
description:
BEFORE SUBMITTING YOUR RESUME PLEASE READ Entirely AND THEN SUBMIT exercise WITH YOUR RESUME, thank you!



Job Title: HVAC Estimator

Location: Dallas

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Experience Required: Minimum 2 years in HVAC estimating or related role



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced HVAC Estimator to join our team. The estimator will be responsible for preparing accurate cost estimates for residential and/or commercial HVAC projects, analyzing project plans, and coordinating with project managers and technicians to ensure successful bids and proposals.



Responsibilities:

Review project specifications and drawings to determine project scope and requirements.



Calculate labor, material, and equipment costs for HVAC installations, retrofits, and service contracts.



Develop and submit competitive bids and proposals.



Communicate with suppliers and subcontractors to obtain pricing.



Collaborate with project managers and engineers to ensure accurate and timely estimates.



Maintain records of estimates, bids, and completed projects for future reference.



Qualifications:

Minimum 2 years of experience as an HVAC estimator or in a similar HVAC project coordination role.



Strong understanding of HVAC systems, materials, and installation processes.



Proficiency with estimating software (such as FastEST, QuoteSoft, or equivalent) and Microsoft Office.



Excellent math, analytical, and communication skills.



Ability to read and interpret blueprints and technical documents.   



This short exercise is designed to evaluate your ability to interpret technician field notes and convert them into clear, professional customer-facing documents.

Please review the service technician’s report below and complete the requested tasks.

Service Call Report – True Refrigeration Make Line

Model: TPP-119

Serial: 8994

Arrived on site and found the make line thermostat set to 9 (coldest setting). Compressor and condenser fan motor were off, while the blower was running.

Set the temperature controller to the off position and then back on; the unit resumed operation and reached 31°F, indicating it is mechanically functioning properly.

Observed a clogged air filter and a dirty condenser coil. Filter and condenser coil were cleaned using nitrogen.

Recommend replacing the mechanical temperature controller, as it appears to be malfunctioning—when the unit shuts off, it sometimes fails to restart. An estimate for replacement should be provided.

Please create the following:

Prepare a professional invoice for the work completed during this service visit.

Include:

Description of work performed

Labor line items

Any service / diagnostic charges

Cleaning performed

Clear professional wording suitable for a customer

Prepare a separate estimate for the recommended repair.

Include:

Scope of recommended repair

Parts and labor

Brief explanation of why repair is recommended

Total estimated price

Use your best judgment and make reasonable assumptions where information is missing.

The purpose of this exercise is to evaluate your ability to work with limited information and think independently.

Please submit both documents in a clear and professional format.

description:

title: Paid Search Specialist (100% Remote / Work From Anywhere)
description:
We are not looking for someone who just sets up campaigns and hopes for the best.

We are looking for a Google Ads specialist who has managed serious monthly budgets, knows where performance breaks down, and fixes it before anyone has to ask.

If you have the numbers to back your work — we want to talk.

Who We Are

We are a performance-driven digital marketing team operating across Asia and Europe. We manage high-budget Google Ads accounts for clients who expect consistent, measurable growth every single month. As we scale, we need someone who can own the numbers and deliver without being micromanaged.

What You Will Own

Full management of Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, Shopping, and Performance Max. Monthly budget oversight of 10,000 USD or more — controlling spend, reducing waste, and maximizing return. Daily performance monitoring with proactive optimizations — not waiting for end-of-month reports to act. Keyword strategy, search term analysis, and campaign restructuring to capture high-intent traffic. Conversion tracking setup and audits across GA4, GTM, and Google Tag to ensure data is clean and reliable. Clear monthly reporting showing budget managed, ROAS achieved, CPA improvements, and next steps.

You Are the Right Fit If You:

Have 3 or more years of hands-on Google Ads experience managing real accounts at scale. Have directly managed monthly budgets of 10,000 USD or more and can show proof of performance. Can walk us through an underperforming account you diagnosed and turned around — with data. Know GA4, GTM, and conversion tracking inside and out — setup, troubleshooting, and QA. Understand bidding strategies, auction dynamics, and quality score optimization at a deep level. Write clearly in English and communicate proactively without needing constant follow-up. Work independently, take full ownership, and flag issues before they become problems.

What We Offer

100% remote — work from anywhere in the world. Competitive salary based on experience and the results you deliver. A lean, high-trust team that respects expertise and moves fast. Real budgets, real clients, and real impact every month. Clear path to grow into a senior or lead role as the team expands.

Compensation: Competitive and discussed during the interview based on budget experience and past performance.

How to Apply

Send your CV and a performance portfolio to 

Subject Line: [Google Ads Specialist] - Full Name - Budget Managed - Ready to Scale

In your
 please include the following:

The monthly budget you have managed (exact figures preferred).

The platforms and campaign types you have run.

One example of a result you are proud of — ROAS improved, CPA reduced, or revenue scaled.

We read numbers, not promises. Applications without budget and performance data will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor - Educational Content, YouTube, TikTok
description:
**DATA COACH CLAIRE**

**Part-Time Video Editor — Remote**



(Please complete the test task noted below to be considered for the role)

---



We're looking for a talented and detail-oriented Part-Time Video Editor to join the Data Coach Claire team. This is a remote, part-time asychrounous role (20 hours/week) focused on editing long-form content and creating short-form videos (TikTok & YouTube Shorts) that match my warm, educational, and professional brand style.



Find us here:

• YouTube: 

• TikTok: 



---



About Claire: Claire is an online coach that helps people make money online.



**ABOUT THE ROLE**



This is a part-time, remote position starting at 20 hours per week with the potential to grow as the channel grows. You'll work asynchronously, with a monthly video check-in call. All raw footage will be delivered to you via Google Drive and finished edits are returned the same way.



Work is primarily async — no set schedule required — but we do expect a turnaround time of 2 business days or less per deliverable.



---



**30-DAY PAID TRAINING PERIOD**



All new hires begin with a paid 30-day training period at $4 USD/hour. This is your opportunity to learn our style, workflows, and standards — and for us to see how you work. After the training we'll evaluate how it's going and d
 to offer you the ongoing part time role. 



---



**WHAT YOU'LL DO**



• Edit long-form video content (educational/podcast-style) following the brand style guide

• Cut short-form content (30–90 seconds) from long-form footage for TikTok and YouTube Shorts

• Apply brand fonts, colors, and motion graphics consistently per style guide

• Remove pauses of 0.7 seconds or longer for a tight, engaging watch experience

• Add subtle animated text, numbered lists, and light graphics where appropriate

• Use camera zoom adjustments for natural emphasis (no aggressive zooming)

• Incorporate provided photo/video assets — no stock video or AI-generated faces

• Use subtle transition sound effects (quiet whoosh, ding, etc.) — nothing overdone

• Deliver finished files via Google Drive within 2 business days



---



**BRAND STYLE GUIDE OVERVIEW**



YES:

• Animated words and text

• Numbered lists

• Animated graphs and numbers

• Subtle camera zoom for emphasis

• Brand font: Montserrat

• Brand colors (see style guide in linked Google drive folder)

• Less is more — clean, intentional, minimal

• Remove pauses of 0.7 seconds or more

• Subtle money graphics/art

• Subtle transition sound effects (quiet whoosh or ding)

• Use of provided photo/video assets



NO:

• AI-generated video or people faces (AI in your workflow is fine)

• Stock video

• Aggressive or dizzy zooming

• Explosions or over-the-top movement

• Flickering, jiggling, or grainy graphics

• Cutting off any part of a sentence



Reference channels of style I like"

• 

• 



---



**COMPENSATION**



• $4-7 USD/hour, depending on experience and efficiency. $4/hour for 30 day training period, then we can discuss an ongoing rate.

• ~20 hours/week to start — grows with the channel

• Flexible schedule — fully remote and async. One video check in call once a month (we can find an overlapping time that works)



---



**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR**



• Strong eye for clean, minimal editing — you understand that restraint is a skill

• Great communication — responsive, proactive, and clear, no typos, ask questions when you don't understand

• Fast turnaround — can consistently deliver within 2 business days

• Growth mindset — you're looking for a long-term role, not a one-off gig

• Comfortable with feedback - getting better over time

• No minimum experience required — your portfolio and test edit speak for themselves

• Familiarity with any professional editing tool (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.)



---



**HOW TO APPLY**



Please submit ALL of the following to be considered. Applications close Wednesday, May 6th or when 200 applications are received— including completed test edits.



1. Cover Message

Tell us briefly:

• Why you're a great style fit for Data Coach Claire

• Your 2 sentence understanding of what Data Coach Claire does - what the channel is about

-one sentence about who you are as a person - what your life looks like outside of video editing



2. Portfolio Link

Share a link to your full portfolio and a link specifically to one piece of previous work that best matches the Data Coach Claire style guide. The closer the style match, the better.



3. Test Edit (Required to be considered)

Please edit the first ~5 minutes of the 28 min raw footage according to the notes shared in the video (spoken verbally) and in the style guide. Please also create one test 'short' that matches the style on my TikTok account using the long raw footage. 

Access the test footage here: 



Please complete both of the following:

• Edit the first 5 minutes of the long-form test video following the style guide

• Create one short (30–90 seconds) from the test footage for TikTok or YouTube Shorts



Return your completed edits as a Google Drive link(s) in your application. This test edit is unpaid and must be submitted by Wednesday, May 6th.





Applicants who pass the test edit will be invited to a video call interview. We're looking for someone who's in it for the long haul — hope to hear from you!



Applicants who do not follow instructions here on how to apply will not be considered (cover message, portfolio links, test edits).

title: Skilled Accountant - BSA Required
description:
Experienced Accountant for a virtual practice in the United States



*Bachelor of Science in Accountancy degree required (or equivalent)

_

We are a virtual accountancy located in the United States. This is NOT a position for an inexperienced accountant - rather, we are seeking a professional accountant who has graduated with a BSA with skills in financial analysis. We are looking for an expert level, permanent, full-time accountant to join our team who can jump in right away and take on client accounts. We are happy to train on our systems and culture but we are seeking a candidate with a high level of experience in accounting, preparing financial statements, running payroll, and is reliably accurate in their work. We specialize in small business accounting with a bookkeeping focus and we work with a wide variety of companies across many industries throughout the country.



The ideal candidate should possess a deep knowledge of small business accounting and bookkeeping, excellent spoken and written English, strong communication skills, and a desire to learn and grow with the company. In addition, an expert-level knowledge of QuickBooks Online is required. We will only interview candidates with at least 4 years of experience in the field. If that is not you, kindly, please do not apply to this position.





Responsibilities:

Responding to client
s regarding financial reports/statements, updates on their Quickbooks Online account, status updates for cleanup/setup/monthly reconciliations, etc.

Pursuing clients for sales summary reports, payroll reports, bank statements, and other miscellaneous files needed

Ensuring that client’s QBO account is up to date on app integration and bank sync’s

Updating Double (our CRM) daily on tasks and projects that you complete

Send your direct manager a DAR (daily accomplishment report)

15-25 clients or $10,000/mo in Revenue Under Mgmt. (RUM)





Qualifications:

BSA or equivalent

4 years of QuickBooks Online experience required

Advanced QuickBooks Online certification required (if you do not currently have this updated, you can still apply for the position)

Knowledge of Microsoft Excel

Ability to multitask with accuracy and transition between the books of multiple businesses each day

Ability to work with efficiency and accuracy under tight deadlines

Excellent time management ability





Work Schedule:

This is a full-time position, Mondays to Fridays. We will need you to be available between 9AM - 5PM Eastern Standard Time (9PM - 5AM Philippine Time). We honor all Filipino holidays as long as all required tasks are completed and all deadlines are met.





Salary:

$1800USD per month (dependent on level of experience and ability)





Perks and Benefits:

Christmas Bonus

Birthday Bonus

Quarterly bonus of $1,000USD for $10,000USD/mo in RUM

5% clean up bonus

Paid vacation

Generous sick leave





Application Process:

*You must have graduated with a BSA and currently possess no less than 4 years of accounting experience working with small businesses

*If you feel that you would be a good fit for the role, please reply to this post and, put “I’m a BSA with at least 4 years of experience” in the subject line of the message.

*ONLY QUALIFIED CANDIDATES should
 their resume.

*Explain the extent of your knowledge of QBO

*At least two professional references from past employers. Preferably, we would like to have the contact of your most recent direct supervisor from your latest work position.





Thank you and best of luck!

title: Senior Design Associate (PH)
description:
Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm in the vibrant city of San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a unique opportunity for growth and collaboration across disciplines

In this role, you will take a leadership position in the design department, overseeing drafting, coordinating workflows, mentoring junior staff, and ensuring timely delivery of high-quality architectural projects. This position is essential in driving design excellence, maintaining compliance, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines across residential and commercial developments in California.

.

Responsibilities

• Manage project documentation, including schedules, coordination records, and technical reports. 

• Represent the design team in client meetings, presentations, and reviews, incorporating feedback into deliverables.

Qualifications

• 5–10 years minimum drafting experience in the Architecture/Construction industry. Previous US project experience strongly preferred. 

• Revit proficiency is required. Knowledge of AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Bluebeam is a plus. 

• Strong leadership and mentoring skills, with proven ability to manage project workflows. 

• Excellent communication and presentation skills in English. 

• Strong organizational skills, high attention to detail, and accuracy in documentation. 

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment. 

• Knowledge of industry-specific standards and California compliance requirements.



Fully Remote
