title: Virtual Assistant — Wholesale & eCommerce Operations
description:
We are a growing UK-based food import and distribution business representing premium brands across wholesale and eCommerce channels. We need a sharp, proactive VA to take ownership of the back-office operations that keep the business running.



This is a long-term role with real responsibility. You won't just be following instructions — you'll be expected to stay on top of outstanding tasks, flag problems, and keep things organised without being chased. A big part of this role is data — if you're not genuinely strong in Excel and Google Sheets, this isn't the right fit.



Reporting & Excel

Build and maintain spreadsheets for stock, sales, aged debtors, and performance data. Reports must be clean, accurate, and easy to read. Data entry must be error-free.



Stock takes & inventory sheets

Maintain live stock sheets, reconcile against system data, build structured templates, and flag discrepancies immediately.



Invoicing & billing

Raise and send customer invoices accurately and on time. Match to purchase orders and flag discrepancies.



Credit control

Chase overdue accounts by sending statements, following up on unpaid invoices, and keeping payment records current.



Reconciliation

Reconcile customer accounts — matching payments to invoices, identifying mismatches, and resolving queries.



Order management on Zoho

Create, update and manage sales orders on Zoho. Keep statuses current and chase fulfilment where needed.



Shopify listings

Update product listings, prices, images, and descriptions. Keep stock accurate and flag low-stock proactively.



Canva — basic design

Produce simple marketing assets, product sheets, and listing imagery using Canva templates.



Customer correspondence

Send professional
s — statements, follow-ups, order confirmations — on behalf of the business.



What we need:

Advanced Excel & Google Sheets

Clean, accurate data entry

Excellent written English

Pivot tables & formulas

Experience with Zoho

Shopify experience

Credit control / AR experience

Canva proficiency

Works independently

UK hours (GMT) availability

Wholesale or eCommerce background

Reliable fast internet



How to apply

Please do not send a generic cover letter. Instead, write us a short message (4–6 sentences) explaining:



1. Your experience with Excel — what's the most complex spreadsheet or report you've built, and what formulas did you use?

2. Your experience with Zoho — which modules have you used and how?

3. One example of chasing overdue payments or managing accounts receivable.

4. Your availability and whether you can cover UK business hours (GMT).



: 

Subject: Job title and your location!



We will send shortlisted candidates a short Excel task before any interview. Applications without a tailored response will not be considered.

title: Ecommerce Graphic Designer
description:
Job Title: Ecommerce Graphic Designer

Location: 100% Remote



Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Rate: $6.25/hour



Job Overview

We are looking for a talented Ecommerce Graphic Designer to join our creative team. Your primary goal will be to create visually stunning and high-converting designs that drive sales across various online marketplaces and platforms. You should have a deep understanding of how to translate product features into compelling visual stories that resonate with online shoppers.



What You’ll Do

Listing Optimization: Create high-quality product images, infographics, and comparison charts for Amazon, eBay, Shopify, and other marketplaces.



A+ Content / EBC: Design enhanced brand content and digital storefronts that improve brand authority and conversion rates.



Photo Editing: Perform professional retouching, background removal, and color correction to ensure product photos look premium and consistent.



Digital Marketing Assets: Produce eye-catching banners for websites, promotional
s, and paid social media advertisements 
, Instagram, etc.).



Brand Consistency: Ensure all visual materials align with the brand’s guidelines and maintain a professional look across all digital touchpoints.



Ad Creative: Design "click-worthy" assets for PPC campaigns, focusing on layout and typography that grab attention quickly.



What We’re Looking For

Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing previous ecommerce-specific design work (especially Amazon infographics or web banners).



Software Skills: Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop and Illustrator are essential).



Conversion Mindset: An understanding of "Visual Hierarchy"—knowing how to guide a customer's eye to the most important selling points.



Attention to Detail: Ability to follow strict marketplace requirements (size, resolution, and text-to-image ratios).



Efficiency: Ability to manage multiple projects at once and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Communication: Strong English skills to ensure all text on graphics is grammatically correct and persuasive.



Why Join Us?

100% Remote Work: Work from anywhere with a stable internet connection.



Professional Growth: Opportunity to work with a diverse range of products and brands.



Stable Schedule: Fixed 40-hour work week with weekends off.



Collaborative Environment: Work alongside experienced E-commerce Account Managers and Marketing professionals.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website:





For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn:

www.
/company/moesgroup

title: Content Operations Manager
description:
Happy Thursday! Thank you so much for taking the time to review our job posting. ????



Priority will be given to applicants who:



- Write an ORIGINAL cover letter/response that directly addresses our requirements (i.e. not copied/pasted to high-volume applications).



- Do NOT use ChatGPT / AI tools to write your cover letter. We want to meet YOU first — your voice, your thinking, your honesty. (We’re not anti-AI; we just want your application to reflect you.)



=====

ABOUT US

=====



We’re Agency — a small (intentionally small), values-centric fractional marketing team serving ambitious, ROI-driven clients.



We take our work seriously, but we also take care of each other. We’re big believers in:



- Clear communication

- Kindness + professionalism

- Doing excellent work without burning people out

- Building long-term working relationships (not revolving-door hiring)



If you’re the kind of person who takes pride in quality, communicates honestly, and likes being part of a team that truly supports one another — we’d love to hear from you.



=====

OUR MISSION

=====



Our fiduciary duty is to provide our clients with integrity-led marketing centered on measurable ROI and delivering value long after our work is done.



=====

OUR VALUES

=====



We hire for alignment with our values and candidate transparency/honesty above all else. We’re proud of how much our team cares — about our clients, about the work, and about doing right by each other.



Candor as a Compass

----------

Our word is our bond. We communicate honestly, clearly, and directly — even when it’s hard — because trust is everything.



Purpose Over Profit

----------

We only take partnerships we truly believe in, where we can deliver meaningful, lasting impact.



Double or Nothing Approach

----------

We aim for total conviction that every dollar billed is likely to return multiples in long-term value.



Data Tell the Story

----------

We prioritize based on evidence. If it doesn’t show up in the data, it doesn’t count.



Fail Forward Philosophy

----------

We take smart swings, learn fast, and improve relentlessly — without blame, ego, or drama.



=====

ROLE OVERVIEW

=====



We’re hiring a full-time Content Operations Manager to own editorial quality, content planning, SEO viability, and process improvement across our content team.



This is NOT a “calendar-only” role and it’s NOT “just editing.”



This is a leadership + systems role for someone who can:



- Ensure every deliverable is on track and meets our standards

- Final-approve ALL content going out the door

- Build and improve the systems that make the team faster without sacrificing quality

- Use AI for speed, while applying strong human editorial judgment to produce content that ranks and converts



If you thrive when you’re accountable for outcomes, love clean processes, and have a sharp editorial eye — you’ll fit in well here.



=====

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

=====



- Client content deliverables ship on time, consistently

- Editorial quality is noticeably higher (clarity, structure, voice, logic, evidence)

- SEO content is built to rank (not just “written about a keyword”)

- Conversion/influence content is persuasive and brand-aligned (not generic)

- The team moves faster over time because your systems, templates, QA steps, and AI prompts are improving continuously



=====

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

=====



Content Leadership + Final Approval (Quality Gate)



- Final approval of ALL content team deliverables before anything is sent to clients or published

- Enforce editorial standards: clarity, logic, structure, tone/voice, credibility, and usefulness

- Ensure content aligns to the content brief, client goals, and intended audience

- Reject content that doesn’t meet standards (kindly but clearly) and provide actionable revision steps



Content Planning + Delivery Management



- Own the content calendar and ensure deliverables stay on track

- Proactively surface risks: blockers, missing inputs, bandwidth constraints, deadline slips

- Coordinate with internal stakeholders (PM, SEO lead, account manager, etc.) to keep everything moving

- Ensure briefs are strong enough that writers/designers can execute without chaos or guesswork



SEO Strategy + Execution Oversight



- Ensure SEO deliverables are viable: search intent match, topical completeness, internal linking opportunities, SERP alignment

- Review outlines for depth, structure, and competitive coverage

- Ensure on-page fundamentals are correct: titles, headers, meta, keyword usage (without robotic stuffing), and formatting

- Coach and improve the team’s SEO execution over time



AI + Process Design (Efficiency Without Compromise)



- Maintain and improve prompts, templates, and workflows used for AI-assisted drafting

- Ensure AI-generated drafts are editorialized into high-quality, human-sounding final work

- Improve team SOPs, QA checklists, and handoff conventions

- Reduce revision loops and prevent recurring mistakes through better systems (not more nagging)



Client-Ready Standards



- Ensure deliverables are “client-ready”: polished, aligned, and defensible

- Maintain high trust through accuracy, consistency, and clear reasoning

- Identify patterns in client feedback and solve upstream (process/briefing/prompting/training)



=====

JOB REQUIREMENTS

=====



- 35–40 hours per week (full-time); flexible working hours

- Prompt communication and reliable follow-through

- A dependable computer, stable power, high-speed internet + backup hotspot

- Comfort using GSuite (Google Drive, Docs, Sheets) and basic Microsoft Office

- Ability to accept payroll via Wise (formerly TransferWise)

- Willingness to log hours using a time tracker (e.g. Hubstaff)



=====

REQUIRED SKILLS / TRAITS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

=====



- Honesty and candid communication — even when it’s uncomfortable

  (We can work through almost anything with transparency. Trust is the only thing we can’t rebuild once broken.)



- Native-level English fluency with deep editing experience (line editing + copy editing)



- Strong editorial judgment: you can quickly identify what’s weak and explain how to fix it



- Strong SEO understanding (search intent, SERP analysis, topical depth, on-page fundamentals)



- Strong content planning/project management instincts (deadlines, capacity, dependencies)



- Process design ability: you can build systems that are simple, repeatable, and scalable



- Comfort using AI tools for drafting and analysis, without sacrificing originality, credibility, or quality



- High standards, delivered with kindness (clear feedback without being harsh or ego-driven)



- Strong attention to detail and fact-checking discipline



=====

DESIRED SKILLS (BIG PLUS)

=====



- Experience managing a multi-writer editorial team

- Experience building SEO content engines (brief > outline > draft > edit > publish > optimize)

- Familiarity with Surfer/Frase/Clearscope, Ahrefs/SEMrush, GA4, GSC, Looker Studio (any is fine)

- Experience editing conversion-focused pages/emails (landing pages, homepages, nurture sequences)

- Experience creating or improving AI prompts specifically for SEO outlines and drafts

- Familiarity with WordPress and/or HubSpot CMS for basic formatting and publishing workflows



=====

EXPECTATIONS

=====



- Your manager will be there for you — and we will set you up for success — but…

- After onboarding, you’ll be trusted with real autonomy and real accountability

- You’ll be expected to think critically, prioritize intelligently, and keep the machine running

- We have a strict policy against logging/billing hours when you aren’t actively working

- If you can’t reach expected hours in a given week (sick, power outage, etc.), tell us as soon as possible

- You will be the final quality gate — which means your judgment must be reliable and consistent



=====

BENEFITS / HOW WE TAKE CARE OF OUR TEAM

=====



We work hard to build a place people actually want to stay — and we back that up with action.



- Paid Time Off (PTO) for full-time tea
mbers (after probation)

- Paid holidays, including a company-wide Christmas/New Year break (Dec 23 – Jan 1)

- Regular raises and performance-based growth opportunities



AND — one of our biggest commitments:



- After 12 months of full-time employment, you become eligible for our 4-day workweek benefit:

  - 25% pay raise, and

  - 20% reduction in hours

  (Example: moving from ~40 hours/week to ~32 hours/week while keeping pay whole.)



We don’t offer that to sound impressive. We offer it because we care about sustainability, family, health, and long-term performance.



=====

HOW TO APPLY

=====



Please include:



1) A short ORIGINAL cover letter answering:

   - Why this role is a fit for you (specifically)

   - Your editing + SEO strengths (what you’re best at)

   - An example of how you improved a content process (what changed and what improved)

   - Confirmation you’re comfortable with time tracking + full-time hours



2) 2–3 examples of work you’ve directly influenced (links are great), such as:

   - Content you edited that performed well (rankings, traffic, conversions, client results)

   - A content calendar or planning artifact you’ve managed (redact client names if needed)

   - A SOP, checklist, or process you built that improved quality and speed



3) A brief note on your experience using AI in content workflows:

   - What you use it for

   - What your quality-control approach is

   - How you prevent generic, low-quality output



Optional (but helpful): include the phrase “Data Tell the Story” in your subject line so we know you read the full post.



=====

CLOSING

=====



Thank you again for your time and consideration. If you’re a high-integrity editor and systems thinker who loves building a content machine that produces work you’re proud of — and you want to do it inside a team that genuinely supports you — we’d love to hear from you.



Have a wonderful rest of your week and weekend ahead. ????

title: Video Editor
description:
What You’ll Be Editing

We create high-performing Meta 
/Instagram) videos for a skin healing brand focused on real skin 
nts (irritation, redness, flare-ups, bumps, etc).



Your role is to turn raw footage into:

Rates:

Volume:

Consistent weekly work (not one-off)

Strong pacing + cuts

Captions + text overlays

We will send you:

- Editing style (pacing, cuts, flow)

- Attention to detail

- Important

How to Apply? Send:

Your availability

How many videos you can edit per week

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant
description:
POSITION DETAILS

 • Position Type: Part-Time (20–30 hrs/week)

 • Pay Rate: $7–$9 CAD/hour

 • Schedule: Flexible / Async

 • Payment: Weekly via Wise or PayPal

 • Experience Level: Beginner–Intermediate

 • Start Date: ASAP



ABOUT THE BRANDS

You will be supporting three brands under one umbrella:

• The Established Ones — A faith-based brand at the intersection of kingdom entrepreneurship and biblical prosperity. Content is rooted in scripture, teaching, and equipping an audience of faith-driven entrepreneurs.

• Make Them Marvel — A lifestyle and creative brand with a premium aesthetic.

• Marvel Motorworks — An automotive brand with its own distinct social media presence.

All content, templates, and brand guidelines will be provided. Your job is to execute — not create from scratch.



ROLE SUMMARY

We have the content. We have the templates. We need YOU to be the hands that get it posted and scheduled so our brands can run on autopilot while we focus on growing.

This is an execution-focused role. You will take pre-made content (reels, carousels, captions, graphics) and schedule or post it across social media platforms. You will also upload and organize content into Marbelism so our content calendar runs automatically.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Social Media Posting

• Post content to Instagram,
, TikTok, and/or YouTube for all three brands using provided templates and captions

• Follow content schedules and posting guidelines — no guesswork required

• Add correct hashtags, tags, and descriptions as provided

Marbelism Scheduling

• Upload pre-made content into Marbelism (scheduling platform)

• Organize and schedule posts for The Established Ones, Make Them Marvel, and Marvel Motorworks

• Ensure content is queued correctly for the week/month

Organization & Communication

• Keep content tracker up to date

• Flag any issues with content, broken links, or missing assets

• Weekly check-in via voice note or message to confirm tasks are on track



YOU ARE A GREAT FIT IF YOU…

• Are familiar with Instagram,
, TikTok, and/or YouTube

• Can follow detailed instructions and templates without needing constant direction

• Are detail-oriented — captions, hashtags, and timing matter

• Have used a social media scheduling tool before (or can learn quickly)

• Are consistent, reliable, and communicate proactively

• Respect faith-based and kingdom-centered content values

• Can work independently and manage your time across multiple brands



WHAT IS NOT REQUIRED

• You do NOT need to respond to DMs or manage community engagement (at this stage)

• You do NOT need to run ads

• You do NOT need prior experience with faith-based brands — just a respectful, professional attitude



ADDITIONAL TASKS

While the responsibilities outlined above reflect the core focus of this role, please note that additional tasks may be assigned as the business grows and needs evolve. We are a multi-brand operation and value tea
mbers who are flexible, willing to learn, and able to support where needed. You will always be communicated with clearly before any new responsibilities are added.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

• Marbelism (content scheduling — training provided)

• Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube

• Google Drive or Dropbox (for accessing content assets)

• Canva (view-only access to templates)

• WhatsApp or Slack for communication



COMPENSATION







|            |20 hrs/week   |30 hrs/week     |

|------------|--------------|----------------|

|Hourly Rate |$7–$9 CAD/hr  |$7–$9 CAD/hr    |

|Weekly Pay  |$140–$180 CAD |$210–$270 CAD   |

|Monthly Est.|~$560–$720 CAD|~$840–$1,080 CAD|



Payment is made weekly via Wise or PayPal. Transaction fees covered by employer.



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please submit the following:

• A short video or voice note (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your experience with social media and scheduling tools

• A list of platforms and scheduling tools you have used

• Your available hours per week and preferred working times

• Any examples of accounts or pages you have managed (optional but appreciated)

Applications that do not include a video or voice note will not be reviewed. We want to hear from YOU!



The Established Ones | Make Them Marvel | Marvel Motorworks

Kingdom Entrepreneurs. Built for More.

title: Apartment Administrative Assistant
description: We are looking for a dependable Administrative Assistant to support daily operations for a growing apartment management company. This role involves a mix of administrative work, tenant communication, and data tracking. If you are organized, responsive, and comfortable handling multiple tasks, this could be a great fit.

title: Interior Design Construction Documentation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist (Fully Remote)

Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM – 8:30 AM PH Time)

Company: Alignment Architects Inc., Cupertino, CA

Location: Fully Remote



Company Introduction

Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm based in San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. We specialize in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a dynamic environment for collaboration, technical growth, and design excellence.



Position Overview

 We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist to support our residential projects in California. This role focuses on the preparation of high-quality interior design construction documents and post-permit revisions.



 You will play a critical role in translating design intent into precise, buildable drawings, ensuring coordination across disciplines and compliance with applicable codes and standards. This position is ideal for someone with strong documentation experience who thrives in a fast-paced, production-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

  - Construction Documentation:

 Develop and refine detailed interior design construction documents, including floor plans, reflected ceiling plans (RCPs), elevations, sections, schedules, and interior details. 

  - Technical Coordination:

 Coordinate architectural interiors with structural, MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing), and civil drawings to ensure fully integrated and conflict-free documentation. 

  - Code Compliance:

 Ensure all drawings comply with California building codes, local zoning regulations, and industry standards. 

  - Post-Permit Documentation:

 Prepare supplemental drawings, revisions, and addendums to address plan check comments, RFIs, and construction changes. 

  - Design Translation:

 Accurately translate design concepts, sketches, and markups from designers into clear and precise technical drawings. 

  - Team Collaboration:

 Work closely with architects, interior designers, project managers, and consultants to maintain documentation accuracy and efficiency. 

  - Quality Control:

 Review drawings for completeness, consistency, and constructability prior to submission. 

  - Software Utilization:

 Produce high-quality drawings using industry-standard tools such as Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.



Qualifications

  - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Architecture 

  - Experience: Minimum of 3 years in architectural/interior design documentation (residential experience preferred; US projects a plus) 

  - Software Proficiency:

    -  Strong proficiency in Revit & Autocad (required) 

    -  Knowledge of SketchUp and Bluebeam is an advantage 

    -  Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite 

  - Technical Knowledge:

    -  Strong understanding of construction detailing and documentation standards 

    -  Familiarity with MEP and structural coordination 

    -  Knowledge of California codes is a plus 



  - Skills:

    -  Excellent written and verbal English communication 

    -  Strong attention to detail and organization 

    -  Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment 

    -  Proactive, collaborative, and accountable work ethic



If interested, send a message with your updated CV and portfolio. Make sure your CV and portfolio are visible to us (or accessible). Thanks!

title: Permitting Coordinator (Architecture / Residential Projects)
description:
Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive architect to oversee the permit application process for residential projects in California. This role will involve coordinating with local building departments, ensuring compliance with regulations, and expediting permit approvals to keep projects moving efficiently. The ideal candidate will work closely with the design department to prepare required documentation, monitor project timelines, and communicate confidently with city officials, consultants, and internal teams.



Key Responsibilities:

- Manage the permit application process for residential projects, ensuring all submissions meet state and local regulatory requirements.

- Work closely with the design department to gather necessary plans, reports, and specifications for permit submissions.

- Liaise with city officials, building departments, and third-party consultants to facilitate approvals and resolve any permitting issues.

- Track and monitor permit timelines, providing regular updates to internal stakeholders to maintain efficient progress.

- Identify opportunities to expedite permit approvals by proactively addressing compliance requirements and coordinating necessary revisions.

- Ensure adherence to California building codes, zoning laws, and environmental regulations in all permit applications.

- Maintain organized documentation for permits, approvals, and project correspondence.

- Stay informed of changes in local permitting policies that may affect project timelines and requirements.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Architecture, Construction Management, Urban Planning.

- Licensed Architect (preferred) or relevant experience in permit coordination for residential projects.

- Strong knowledge of California building codes, zoning regulations, and permit processes.

- Experience working with city agencies, planning boards, and regulatory bodies.

- Exceptional organizational skills and the ability to track multiple projects efficiently.

- Highly confident communicator with strong negotiation and problem-solving abilities.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, and other architectural documentation tools.

- Familiarity with permit expediting strategies and local jurisdiction requirements.



Send your CV and Portfolio, make sure it is accessible. Goodluck!

title: E-commerce Growth Lead (Shopify) (Traffic + Conversion + Revenue Growth)
description:
E-commerce Growth Lead (Shopify)

(Traffic + Conversion + Revenue Growth)



SKILLS

1. Full-Funnel Performance Marketing (Traffic ? Revenue)

2. Shopify Conversion Optimization (CRO + AOV Growth without sacrificing brand aesthetic)

3. Experimentation & Data-Driven Growth Execution



ROLE OVERVIEW

Your mission is simple: Bring the right people to Maison Mnandi Africa—and turn them into loyal, paying customers. You will own the entire customer journey, from the first touchpoint to the final “Thank You” page.



ABOUT THE BRAND

Maison Mnandi Africa (
) is a luxury brand dedicated to high-end artisanal products, contemporary African fashion, and premium accessories.

We celebrate African cultural heritage by bridging ancient craftsmanship with modern design. From our handwoven Bolga baskets to our evolving fashion collections, each piece reflects a living tradition curated for a global audience.



CURRENT STAGE

We are currently in the early stage of building traffic and generating our first consistent online sales. Our website is live and visually strong, but we are now focused on building a working, scalable growth engine from the ground up.



THE GOAL

To move from a visual-first brand to a revenue-generating e-commerce business through structured testing, optimization, and smart scaling.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Traffic Generation

• Plan, launch, and optimize campaigns to drive real traffic and intent, not just aesthetics, across relevant channels (Meta, Pinterest, Google,
, or others).

• Focus on attracting high-intent customers who are ready to purchase, not just passive browsers.

• Continuously test audiences, creatives, and messaging to find the "winning" formula.

• Conversion Optimization (CRO)

• Audit and refine our Shopify experience with a mobile-first focus.

• Reduce friction, improve trust signals, and increase both conversion rate and AOV (Average Order Value).

• Sales & Retention Strategy

• Implement upsells,
/SMS flows, and post-purchase journeys that increase customer lifetime value.

• Testing & Iteration

• Run ongoing experiments across traffic, messaging, and site experience.

• Make decisions based on data and results—not assumptions.

• Performance Tracking

• Own the data. Ensure tracking systems (Pixels, GA4, etc.) clearly show what is driving traffic, conversions, and revenue.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Proven experience driving traffic AND revenue for boutique or luxury e-commerce brands.

• Strong understanding of performance marketing and buyer psychology.

• Hands-on Shopify experience (themes, apps, and UX improvements).

• Aesthetic Alignment: Ability to balance premium brand storytelling with high-performance conversion tactics.

• Growth Mindset: Comfortable working in an early-stage, test-and-learn environment.

• Clear Communicator: Ability to connect daily actions to bottom-line business outcomes.



HOW SUCCESS WILL BE MEASURED

• Growth in qualified traffic.

• Achieving the brand's first consistent online sales.

• Improvement in conversion rate and Average Order Value (AOV).

• Efficient Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC).



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

• Base: USD $800 / month.

• Performance Bonus: 5% commission on monthly gross sales.

• Long-Term Opportunity: As revenue scales, your role and compensation will grow with the business.



HOW TO APPLY

Start your application with the word “HERITAGE.”

1.	Share 2–3 stores where you managed both traffic and conversion.

2.	Describe a specific test or change that led to measurable revenue growth for a previous client.

3.	What would you test first for our brand—and why?

4.	What is your preferred tech stack for tracking and scaling a boutique e-commerce brand?

title: Phone Rep/Appointment Setter
description:

*You Consider yourself an "A" player and a professional appointment setter.

*You do not excel in a deadline driven atmosphere.

title: Senior Production Artist
description:

Company and Vision

PlanetArt’s vision is to be the leading seller of personalized and make-on-demand products worldwide. We provide consumers with unmatched tools and content and an unparalleled end-to-end customer experience that result in high-quality, meaningful finished products and memorable celebrations of life events.



The company’s brands include the popular FreePrints and FreePrints Photobooks apps and the industry leading SimplytoImpress card and stationery site, as well as Personal Creations, CafePress and ISeeMe! Visit 
 to learn more about our brands.



We have more than 500 tea
mbers across multiple offices, primarily in Calabasas CA, San Diego CA, Woodridge IL, Minneapolis, MN and Pleasanton, CA. We also have tea
mbers in two company-owned offices in China, as well as in Europe.



Job Overview

PlanetArt is looking for a Senior Production Designer as a contractor to support the company’s Content and Merchandising team across multiple brands. The ideal candidate will be proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator, excel at following detailed instructions, and possess a sharp eye for detail with strong problem-solving abilities, as this role involves a lot of quality control processes along the way. mbers to discuss project status and requirements

Eagerness and commitment to quickly learn and master new software platforms, etools, and workflows.

Proven ability to deliver accurate work under tight deadlines.

Positive attitude, self-motivation, and ability to work independently with minimal oversight.

Experience with project management and product review

Working Conditions

Position requires (long-term or seasonal) and fully remote work scheduled from (ex. 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM US Pacific Time)

Position requires regular, continuous use of computer.

Position requires regular sitting and standing.

Position requires regular interaction with tea
mbers through the following methods: phone, WebEx, Slack, or
.

Position requires time and screen tracking via Hubstaff

 

Work from Home Requirements: 

Own computer (Windows 10 or higher or Mac, at least 8GB RAM and at least Intel i5, Ryzen 5 or M1 processor)

Perks

title: Virtual Assistant (Administration and Social Media)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail? oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to provide administrative support and take ownership of our social media presence. This is a contractor engagement, not an employment role. The successful contractor will operate as an independent service provider, managing their tools, and work methods while delivering agreed upon outcomes.



We prefer contractors with experience supporting international clients and who are comfortable working independently with minimal supervision.



** Please submit a 1 minute introduction video as part of your application



Scope of Work 



Social Media Management & Content Creation



• Independently manage and operate assigned social media accounts (e.g.,
, Instagram, LinkedIn)



• Create original social media content, including captions, basic graphics, and short? form posts



• Plan, draft, and schedule posts aligned with brand voice and objectives



• Monitor engagement and provide simple performance summaries



• Take ownership of content quality, consistency, and timely delivery







Administrative & Operational Support



• Complete defined administrative tasks such as inbox support, answering office calls, communications, data entry, document preparation, and basic research,



• Assist with day to day operational tasks based on clearly defined deliverables



• Proactively identify improvements and efficiencies within assigned work



Required Qualifications



• Prior experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar freelance role



• Strong written and verbal English skills with a clear or neutral accent



• Proven ability to work independently and deliver quality results with minimal supervision



• Reliable internet connection and backup power



• Ability to take calls or respond during agreed? upon availability windows







Preferred Qualifications



• Experience managing social media accounts for businesses



• Familiarity with remote collaboration tools and office software



• Strong time? management and organizational skills



• Experience working with international clients







Independent Contractor Requirements



• Operate as a freelancer or independent business



• Use own equipment, software, and work environment



• Control where work is completed



• Responsible for own taxes and statutory obligations





No employment benefits are provided under this contract.



Engagement & Compensation



• Contract for services with defined scope and deliverables



• Initial engagement with renewal option



• Starting rate: $5 CAD per hour (alternative pricing may be discussed)



• Starting half time, should be available 9 AM to 12 PM PST, with possibility to convert to longer working hours or full time.

title: HR & Finance Coordinator
description:
ROLE: HR & Finance Coordinator

Department: Human Resources & Administration

Position Summary:



The HR Finance Coordinator supports both human resources and finance functions, focusing on payroll processing, billing, financial tracking, and administrative tasks. This role ensures accurate record-keeping, timely processing of payments and invoices, and coordination between HR and finance activities.



Key Responsibilities

Manage client billing, invoicing, recurring charges, and payment tracking; audit invoices prior to month-end

Track and record income, expenses, and credit card transactions; maintain accurate financial records

Support payroll processing, attendance tracking, payslips, and contractor documentation

Assist with budgeting updates and financial reporting

Support end-to-end recruitment, including job postings, sourcing, screening, and interview coordination

Maintain candidate records, ensure documentation compliance, and support background checks and references

Coordinate onboarding and offboarding processes, including system access, documentation, and clearances

Track associate performance, engagement, and productivity; provide weekly reports and support performance review cycles

Support internal communications and assist with associate engagement initiatives



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field

Minimum of 3 years of proven experience in HR and/or administrative roles, with a strong focus on accounting functions (remote experience preferred)

Solid background in compensation and benefits administration, including payroll processing, and employee benefits coordination

Proficiency in accounting and HR platforms such as QuickBooks, Xero, Oracle, or equivalent systems

Skilled in MS Office and Google Workspace, with working knowledge of remote collaboration tools such as Zoom, Slack, Trello, Asana

Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail and a high level of discretion when handling sensitive information

Exceptional organizational and time management abilities; capable of working independently and meeting deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Stable internet connection and a dedicated remote workspace





Technical Requirements (for remote roles)

Intel i5 (10th gen+) or Ryzen 5 (3000+) processor

16 GB RAM recommended

Minimum 256 GB SSD storage

Windows 11 or macOS

Dual monitor setup

HD webcam and noise-cancelling headset

Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup solutions for power, internet, and device



Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary with performance-based increases

Paid Time Off

Health insurance coverage or reimbursement

Bereavement Leave

Emergency / sick leave

Clear opportunities for career growth and advancement

Referral bonus 



Work Schedule

Aligned with EST or PST business hours (typically 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM)

Schedule may vary based on client needs and operational requirements

title: VIDEO EDITOR (SHORT-FORM + LONG-FORM) – REMOTE
description:
I am hiring a highly skilled and reliable video editor to support my content and brand as I scale.



This is not basic editing. I am looking for someone who understands storytelling, branding, and how to create content that performs.



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will be responsible for editing both short-form and long-form content, including:



Short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and
 (Reels, Shorts)

Long-form YouTube videos

Podcast-style and talking-head content

Content designed for conversion, not just views



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR



You must:



Have strong experience editing short-form content that is engaging and high-performing

Understand pacing, hooks, retention, and storytelling

Be able to edit long-form YouTube videos with structure and flow

Understand branding within the niches of business, lifestyle, luxury, wealth, motivation, and personal development

Know how to create videos that feel intentional, not random

Be reliable, responsive, and able to meet deadlines consistently



REQUIRED SKILLS



Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar)

Ability to add captions, cuts, zooms, sound effects, and visuals that enhance storytelling

Understanding of viral content structure and short-form strategy

Ability to follow direction while also bringing creative input

Strong communication skills (written English)



IMPORTANT



This role requires someone who understands more than editing.



You should understand:



How to keep attention

How to build emotion in content

How to structure videos that lead to engagement and action



PAY



Pay starting at $8–$15 per short-form video depending on quality and experience



There is opportunity for consistent work and long-term growth.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply,
 your response to:





Your
 must include:



Why you want this position

Why you would be a strong fit for this role

Your experience editing content in business, coaching, or personal brand niches



You must also include:



Your resume

A portfolio of your work

Direct links to videos you have edited (short-form and long-form)



I need to be able to view your work clearly. Do not send only images or screenshots.



Additionally, include the word velocity naturally within your response.

title: Cold Calling Agency Manager
description:
Role Overview

We need a Cold Calling Agency Manager who can own the performance of our calling team end to end. This is not an entry-level position. You will be managing active callers, reviewing call recordings, coaching reps, tracking KPIs, and reporting results to the team lead and clients. You should already understand how a cold calling program works and be able to step in and improve one quickly.



What You Will Do



- Manage a team of 5-15 cold callers across multiple client campaigns

- Review call recordings daily and provide structured feedback to reps

- Track dials, connect rates, conversation rates, and booked meetings per caller

- Run daily or weekly coaching sessions address objections, review scripts, and share wins

- Flag underperformers early and run coaching sessions or replacement processes as needed

- Work with the campaign lead to update scripts, targeting, and sequences based on what is working

- Maintain a live performance dashboard and send weekly reporting to internal stakeholders

- Coordinate with 
 for list management, sequence enrollment, and deliverability monitoring

- Keep the team on schedule and accountable to daily activity targets

- Hire and train new talent as we grow





Requirements



- 3+ years managing a cold calling or outbound SDR team, preferably in a BPO, agency, or high-volume sales environment

- Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

- Experience using 
, HubSpot, or similar sales tools

- Comfortable reviewing call recordings and giving direct, constructive feedback

- Ability to track multiple campaigns and callers simultaneously without dropping the ball

- Detail-oriented, proactive, and responsive during U.S. business hours (EST preferred)

- Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace





Nice to Have

- Familiarity with parallel dialers

- Experience with CRM setup and reporting

- Experience setting up and running cold
 sequences





Compensation

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Long-term engagement for the right candidate

- Performance bonuses tied to team output

- Opportunity to grow with the agency as we add clients

title: Appointment Setter/Lead Generation – High-Volume Outbound
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a highly driven and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing team. This role is focused on lead generation, qualification, and appointment setting within the business financing space.



You will be the first point of contact for potential clients—guiding them through the application process and connecting them with our closing team once qualified.



This is a performance-driven role ideal for individuals who are hungry to earn, coachable, and thrive in a fast-paced sales environment.



Trial Process (Required for All Candidates)

All candidates will go through a 4-day trial period as part of our hiring process:



Day 1: Training on systems, scripts, and sales process (including roleplay and objection handling)

Days 2–4: Live outbound calling using our dialer



Trial Requirement:



Secure at least 1 qualified appointment during the live calling days



If successful:



Receive a $50 USD payout

Be offered a permanent SDR role immediately



If not:



The process will conclude with no further obligation



Work Schedule:



Monday to Thursday only (4-day work week)

8 hours per day

Must be available during U.S. business hours (10PM – 7AM PHT)

Enjoy a 3-day weekend while maintaining strong earning potential



Key Responsibilities:



Make 250+ outbound calls daily to potential business clients

Guide prospects in completing the credit application process

Collect and organize required documentation:

Signed credit application

6 months of bank statements

Voided check

Valid government-issued ID

Upload completed files into the company system

Ensure submissions meet “full package” requirements for underwriting

Transfer qualified clients to a live call with a closer

Maintain a minimum of 1 qualified file per day (must receive an offer)



Training & Development:



Free access to Jordan Belfort’s Straight Line Persuasion training program (Value: $500)

Learn to improve confidence, handle objections, and increase conversions



Compensation Structure (Post-Trial):



Hourly Rate: $5–$7 USD/hour (based on trial performance)

Commission:

$20 per qualified appointment

$50 per closed deal

$50 recurring bonus for repeat deals from your clients



High performers earn more through consistency and results.



We are looking for someone who is:



Fluent in English with clear, neutral communication

Comfortable working U.S. hours

Highly motivated by financial goals

Energetic, confident, and persuasive

Able to handle high daily call volume

Sales experience is a plus (training provided)



Why Join Us?



High earning potential with performance-based rewards

Free access to premium sales training

Clear path to growth (closer or senior roles)

Fully remote setup

4-day work week with 3 days off

 and instagram ads.

title: Real Estate Appointment Setter
description:
*Please submit a video recording of yourself and a recording of a call with a client to be considered for this position.*



We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our team remotely. This critical role involves calling and qualifying daily leads, conducting follow-ups, and converting these leads into opportunities for our real estate agents. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing leads in our CRM system, ensuring the highest conversion rates by reaching out promptly and effectively to all leads.



Responsibilities:



Make hundreds of calls daily to qualify leads, including Expired and Cancelled listings, For Sale by Owners (FSBOs), Home Valuation Leads, Google PPC Leads, and more.



Maintain and manage leads in our CRM system (Follow Up Boss), ensuring timely follow-up and engagement.



Convert qualified leads into opportunities and coordinate with real estate agents to facilitate the buying or selling process.

The Property Operations & Leasing Coordinator manages day-to-day operations across all residential properties (UT + CA), including short-term rentals. This role owns the leasing pipeline (lead response through lease execution), tenant/guest communication, listings, maintenance coordination, bill payment workflows, and occupancy-driving promotions.



This role requires a quick thinker and proactive self-starter who is resourceful, solutions-oriented, and able to take initiative without constant direction. The successful candidate is comfortable using productivity and time-tracking tools (including TMetric) as required.



Key Qualifications

• 5+ years of property management experience, including short-term rentals and long-term leasing

• Proven experience managing the leasing pipeline end-to-end: lead response, follow-up, showings/tours, applications, lease creation, and move-in coordination

• Strong operational familiarity with Utah and California rental laws and regulations

• Platform expertise (hands-on): Hostaway and TurboTenant; plus experience with Airbnb, Zillow, 
, KSL Homes, and similar platforms

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills; professional, clear, and responsive

• Strong time management, attention to detail, and ability to handle urgent issues calmly

• Marketing & listings experience: writing compelling listings, managing photos/virtual tours, and creating promotional offers to increase occupancy

• Proactive, resourceful self-starter: demonstrates initiative and anticipates needs without waiting for step-by-step direction

• Quick thinker under pressure: able to make sound decisions in fast-moving situations and escalate appropriately

1. Strong problem-solver: identifies root causes, proposes solutions, and executes with clear follow-through

Essential Responsibilities



1. Tenant/Guest & Lead Communication (Leasing Pipeline Ownership)

2. Lead Generation, Listings, and Vacancy Management

3. Lease Creation & Documentation

4. Maintenance, Repairs, Cleaning, and Vendor Coordination

5. Bills Payment & Expense Tracking (Direct + Approval Workflow)

6. Platform Management (Required)

7. Marketing & Social Media Promotions





Core Competencies Required for All Positions



We are seeking dedicated professionals who embody the following qualities:



• Collaborative Professional: works well with others, takes ownership, and communicates respectfully

• Proactive & Takes Initiative: spots issues early, proposes solutions, and moves work forward independently

• Resourceful Problem Solver: finds practical solutions quickly, uses good judgment, and follows through to completion

• Fast, Calm, and Solutions-Oriented: performs well in urgent situations and communicates clearly with tenants/guests and vendors

• Company-Focused: takes pride in supporting occupancy, guest/tenant satisfaction, and operational excellence

• Fluency in English: excellent written and verbal communication skills



Technical & Schedule Requirements

• Reliable high-speed internet connection with consistent Wi-Fi stability

• Laptop with sufficient memory and processing power to handle job-specific tasks and software

• Availability to work night shift hours: 11:00 PM to 8:00 AM

• Comfortable using productivity and time-tracking tools, including TMetric, and willing to track work
 as required





Probationary Period & Performance Review: 



3-Month Probationary Period: All contractors begin with a 3-month probationary period. At the end of this period, a comprehensive performance review will be conducted. Based on performance evaluation, salary adjustments and contract continuation will be determined.

title: Salesforce Developer & Administrator
description:
Salesforce Developer & Administrator



About Falcon Wealth Planning



Falcon Wealth Planning is a premier, fee-only Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) dedicated to providing sophisticated, tax-efficient retirement strategies. Operating as a true fiduciary, our firm prioritizes transparency, integrity, and client-centric outcomes. As we continue to scale our operations, we are seeking a dedicated Salesforce professional to help us leverage technology to deliver institutional-grade service and streamlined operational excellence.



Role Overview



We are looking for a fast-paced, high-accuracy Salesforce professional to manage and scale our CRM. You will be responsible for a "Declarative-First" environment, meaning you prioritize Salesforce Flow and standard features over custom code. You must be comfortable working remotely and have the technical background to build and manage API integrations when required.



Key Responsibilities



*    Prioritize Flow: Build and maintain complex automation using Salesforce Flow (Record-Triggered, Screen, and Scheduled Flows) as the primary solution.

*    Strategic Coding: Develop Apex triggers, classes, and Lightning Web Components (LWC) only when standard functionality cannot meet the requirement.

*    API Management: Connect Salesforce to external systems via REST/SOAP APIs and manage secure authentication (Named Credentials, OAuth).

*    Org Maintenance: Handle all core admin tasks, including user permissions, security settings (MFA, Permission Sets), and data health.

*    Speed & Quality: Deliver high-quality, error-free configurations in a fast-moving remote environment.

*    Documentation: Maintain clear, up-to-date documentation for every automation and integration you build.



Requirements & Skills



*    Salesforce Certified Administrator and Platform Developer I (PDI).

*    Proven mastery of Salesforce Flow and its advanced logic capabilities.

*    Three or more years of Salesforce Admin and Developer experience 

*    Bachelor's Degree or higher

*    Practical experience with Apex, JavaScript, and SOQL.

*    Solid understanding of API protocols (JSON, REST, Webhooks).

*    Experience with Git and Salesforce CLI for deployments.

*    Ability to work independently across time zones with exceptional written communication.



What We Expect



*    The 80/20 Rule: We expect 80% of our solutions to be low-code/standard and 20% to be custom code.

*    Reliability: Since this is a remote role, we require a professional who hits deadlines and tests their work thoroughly before deployment to minimize bugs.

*    Efficiency: A "builder" mindset—finding the most direct, maintainable path to solve a business problem.

title: Sales Development Representative (Cold Calling) – Bookkeeping Firm (UK Market)
description:
We’re a fast-growing UK-based bookkeeping firm working with small businesses, property investors, and trades.

We’re looking for a confident, proactive Sales Development Representative (SDR) to generate new clients through outbound calling and follow-up.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Cold calling UK-based accountancy firms to build referral partnerships

Cold calling trades businesses (plumbers, electricians, builders, etc.)

Identifying decision-makers and uncovering real business pain points

Booking qualified meetings into our calendar

Sending targeted follow-up
s after calls

Working through large contact lists in a structured, consistent way

Updating lead status and notes in a spreadsheet or CRM

Suggesting improvements to scripts, targeting, and outreach strategy

Leading sales calls with a deck to potential clients



What Success Looks Like:

High daily call activity with strong energy and consistency

Natural, confident conversations (not robotic scripts)

Qualified meetings booked with real potential clients

Clear notes and organised pipeline tracking

Continuous improvement in conversion rates



Who This Is Perfect For:

You have experience in B2B cold calling or telemarketing

You’re confident speaking to business owners and professionals

You can handle rejection and stay motivated

You think independently and improve your approach over time

You’re results-driven, not just activity-driven



Requirements:

Proven experience in cold calling (B2B preferred)

Strong spoken English with a clear, professional tone

Ability to build rapport quickly and ask smart questions

Experience with
 follow-ups and basic lead tracking

Reliable internet and a quiet working environment

Self-motivated and organised



Role Details:

Part-time (around 15 hours +)

Remote

Flexible hours but must working within 9am-5pm (UK time)

Working from pre-compiled contact lists

Potential to grow into a full-time role based on performance



???? Screening Questions

1. Describe your B2B cold calling experience. Who were you calling, what were you selling, and what results did you achieve?

4. A business owner says: “I already have an accountant.” How do you respond?

5. Record a 1–2 minute voice note pretending you’re calling a business owner to introduce our bookkeeping service.



???? Next Steps



If you’re interested:

1. Submit your CV

2. Answer the 5 screening questions

3. Provide your audio sample



If successful, you’ll be invited to an interview where we will:

- Run through real scenarios

- Ask you to demonstrate a live example sales call



We’re looking for someone who can deliver results, not just activity.

title: 24 Hr Turnaround Hiring VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

description:

title: Oral Surgery Patient Coordinator (Registered Nurse)
description:
Job Title: Oral Surgery Patient Coordinator (RN)

Work hours: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Daylight Time

Work days: Monday to Friday





Scope of Work / Responsibilities

-Manage appointment scheduling and patient reminders

-Coordinate completion of new patient forms, consent forms, and payment requirements prior to appointments

-Maintain and organize patient records and documentation

-Respond to patient inquiries and correspondence

-Coordinate communication between patients and healthcare professionals

-Assist with pre-operative and post-operative patient coordination

-Ensure required medical clearances and health documentation are completed prior to surgery

-Support the treatment coordinator with administrative tasks and documentation preparation

-Prepare reports, spreadsheets, and documentation trackers

-Maintain accurate information within the Open Dental practice management system

-Assist with insurance coordination and EOB processing

-Ensure all patient communication and records follow HIPAA compliance standards



Top 3 Priorities

-Appointment Scheduling & Patient Coordination: Ensuring patients complete required forms, consent documentation, and payment prior to their visit is critical to maintaining smooth clinic operations and preventing appointment delays.

-HIPAA Compliance & Reliability: Strict confidentiality and accuracy when handling patient information are essential. The practice requires someone who can be trusted with sensitive medical records and protected health information.

-Pre-op and Post-op Coordination: The coordinator must understand oral surgery workflows and assist patients with preparation steps, including medical clearances, surgical instructions, and follow-up coordination.





Required Skills and Experience:

-Registered Nurse (RN) license required

-Experience reviewing patient medical histories and medication lists

-Basic familiarity with medications commonly used in surgical or dental settings

-Familiarity with medical and dental terminology, particularly related to oral surgery

-High level of reliability and proactiveness

-Strong critical thinking and problem-solving ability

-Knowledge of oral surgery terminology and workflows

-Excellent communication skills for patient and provider coordination

-Strong understanding of HIPAA compliance and patient confidentiality

-High attention to detail and organizational ability

-Ability to manage complex, multi-step patient processes

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong focus and productivity in a remote work environment



Relevant Professional Experience:

Candidates with experience in the following roles are strongly preferred:

-Medical Receptionist

Experience in medical, dental, or oral surgery environments is highly preferred.

title: Experienced WordPress Designer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for an experienced WordPress designer to join our team for the long haul. This is an hourly contract position with the potential to become a consistent, ongoing role for the right person. We have steady work and want to build a relationship with a designer who can grow with us.

What You'll Be Doing



Designing, building, and maintaining WordPress websites

Customizing themes, layouts, and page designs to match brand standards

Collaborating directly with our team on active projects

Iterating quickly based on feedback

Ensuring sites are clean, responsive, and conversion-focused



What We're Looking For



Proven WordPress experience — you've built real sites, not just edited templates

Strong design eye — UX, layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

Quick, clear communication — we move fast and need someone who responds quickly during work hours

Intuitive problem-solver — able to take a vision and run with it without heavy hand-holding

Reliable availability between 9 AM – 5 PM PST (Monday through Friday)

Comfortable working hourly and tracking time honestly



Nice to Have



Experience with Elementor, Divi, or other major page builders

Knowledge of conversion-focused design (DTC / e-commerce)

WooCommerce experience

Basic familiarity with custom CSS / light development



How to Apply

Book a short interview call with me here: 
 

Please bring to the call:



A list of WordPress websites you've designed and built (live URLs preferred)

Be ready to walk me through 2–3 of your favorite projects and your role in them



Compensation

Hourly rate — competitive and based on experience. Discussed on the call.

title: Accounts Receivable / Collections Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized, persistent, and detail-oriented individual whose primary responsibility is to ensure all completed jobs are paid in full and on time. This role is critical to maintaining cash flow and requires strong communication skills, accountability, and a results-driven mindset.



Key Responsibilities:



- Proactively contact customers immediately after project completion to collect outstanding balances

- Monitor all completed jobs daily to identify unpaid invoices

- Communicate with customers via phone, text, and
 to secure payment

- Clearly explain invoices, payment options, and resolve any payment-related questions or objections

- Coordinate with sales and operations teams to confirm job completion status and customer satisfaction

- Follow up consistently on overdue accounts until payment is received

- Document all customer interactions and payment updates in CRM (ServiceTitan)

- Process payments and ensure accurate record-keeping

- Escalate disputes or collection challenges to management when necessary



Performance Expectations:



- Maintain a high collection rate on completed jobs

- Minimize days outstanding (reduce AR aging)

- Ensure fast turnaround from job completion to payment collection

- Consistent daily follow-up activity with zero missed accounts



Qualifications:



- Strong communication and negotiation skills

- Comfortable having direct, payment-focused conversations with customers

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Self-motivated and persistent—does not let accounts slip through the cracks

- Experience in collections, accounts receivable, or customer service is preferred

- Familiarity with CRM systems (especially ServiceTitan) is a plus

title: Construction Accountant
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Construction Accountant



Job Type: Full Time

Work Hours: 10:00 AM - 06:30 PM Pacific Time.

Salary: $1200 per month



* Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Construction Accountant to support our construction projects by managing documentation, ensuring subcontractor compliance, and maintaining accurate financial records. In this role, you will assist with monthly invoicing, track contract values and change orders, collect and verify compliance documents, and keep project management systems updated. You will work closely with project managers, field teams, subcontractors, and clients to ensure smooth project operations, timely communication, and accurate documentation throughout each phase of the project.



* Key Responsibilities:

Assist with monthly subcontractor invoicing, including document review and accuracy checks

Collect, verify, and track lien releases, certificates of insurance (COI), W-9s, and other compliance documents

Monitor contract values, change orders, and budget adjustments, and update internal logs accordingly

Maintain organized project documentation, digital filing systems, and project folders

Update project management platforms (Procore) and accounting systems (Sage 100 Contractor) with current project data

Coordinate document flow between office teams, field staff, subcontractors, and clients

Ensure subcontractor compliance with contractual requirements prior to payment processing

Generate project reports, cost logs, and status updates as requested by the Project Manager

Support project kickoff activities, closeout documentation, and ongoing communication across all stakeholders

Assist with scheduling, meeting coordination, and various administrative tasks related to project operations



* Qualifications:

Previous experience in construction administration, project coordination, or a similar role

Strong understanding of construction documentation, billing processes, and compliance requirements

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook)

Experience using Sage 100 Contractor and Procore project management software (required or highly preferred)

Exceptional organizational skills and strong attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple deadlines and follow up proactively

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to work effectively with project managers, field teams, subcontractors, and clients

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting priorities





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.
